rating 5.0. They are also great, but I feel like they do require some ... I typically don't write reviews, but I felt the need to for this product. I constantly steel with both anxiety and ADD, and this product has really been a huge help. It is tough to explain, but when you use the product it really does help take your mind off other things while still allowing you to focus on work. I have a few fidget cubes and spinners as well. They are also great, but I feel like they do require some sense of attention to use. This product is perfect to use as a relaxation tool without providing any distractions. I am planning on purchasing more in different colors as well.

rating 5.0. Fun little fidget toy, got two of them. I just got it today. I read about it I believe in a Gawker article about fidget toys and this one, along with the Buddha Board, stood out the most to me.

I clearly have ADHD tendencies, I'm a head scratcher, a knee bouncer, and a fidgeter that can't stay in one place for too long so I've been getting into the fidget cubes and the like and thought I'd give this a shot. When I first got it today I really didn't know what to make of it. At first I was like "this is it?" but the longer I sit here and watch TV and mess around on my computer the more I realize that I've not put this thing down since it got here. And it is such that you don't even realize you're holding it it's just there for stimulation. Because of that I gotta give it five stars, it really does feel comfortable enough in your hand you honestly don't even realize you're playing with it. Based on the price and given the amount of hours I've already held it it's worthy of the high rating. Who knows what I'll think of it in, say, a month from now, but for today and the amount of hours I found it amusing it was worth the price.

I think someone else might've mentioned, but you should give it a good wash with soap and water when you get it. The rings move a lot more freely after that. Overall, it's a cute and fun little toy and it feels good to support someone who is independently making these by hand.

UPDATE: Had this for about a week now and I still can't put it down. Awesome product and my favorite out of all the fidget gadgets I have. Would totally recommend to anyone that feels they can't sit still and need to constantly keep moving.

rating 5.0. I love these! They're a great size and feel I just got two of these a week ago, and am now about to order three more. I love these! They're a great size and feel, and relatively quiet, so they're perfect if you share an office or spend a lot of time in meetings.

rating 5.0. EXCELLENT product and fast delivery intact EXCELLENT product and fast delivery intact.  I agree with the other reviews that you can certainly go bigger.  The first letter is indicative of the size as it is a capital letter - the letters following are naturally smaller because they are lowercase.  I didn't really think that through when ordering so I ordered the 12 inch because I thought the 16 would be too much, but 16 would have been perfect. I ordered the gold painted, despite one bad review posted on the paint job, because I didn't want to be bothered sanding and painting myself.  I was delighted with the paint - flat classy color.  I bought hooks to tap in to the back before hanging it.  They cost less the $2 - no biggie.  You could also hang with ribbon or nails hidden inside the spaces between the letters.  I would order again or give as a gift.  TRULY a find at a great price and fast.

rating 2.0. Do not allow them to paint if you buy! I'll be reviewing this in two pieces... the design and the quality of the paint.

The design:
It looks beautiful and nicely cut. There's no hard edges or tool marks which is a plus. Although a few chips in the wood... almost all were on the backside. We knew going into this purchase that they would not have any hooks to hang the item on our wall. No big deal. We screwed some beehive hangers and that took out all the guess work of measuring and leveling.

The paint:
So this is where things took a turn. When it arrived, I noticed the bubble wrap was stuck on pretty good to the painted face of the name. I had a bad feeling when I began to unwrap it and sure enough... the paint wasn't allowed enough time to dry before it was packaged. The surface was still tacky at a slight touch and i asked myself who would package a painted product when it hasn't fully cured. Needless to say, it looks horrible. There's shiny spots, dull spots, and rough spots. You can tell it wasn't even sanded and just painted over. The amount I paid (which is their most expensive option and largest size) is a freaking joke.

My advice, save urself some money and skip the painting option. It's not worth it at all. I would just have them cut the name and prep and paint urself. I wish I would have done that myself.

rating 2.0. discolored I was looking for something special as my "signature" pieces and after several weeks of looking for just the right ones - I chose these bracelets.  I ordered 3 - w/children's and grandchildren's names on them and I wanted them to be passed to my children when i'm gone.  Anyway, I loved them.  And wore them every day.  And took them off to wash, shower, lotion, etc...  Unfortunately, after about a month of wear (still loved them) they became discolored - both the inside and some on the outside.  I cleaned them a few times with the accompanying cleaning cloths and though they cleaned up nicely, they remained discolored.  I also found that they caused skin irritation.  I took them off til the irritation cleared.  Left them off for a week or so longer and then put them back on, even though they were discolored, I still like the bracelets.  the irritation began again  and the cuffs became increasingly discolored, even looking as though a coating of some sort is coming off.  I truly like these bracelets, but, i'm so disappointed not to be able to wear them- .  The ordering process is easy, packaging is special and it's clear the artisan cares about their product...

rating 3.0. Lovely bracelet but...you may need to clean it with toothpaste before you wear it. This review is only to share information that can help others. It is not to discredit the Seller. The only reason I did not give the Seller 5 stars is due to the bracelet not suitable to wear straight from the package.

First the workmanship: the bracelet arrive quickly in a lovely gift box. I was very impressed with the packaging. When I opened it, the bracelet was in a resealable plastic bag and came with a polishing cloth. The metal stamped message is exactly as I wanted and I am very happy with how looked and fit my wrist.

What I immediately noticed was there was a fine oily film all over the bracelet especially on the inside surface. It left a dirty residue on my skin. I used the polishing cloth on the bracelet and it quickly become soiled. I immediately contacted the seller about this issue. She quickly got back to me and apologized with an explanation that my bracelet most likely missed the final cleaning. They have a new employee in training who accidentally missed this final process before it was bagged to ship. She suggested dish liquid would remove the oily film.

The dish liquid did not remove the oily film however, toothpaste on a damp cloth completely cleaned the bracelet. The dark lettering is intact and the bracelet is in perfect condition. I feel certain had it not missed the cleaning process, this is exactly how it would have looked when I first opened the package.

I offer this information only to enable anyone else (who's bracelet missed the final cleaning), to use toothpaste to remove the oily film. Your bracelet will be clean and ready to wear.

The note included by the maker is nice, he not only thanks you for the purchase but tells you a little about his business and why he does what he does. He also tells you what to expect over the life of the purse. You can tell this person cares about what he does and how it impacts others. The only thing I would change is the size. I would make it a little bigger and have a wider bottom. But that's just my preference, I like purses on the larger side. The leather is soft and strong and the purse was wrapped in a way as to not scratch or damage the leather before arrival. I am looking forward to having this purse for many years to come as my daily bag. But, if he ever makes a bigger one, I'll definitely buy it.

rating 5.0. Just What I Wanted For 3rd Ear Piercings I have worn designs like these earrings for the last 25 years or so, and I have a difficult time finding them as endless hoops for 2nd or 3rd ear piercings any more. I have metal allergies too, so I always buy sterling silver if I can find it. For me, it’s the right color and price. I would rather buy what should be made completely of sterling silver than pay for what may only only be gold-plated. I have bought plated earrings in the past where eventually the plating wears off, or gets scratched, and I end up with inflamed piercings.

These earrings are obviously intended for cartilage and brow piercings, etc. But I just put one of them in one of my 3rd ear piercings, and it’s great! Exactly the look, feel, and price I wanted. I will definitely buy from this seller again.

rating 5.0. High quality and super cute! I bought these for my young niece and nephews to personalize their school bags and they each turned out so cute!

My color combos were:
Turquoise vinyl with Neon Pink thread
Blue vinyl with Orange thread
Blue vinyl with Red thread
Black vinyl with Red thread
Red vinyl with Orange thread
Based on my niece and nephews' current favorite colors.

Each color combo looked great! I probably would have ordered the turquoise/neon pink combo for myself personally, but I ended up falling in LOVE with the Blue/Red and Blue/Orange stitching combos! Even though I'm usually not usually a red person. And the name stitching was top notch.

Note to buyers: the back side is a solid piece of vinyl. The backside of the name stitching is NOT visible, something I was curious about when ordering (so it looks professional and tidy).

rating 5.0. All around a great product! So impressed with the quality of this! I love the end result and it makes my son's superhero themed room that much better. I found similar items for almost 2x or 3x the price before I decided to check Amazon and found this. So glad that I did. READ THE INSTRUCTIONS! When applying to the wall, the key really is to pull the top layer off at a sharp angle as the instructions say. Once i started doing that, it made a world of a difference. You'll feel a little bit of resistance but thats how i knew I was doing it right. If you don't do it this way, you'll see bubbles. Shipped on time as well. No complaints. Very satisfied!

rating 5.0. Wonderful!!!! LOVE them! LOVVVVEE!! These decals are amazing! I am so happy with how my sons room turned out. The city made all the difference giving the right ambiance for his superhero room. My oldest son helped me put the decals up and it took us about a hour. Definitely recommend doing it with 2 people if you buy the big ones like I did. They are well made and packaged great.a scraper was included which was very helpful. I would highly recommend these to anyone. Pay attention to the sizes when ordering. I got the extra large ones... 60" tall. I guess it would just depend on what look you're going for. I'm super happy with my purchase and would definitely buy from this company again.

rating 5.0. The best for a boys room! I absolutely love love love!! It completely set off my sons room. It took me a second to perfect the installation, other than that its great! It comes with so many buildings and the measurements are spot on.

rating 5.0. Difficult, but rewarding! The shipping was extremely fast for these. I ordered the 50in H and 107in W city scape. It came rolled up which I thought would affect the way it'd apply to the wall, but it didn't. Now applying these things to the walls took about 2 hours! I recommend getting a hard block of wood or the squeegee suggested because the top layer of these things are STICKY! It needs to be scraped with the hard block/squeegee/etc in order to get the city to stay stuck to the wall instead of the top layer film. A pain the a** but well worth it because it looks great!

rating 5.0. Great product We did a super hero room for our three year old and this was a great addition. Very easy to install took about 20 min. So far it is holding great. No bubbles and staying exactly where we put it. I got it in dark grey and love it!

rating 5.0. Perfect for any superhero room!! Get these decals!!!! And get the squeegee with it! I have textured walls and was worried about this going on them, but it was a breeze!! It's super intimidating to initially start this because you're afraid to mess it up, but after just sucking it up and doing it, it was so easy. I got the 60" vinyl and I included a picture of the decals in comparison to the crib. I did also use an old wash cloth to rub over the decal as I was pulling off the back piece. I wanted to make sure it was really getting in those cracks. It took a couple hours to get it all perfect, but a week later it still looks amazing! Everyone thinks that it's painted.

Also!! If you get it on the wall and realize it's not how you want it, you can slowly pull it back off and put it back on. One of the buildings that I have, I had to do that with and it doesn't look any different than the rest!

rating 5.0. Flower Bomb Bay-bee! If you are looking for an identical match to Flower Bomb, you have just found it. I became familiar with this scent about a year ago when I went to visit my daughter and she put on the genuine "Flower Bomb." It was addictive. I asked what it was and she told me, followed by how expensive it was. As much as I subsequently wanted to buy it, it was too rich for my blood. Fast forward to a few weeks ago. I did an Amazon search for FB and this came up. After reading the reviews and at the price of the product I figured I couldn't go wrong, and I didn't. I ended up buying and sending a bottle to my daughter, a Flower Bomb expert :-D , and asked her if it smelled like the real deal. She said it certainly did and that she would not be able to tell the difference between the two. She ended up telling a friend who she works with about it and she bought it too. All of us agree it smells like the genuine scent and is priced such that you cannot go wrong. I would highly recommend this scent, especially for FB enthusiasts.

rating 5.0. I LOOOOOOVE This Ring! I got my nose pierced in January and in April I tried to put a traditional hoop in and it was a fail! I could not put it in the save my life! In the midst of my panicking, I bought this ring. From the pictures you can’t really see that it’s open ended and you have to do some bending so it fits YOUR nostril. But i think it’s perfect especially if you’re piercing is still “healing”. You can straighten it and it slides in no problems then pinch it closed. When you first put it in, you may not like it. It is a bit bold compared to a stud. But now I love it and recommend it 100%.

rating 5.0. 5+ stars for price point, quality & gift-ready appearance! I purchased this necklace for my teenage son's girlfriend (bday present) who loves almost anything bee related. I heavily researched bee jewelry and ultimately decided on this and I'm so glad I did! The pendant itself is of lovely quality and absolutely precious. Add in the arrival presentation (for gift giving standards) and it rates off the charts!

The necklace and pendant are assembled in an aesthetically pleasing box which is shipped well protected. Opening the pretty box, I found not only a good quality bee hive pendant, but inspirationally inclusive wording 'the best time for new beginnings is now' and a jewelry cleaning cloth wrapped in a separate little ziplock. Personally, I decided not to cover the box in wrapping paper, but rather assembled multicolored ribbons and a bow with a hand written note placed inside. In total, this gift fared brilliantly!

Considering the price point, quality and gift-ready appearance, I would give this item more than 5 stars if I could. I hope this review has been helpful!!

rating 5.0. BEAUTIFUL! AND BEST CUSTOMER SERVICE I'VE EVER ENCOUNTERED I LOVE this beautiful product and the customer service is truly the best I have ever encountered!

My pictures show the beautiful box and lovely packaging, the pretty drawstring bag the necklace comes in, the quality of every single item. Take a look if you're curious.

This necklace has gotten more comments than any necklace I've EVER worn.

(I only wish it weren't flat on the back-- would be nice if it were round on all sides)

The thing is, not only is this a beautiful and completely unique piece of jewelry that turns heads, it seems like I might be more at peace when wearing it.

If that's not enough, they send you a GORGEOUS FREE GIFT! NO KIDDING. The free gift looks to be just as valuable as the main necklace and it comes in its own cute little bag.

I had a problem with the cord on my necklace and my free gift broke when I dropped it...I contacted them and QUICKLY recieved replacements for BOTH! I had no idea they would replace the free gift, but that's the kind of company this is.

I don't know these people at all, but I am so confident in this company and their products that I recommend them wholeheartedly!

And if you are on the fence, jump off! You'll love your pretty necklace and if you don't, these people have your back. You've got nothing to lose.

The necklace arrived along with a free gift of an onyx crystal (for protection). I was skeptical, but decided to try it on. Almost immediately the ringing in my ears stopped (I've had ringing in my ears for as long as I can remember). The little aches and pains disappeared. And my anxiety disappeared.  Thinking this might be a fluke, I took it off. All of my symptoms came back. So I put it back on. This is by far one of the best things I've bought.

input: rating 5.0. Perfect, delicate bracelet. This came a bit smaller than I expected it to, but it's just perfect. I got it for my sister for Christmas, with both of her kids' names on it. She doesn't like jewelry, and as a mom with two young kids, and doesn't want anything big or dangly. This fit the bill perfectly. Thank you!

rating 5.0. Can Wear All The Time I was looking for something light, thin and short so that it doesn't bother me when I am holding my body up on a yoga mat. I am not a huge jewelry fan because they get in the way when you work out.

This bracelet arrived in a fancy box. It was super shiny and is good quality silver. It looked like they sprayed and cleaned it 100 times. It is prettier in person. I love that the lettering is not too bold but still legible. I didn't want lettering that sticks out too much. You see this with necklaces sometimes. This bracelet is better than I expected.

You do have to pick the right chain length so that whatever is hanging does not bother you when you type or workout on a mat. I am an adult but have the smallest hands and wrists. I ordered the shortest length and I wear it with 4-5 loops (circles) remaining. The 4 circles that hang down do not bother me.

If I could change one thing about this bracelet, it would be to have a smaller plate (where the letters are). Again I have tiny wrists so the plate goes from left end to right end. It is the same width as my small wrist.

You will still like this bracelet though if you'e looking for a memorable gift for someone or a motivational bracelet. You can pick a quote/habit for the front and back of the plate.

UPDATE: December 13, 2020
One of the loops opened up but my boyfriend fixed it. The bracelet has stayed on ever since. I wear it everyday! It is still shiny. Minimal, classy bracelet. I do not regret buying this.

rating 5.0. My 1st review on Amazon because that’s how happy I am with this Took a shot on this because I thought of doing an engraved item super last minute. Just leaving this review to say thanks to the company for delivering as advertised. I’ll be curious how the bracelet holds up over time, but super pleased on price, delivery and meeting my expectation. rating 1.0. Horrible workmanship. It certainly does not look like the one from advertising photo. after looking at the photos at the amazon page, I ordered 7" size, hammered nugold bracelet.

However, what I received was completely different than what it was described & advertised in amazon.
I asked for 7", but they sent me 7.5" which is too big for my wrist.
also, the biggest problem was "hammered" style. As you can see from attached photo from the website, the hammered NuGold looks very nice and unique, however, what I received was looking more like "un-finished, scratch & bent, gold surface" bracelet.
It wasn't hammered properly like their advertising photo, nor shinny & cleanly finished.

Honestly, very disappointed at their workmanship.
UPDATE : JUNE 27, 2018
I have contacted the seller about this issue with the photos and explanation. They asked me to return the item. They have issued the return label, but I had to pay for the shipping back cost which I thought it was bit unfair. The item was received couple of days ago, but they have not contacted me back nor replied back on my email. So, I have contacted Amazon. Fortunately, after checking the communication between me and the seller, Amazon immediately gave me the refund. IT IS GREAT BEING AMAZON PRIME MEMBER !!!!

rating 3.0. Make sure you pick the right font if you want black letters I do like my bracelet.  The three stars I gave it were not for the quality of it at all.  I love handmade items and appreciate what goes into them.  The three stars were for communication.  I wanted what I had printed on the bracelet to "pop" so people would ask me to read it so I ordered it with black letters.  I chose a font that I liked, Celtic.  When I got the bracelet the letters were not in black.  You have to hold it just so in the light to read it.  I emailed them to see if maybe I made a mistake when I ordered it and to let them know how much I loved everything else about it.  I just wanted to be able to see the letters.  They did answer me right away but I was told that the black runs out of the font style I had chosen so they didn't do my letters in black.  They had tried to post it on the sight in the past but it didn't work. That was it.  I wish they would have emailed me before they made the bracelet and asked if I wanted a different font style that could be black or keep the Celtic font and not have black letters.  You guessed it,  I would have asked for a different font style so I could have black letters.  So if you like these bracelets you should get one.  Just make sure your getting what you want.  They are beautiful.

rating 2.0. discolored I was looking for something special as my "signature" pieces and after several weeks of looking for just the right ones - I chose these bracelets.  I ordered 3 - w/children's and grandchildren's names on them and I wanted them to be passed to my children when i'm gone.  Anyway, I loved them.  And wore them every day.  And took them off to wash, shower, lotion, etc...  Unfortunately, after about a month of wear (still loved them) they became discolored - both the inside and some on the outside.  I cleaned them a few times with the accompanying cleaning cloths and though they cleaned up nicely, they remained discolored.  I also found that they caused skin irritation.  I took them off til the irritation cleared.  Left them off for a week or so longer and then put them back on, even though they were discolored, I still like the bracelets.  the irritation began again  and the cuffs became increasingly discolored, even looking as though a coating of some sort is coming off.  I truly like these bracelets, but, i'm so disappointed not to be able to wear them- .  The ordering process is easy, packaging is special and it's clear the artisan cares about their product...

rating 5.0. Excellent quality! I love this bracelet! My husband purchased the copper one for me for our anniversary and it's beautiful! I will be happy to share this beautiful bracelet with my grandchildren decades down the road.

rating 5.0. Nice rings I bought these for myself with my grandchildren's names, after hints of wanting sterling silver ones went ignored by my kids for years - da bums. Anyway, these are very nice and serve their purpose in my heart, my grandbabes are with me always. My only fault for them, which I didn't take away a star for because it's my own fault, is that they look a bit too "industrial" looking for my Grandma hands. I knew the metal beforehand so I should have realized they would, so my bad. I did lose one ring in a drain in Australia (I'm in the US) and was heartbroken, but these rings aren't very expensive so I just ordered another when I got home, which came in a reasonable time since it was the holidays. I couldn't have done that if they had been sterling, that's for sure. They come in a very nice box too.

I would recommend these for a younger person - say under 40 - unless you do indeed like industrial looking jewelry. I do oddly enough, but not on my already wrinkling and battered grandma hands ;).

rating 4.0. Beautiful, instant ship, arrived quickly Got this shiny silver colored ring to memorialize my most recent three rainbow bridge cats 🐈 . The three names were stamped flawlessly on one ring. None of these pe(s)ts were ever far from my heart, but now I can wear them. Have also ordered several for friends and family members with the names of whatever humans/critters are/were important to them. This is a terrific gift. Seller is very quick to respond to questions and requests.
Update: A few days later the color in the names started wearing out, but having read many reviews I expected this and for me it doesn’t detract from the name stamps. The font used is pretty and casual, just as in pic. 👍
Update 2: A coffee colored ring has been worn by its new owner for about two weeks without being taken off and the copper color has not faded, nor has the black color in the name(s).
Update 3: A rose gold colored ring was kinda sad. It never even looked rose, just yellow. The imprint was poorly aligned, it’s uneven. The black color in the names came off almost entirely after 24 hours. This one looks a bit cheap; fortunately it’s the thought that counts.

rating 2.0. looks too good to be true and it isn’t I got three pieces from this seller, one i sent for a gift. Yikes! Two for me. And I most agree with all the one starers. If i would have given the pendant 3 stars, I would take 2 stars right away just because the cord is UGLY, cheap, ridiculously thin, and not elastic at all. I can assure you it will break soon. I could barely passed it through my head just waiting the moment it’d snap on me. Another thing is the little ring that attaches the cord to the stone is so small and delicate that it is almost impossible to replace the cord for something thicker which would Dramatically change the looks of the pendant! So i think im gonna carry these as stones on my jeans pocket because the cord demerits the product so much that i won’t use it in public. Too bad because the stone(plastic) itself is not bad at all. But a pendant that can’t be a pendant is not. So I am going to look for thicker more resistant cords attached to nice stones. Keep looking until these guys realize they are losing business for using a crappy cord unto their almost nice stones (plastic). I am a little worried about the one i gifted!

rating 5.0. Beautifully Significant! Perfect Gift! I purchased one of these necklaces just to see the quality before ordering more. I received it quickly and just in time to gift it to my principal for Principal’s Day. She loved it! I did, too, so I ordered 3 more to gift at the end of the year to the teachers my kids had this year. I wrote a note to go with it about how amazing the dandelion is. It is one of the only plants that all parts can be used: root, stem, and flower. It has been used medicinally. During WWII Japan controlled 90% of the rubber supply. Scientists found that they could make a latex using the white substance in the dandelion stem. This dramatically helped our efforts in the war. People used to routinely plant dandelions rather than grass in the yard because it was useful, rather than grass that was just for looks. Practicality over aesthetics.
To sum up, this necklace with the pretty pearl (even more significance in a pearl that is produced from hardship in an oyster) is a fantastic gift. The meaning behind the dandelion flower (I didn’t even go into how it symbolizes the earth, moon, and stars or wishing when blowing), makes it even more special.
I’m glad I found this on Amazon. I’m sure I will be purchasing more!

We purchased a frame from Michaels (dark grayish) to match with the black and white color scheme of the print. The star map itself had a slight bluish gradation to mimic the starry night, which is a beautiful effect. Seller also included an extra print because I wasn't clear if it was 2 names or 1 full name, so that was very sweet. It was one name, but my employee's SO is a graphic artist, so she will see if he can do some magic to blend in the ampersand. Overall, highly recommend product and Seller.

I have purchased and applied at least a dozen different wall decals to my children’s rooms over the years with no issues, but this decal application was unbelievably difficult. The decals simply wouldn’t stick firmly to the wall, even after dozens of passes with credit cards and hands. So when we began to pull off the front layer, it was basically a nightmare with the decals detaching from the wall which resulted in stretching and ripping. With the help of two family members, we were able to painstakingly hold and maneuver and pat each decal into place, and while the far off results look good, if you get near the decals you can see many, many tiny rips and folds and wrinkles.

Doesn't scream “I’m trendy!” Truly a thin silver nose ring that doesn’t scream “I’m in my 20s and I’m alternative and edgy!” I pierced my nose in college in 1985 because I thought the East Indian exchange students were so beautiful with their jewelry. Then, in a few years, it became “trendy” to get pierced and tattooed. At 55, I’m still donning my nose ring, but not trying to make a statement, so this subtle ring is absolutely perfect!

rating 1.0. I don't think it's 100% silver I love the small gauge size and how many options there are to choose from, however I don't think this is silver. I think it must have a high nickel content. Within a day of putting in the rings, my piercings started weeping clear fluid and I got a rash around both rings and down the nostril. The rash started weeping clear fluid as well. I waited 3 days to change my rings out and wish I had not waited so long. Once I put my stainless steel rings back in, my piercings felt immediately better. Hopefully the rash clears quickly. On another note, the ends of the hoop are very sharp and hurt to put in. My bigger gauge, stainless studs hurt much less to put back, even with the piercings 8nglamed from the rash, than these hoops did going in and out.

rating 4.0. Need glue to reattach inserted stick for necklace mounting. The stick came out of the hole. I am now waiting for glue to set because it is no longer tight. Before this, I had taken off the ring hooked into it so I could thread a cord through the end of the stick more directly, because the original setup had it not sitting flat and sometimes flipping around to be backwards, which I do not like. Assuming the glue works and holds strong, no further action will be needed and I can resume wearing it without fuss. The stick coming loose was my fault for pulling too hard on it, but could have possibly been avoided if the end had a larger hole clearance. Overall, beautiful if smaller than I expected. Great item, wish the stick’s hole was bigger and the stick more firmly attached.

rating 4.0. It’s somehow surprisingly Effective I bought this just to try it out. I wasn’t thinking it would help me with anything but it did.

Been wearing it for 3 months straight and my stress level went down while I was working. Same level of toxic work but I’m able to think more clearly and calmer. Things that usually made me raise my voice are now manageable. I’m somehow calmer. Even road rage was gone.

Don’t get me wrong, I still don’t want anyone to depend to this product as stress and anxiety reliever but this is what happened to me and I’m only sharing it as a review.

For the healing part, I can’t vouch for that as I still have aches and pains from my job. So maybe, it isn’t meant for physical healing.

rating 5.0. Really does work I have a friend who is Wiccan, I however am not. I do value his opinion because we have been friends for a very long time. The necklace arrived along with a free gift of an onyx crystal (for protection). I was skeptical, but decided to try it on. Almost immediately the ringing in my ears stopped (I've had ringing in my ears for as long as I can remember). The little aches and pains disappeared. And my anxiety disappeared.  Thinking this might be a fluke, I took it off. All of my symptoms came back. So I put it back on. This is by far one of the best things I've bought.

rating 5.0. Perfect for Daddy's Girl. With custom engraving, this bracelet becomes a treasured keepsake. I chose to put my daughter's name on the front and "Daddy's Girl" on the back. No matter how it wears over time, my daughter will value this gift long after I'm gone. She is 23 years old, but I could see this gift as perfect for most any age. I am considering one for my 5-year-old granddaughter.

Thanks in part to the packaging, this bracelet gives the impression of class and charm - not the cheap fragile feeling I feared from such a well-priced dainty-looking gift. Dainty-looking is perfect for my daughter, as she would never wear heavy chains. Fortunately the actual sturdiness is much stronger than the dainty appearance suggests.

Final thought: God bless this seller for engraving and shipping so quickly. This bracelet was a last-minute gift idea just a few days before my daughter's birthday party. During the ordering process, there's a field where you can write a note to the seller. I explained the urgent need, and the gift arrived in time. Overall a perfect buying experience.

rating 5.0. Overall very effective Hi there,

As a kindergarten teacher I am familiar with all manner of fidget toys. I have a problem where I pick at my cuticles when I am nervous or bored and nothing seems able to keep my hands busy enough to stop it. However, I love this little gadget! It's quiet enough to use in a room full of people without being terribly disturbing. While not silent, the only sound it produces is a slight metal-on-metal noise as you roll the rings around each other. It's definitely tiny, which for a woman with no real pockets (except those little fakers they put in women's pants) works perfectly for me. A man may want to bump it up a size. I got the small. The rings are pretty and it helps me when I'm bored, giving me something to do without disturbing people near me. Overall, a great product.

rating 5.0. Very Satisfying! I love this. It's so satisfying to fidget with. The rings all move very smoothly and in different ways. I like how the metal takes on the warmth of my hands as I fiddle with it. It's also beautiful to look at. Nice personal packaging too. Thanks!

rating 5.0. A Small Piece of Art Firstly, I received my package early, which satisfied my impatientness. The small fidget ball arrived in a cute, small drawstring bag that I’m sure will be handy later. The fidget ball is actually really beautiful —almost like a miniature piece of art. Personally, I feel like it’s the perfect fidget device for a stressed/anxious college student, like myself, being that it doesn’t look like a toy or the infamous “fidget” spinners. The ball is definitely small —small enough that it is completely hidden in my small hands when fidgeting with it. I believe that will be an important physical quality while taking exams. I wish I would have discovered this product 4 years ago when I entered college, but I’m sure it’ll be perfect during the next several years while pursing my DVM degree. Because I opened this product today, I am not able to review its success at relieving my exam/anxiety induced dermatillomania, so I will post another review later on its effectiveness. For now, I give 5 stars for its appearance and physical features.

Would have been 5 stars if not for that. Regardless of that, I have to constantly ask my girls to give it back. I bought one other one already for one of my girls and I'm sure I'll eventually have to buy another so I can keep this one to myself. Great little toy for those that constantly feel like they need to be doing something with their hands.

rating 5.0. Really helps fidgety hands! Not only is this toy beautiful, it's very useful for me at work to occupy my restless hands during meetings! I was always playing with my pen or twirling my rings on my fingers but now I have something less distracting to keep me busy. I can hold it in my hands on my lap and fidget without anyone noticing. It keeps me focused and helps keep me awake during long, boring meetings. The rainbow colors are bold and beautiful. Their customer service is great as well. Fast shipping and a personal, handwritten note enclosed in the package. Very happy with my purchase!!

rating 3.0. In long run, WAY too little for WAY too much. OK, it's semi-interesting and all, and it's colorful for sure, and I love Mobius strips, but . . . . .  This think is MUCH (MUCH!) smaller than I expected (my fault?), and it doesn't really 'do' anything, and you'd really have to be a math type to realize the mobius strip part.  And it's too small (about size of nickel or quarter) to play with as a 'stress reliever'.  In the end, my reaction is/was "I paid $9.99 for THIS?!"  I don't necessarily DIS-like it, but I wouldn't even pay $2.99 for another one.

rating 5.0. Love it! I bought this for myself as a small fidget to use when I'm anxious and I absolutely love it. If you want, you can grab an individual ring and rotate it, which helps when I want to keep both hands busy. Other times, I am able to roll the entire structure back and forth between my fingers of one hand. I also like that its sturdy. This allows me to squeeze it in my pocket without much give. I have previously been using a nerf ball to fidget with but it had too much give and the circular structure was too simple and did not provide enough strength as well as sensory stimulation due to the simple structure. I also love the colors!!! they very stimulating!

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Beautiful and functional I highly recommend- this is both beautiful and well made. I purchased these a few years ago- but recently when my teen was having serious medical issues, he found it really helps him cope with stress and anxiety.  My mobii became his, and he uses it to de-stress and cope. Recently I ordered him another mini- in his favorite colors. They are very durable and the small size means he can have it in his pocket and take to school easily.  Emotional and metal health are important, and kids going though medical issues can be under a lot of stress. This really helps him de-stress.

rating 5.0. Great product, fast service, will be ordering more! I love these little earrings! I ordered the sterling minis in 22g for my tragus and daith piercings and they are awesome.  My ears are extremely fussy about what I put in these piercings and so far, they are doing great.  I was a little worried that they would be challenging to get in and latch closed, but I was wrong...they were easy peasy, even with these awkward piercings.  They are very dainty and subtle, and they look great.  Thanks a heap, I will definitely be back for more.

rating 5.0. Love these perfect, delicate, earrings! I ordered the silver, 8mm, 24 guage- the PERFECT tiny hoops to put in the upper piercing in my left ear (and I even have a spare now just in case). I love them even more than I thought I would. They are so delicate and elegant. Just beautiful. I so wish they came in 14K too. I would definitely order another pair in gold. Now that I've seen the 24 guage, I think the 22 guage would not be too heavy either. I've worn a tiny diamond in that second hole for years and in this hoop I've finally found something I like as well. Also, they arrived very fast- in just a few days. And as others have said, she did write a nice note : )

rating 5.0. Love! Love Love! Love! Love!  I bought these for my upper ear (cartilage) piercings.  I always have to remove my cartilage piercings before bed, but I don't even feel these. I will definitely be ordering more of these.

input: rating 5.0. Can't Miss...Amazing case...better than all the big box and cheap covers by a mile! This amazing cover is just what I wanted and needed for my new iPad Pro 10.5. The leather and stitching is thick and durable and after constant use over the past few weeks it is holding up remarkably and the natural distressing as it is used is cool.  Also after contacting the maker she was able to adjust where stitches were placed and my modified case can also sit up and be viewed upright if watching a movie or conference call. The pencil holder is perfect and the pouch is great for any paper notes I do have it is great to keep them with me.  Just a great product all around

Thank you for providing the quality I was looking for .

Shipped very fast. The last picture is of the case itself. I scratched the cross and James 4:8 into it.
rating 5.0. Awesome!! Beautiful craftsmanship and fast shipping. If your in the market for an IPAD case you can't go wrong with this one.

The product is amazingly beautiful at great quality.  It’s absolutely stunning leather.  I’ll be making future purchases for my leather needs. ^.^

rating 5.0. Quality of workmanship and leather far exceeded expectations I was so excited for this to arrive and not only did it come faster than I had thought possible, but the quality of the workmanship and leather far exceeded my expectations. It’s gorgeous, sturdy, and practical. I needed something that protected my iPad, held my Apple Pencil, looked professional and felt like my style. They graciously accommodated my request for a snap closure in lieu of the straps and at no additional charge.  The iPad is securely held in with the case sewn to the cover so I am confident the iPad is well protected.  I am extremely pleased with the quality and workmanship of this cover, responsiveness and professionalism of communication.  I highly recommend.

rating 4.0. Five stars for quality and service and -1 for pet peeves. Looks fantastic and the quality is evident.  Customer service is fantastic (I was sent a case with a draw string as opposed to the expected snap closure and the company is sending me the correct one and allowing me to keep the original case ) Five stars for quality ,looks and service but the Apple Pencil holder is too small to allow the fab to be tucked in,no way to prop up my iPad for viewing and despite being made of a thick piece of leather there is very little strength or structure to the case

rating 4.0. It looks and feels like a solid product I just got this delivered today. It looks and feels like a solid product. Thick, heavy, substantial leather flaps. Apple Pencil holder a bit tight, which is not necessarily a bad thing.

Biggest issue: the iPad holding plastic is simply double-side taped onto the leather. This is a shockingly ugly solution. At least use superglue or something.

rating 2.0. Well made but poorly designed. I received my iPad Pro 10.5” case on April 16 2018 and it came with a note asking that they be contacted if I wasn’t able to leave a 5 star review. So I sent them an email. Today is April 30th and I have not gotten a response so this is my review.

Even though it is well crafted and looks good, I cannot, in good conscience, leave a 5 star or a 4 star review for the following reasons:
1. It fits way to sloppy (1/2" of movement in either direction) when closed. It should be a lot more snug it it’s fitment when snapped closed.
2. The power port opening needs to be slightly larger for those of us who use magnetic connectors.
3. It has no magnets to use the automatic sleep/wake feature of the iPad as most leather case makers do.

rating 5.0. LIFETIME leather product from a GREAT supplier! I am going to write the same review for the other product I ordered from the maker of this.  I don't usually write reviews but I really wanted to let other potential buyers know that if you are unsure don't be.  First, the communication I had with them prior to the purchase was fantastic. I asked for some custom changes in the type of leather.  After the purchase the communication continued and when I asked if it could be delivered exceptionally fast as it was a gift for my brothers graduation they actually were able to surpass even the time frame I requested... 3 days! I 'd like to say Thank you to them here.  Quality is amazing!  I am a person that buys quality leather items and this is it.  If you are familiar with the Saddleback products from the early days then you can expect the same quality.  These products are Full Grain leather, and you need to be the kind of person that appreciates full grain leather to appreciate these products.  Full Grain is not leather you'd use in Ferrari seats because well its full grain! Its the hide of a cow that will have a unique character to it based on the cow's life.  If the cow got a scar, well then there will be a scare on the leather hide.  If you want super smooth, flawless, uniform then look for Top Grain leather.  If you do however, it won't have the durability as full grain like these products.  These products are made to last a LIFETIME and when you pass these down through their LIFETIME.

rating 5.0. Incredible quality.  The whole body is cute from a single hide.  The hide is thick and very smooth. A perfect buy. When I was told I was getting a replacement iPad Pro through the insurance, I purchased, which was 9.7", which Apple doesn't even make anymore.  I received a 10.5" iPad Pro. So I need a new case. I liked my old leather case, didn't love it, but for an iPad cover it was decent quality.  I ordered 3 different leather cases because I could not make up my mind.  They all arrived the same day, in 3 separate boxes. So eco friendly Amazon.  This was literally the last one I opened. As soon as I opened it, I was sold.  The win was clear.  This case is made from a single, high quality, thick and the color was so perfect. slightly antique looking, but the quality in unassailable.  My highest possible level Amazeballs rating.

current_product_reviews:
rating 5.0. DO NOT PASS THEM BY Literally, this is my first Amazon review. I know a lot of people say that, but I have never been compelled to leave a review before on Amazon. In this case, I cannot NOT leave a positive review. Please read through, as it may help in your purchase decision.

I cannot say enough good things about my experience with D&M Leather and their products. I originally was interested in a leather cover my Moleskine notebook, but was LITERALLY amazed at the high quality in workmanship with the leather, button, thread & sewing, and style, that I seriously looked into the rest of their product line. When I say “high quality” I am not exaggerating, in fact, it is an understatement! I have not seen this kind of quality and consistency in overall workmanship in the States for quite some time, regardless of the price. D&M Leather is truly a rare find. Aside from the style and quality of workmanship, the leather itself that they use is thick, high grade leather, and is not the goat or lamb often used by other companies inside or outside of the States. It is truly cowhide leather and when you see it and touch it, there’s no doubt this quality of leather hasn’t been specialized in for decades. It is no less than the quality of the late 19th and early half 20th century – I kid you not. The products are nothing less than what was used during the 1930s-1940s, it really is vintage quality, better than advertised! If you like the movie “Raiders of the Lost Ark”, you’ll recognize the kind of vintage period quality I’m speaking of. When it comes to customer service, they are “bar none” the best, most attentive customer service I have EVER experienced through Amazon, or even from brick and mortar retailers. Alice Chen and her crew have gone above and beyond to make sure I am happy with the products I’ve purchased.

One more thing, very important, I have asked for specific customizations for different product purchases and they have been very cordial and very open to any ideas I have had and have come through each and every time. In fact, they’ve even communicated via email sending pictures before finalizing the product to make sure we are both on the “same page” for the customization ideas I’ve had. In some cases, they have also made some suggestions of their own regarding my ideas, that turned out better than I had originally thought of!

I went from just looking for a good quality vintage leather cover for my Moleskine Notebook to purchasing: Sleeve for my Macbook Pro, Midori style travel journal cover (end product very classy by the way), cable management cord organizer for Macbook Pro cabels/accessories, portfolio cover/organizer for notepads, wallet case for my cell phone, pocket size field notes cover, Vintage A5 Agenda Organizer, Passport/Card case cover, Wallet, art pencil/pen pouch, iPad cover, gifts as well – ALL EXTREMELY HIGH QUALITY craftsmanship and materials used. Without a doubt, I will be making future purchases from D&M Leather. Those I gave gifts to, were very, very impressed and have expressed that they also have not seen this kind of vintage quality for many years.

Again, I cannot express enough good things about D&M Leather and I highly recommend you take a serious look at their product line, and once you make a purchase, ANY purchase, you will see why I say their extremely high level of quality in craftsmanship, style, and customer service are unsurpassed. No joke, Alice Chen and her crew are the “real deal”. Don’t pass them by. Check for yourself, I am a verified purchaser.

rating 5.0. DO NOT PASS THEM BY Literally, this is my first Amazon review. I know a lot of people say that, but I have never been compelled to leave a review before on Amazon. In this case, I cannot NOT leave a positive review. Please read through, as it may help in your purchase decision.

I cannot say enough good things about my experience with D&M Leather and their products. I originally was interested in a leather cover my Moleskine notebook, but was LITERALLY amazed at the high quality in workmanship with the leather, button, thread & sewing, and style, that I seriously looked into the rest of their product line. When I say “high quality” I am not exaggerating, in fact, it is an understatement! I have not seen this kind of quality and consistency in overall workmanship in the States for quite some time, regardless of the price. D&M Leather is truly a rare find. Aside from the style and quality of workmanship, the leather itself that they use is thick, high grade leather, and is not the goat or lamb often used by other companies inside or outside of the States. It is truly cowhide leather and when you see it and touch it, there’s no doubt this quality of leather hasn’t been specialized in for decades. It is no less than the quality of the late 19th and early half 20th century – I kid you not. The products are nothing less than what was used during the 1930s-1940s, it really is vintage quality, better than advertised! If you like the movie “Raiders of the Lost Ark”, you’ll recognize the kind of vintage period quality I’m speaking of. When it comes to customer service, they are “bar none” the best, most attentive customer service I have EVER experienced through Amazon, or even from brick and mortar retailers. Alice Chen and her crew have gone above and beyond to make sure I am happy with the products I’ve purchased.

One more thing, very important, I have asked for specific customizations for different product purchases and they have been very cordial and very open to any ideas I have had and have come through each and every time. In fact, they’ve even communicated via email sending pictures before finalizing the product to make sure we are both on the “same page” for the customization ideas I’ve had. In some cases, they have also made some suggestions of their own regarding my ideas, that turned out better than I had originally thought of!

I went from just looking for a good quality vintage leather cover for my Moleskine Notebook to purchasing: Sleeve for my Macbook Pro, Midori style travel journal cover (end product very classy by the way), cable management cord organizer for Macbook Pro cabels/accessories, portfolio cover/organizer for notepads, wallet case for my cell phone, pocket size field notes cover, Vintage A5 Agenda Organizer, Passport/Card case cover, Wallet, art pencil/pen pouch, iPad cover, gifts as well – ALL EXTREMELY HIGH QUALITY craftsmanship and materials used. Without a doubt, I will be making future purchases from D&M Leather. Those I gave gifts to, were very, very impressed and have expressed that they also have not seen this kind of vintage quality for many years.

Again, I cannot express enough good things about D&M Leather and I highly recommend you take a serious look at their product line, and once you make a purchase, ANY purchase, you will see why I say their extremely high level of quality in craftsmanship, style, and customer service are unsurpassed. No joke, Alice Chen and her crew are the “real deal”. Don’t pass them by. Check for yourself, I am a verified purchaser.

rating 4.0. Lovely bracelet exactly as seen on line received in record time in perfect condition I bought this bracelet for myself hoping to leave it on all of the time. However,  I was lucky enough to have found it three times (in the car, by the bed and beside the toilet).  This last time I wasn't so lucky--at least not yet.  Since I initially bought three bracelets thinking I'd use one for backup and one for a gift, I put on the backup  this morning.  I love the pretty, shiny little bracelet but wish the clasp was more trustworthy.  This dainty bracelet would be especially attractive on a young person or adult with nice skin.  It doesn't mask any skin imperfections such as seniors like myself frequently have.  I have a medium size wrist and it fits me well with a few chain lengths to spare.  For the price and good service/packaging, I definitely would buy this piece of jewelry again.

rating 5.0. Really does work I have a friend who is Wiccan, I however am not. I do value his opinion because we have been friends for a very long time.  He was telling me about crystals and how they work. He also told me that I needed to have my chakra's realigned. He suggested that I purchase this. Of course I laughed, but I bought it any way. The necklace arrived along with a free gift of an onyx crystal (for protection). I was skeptical, but decided to try it on. Almost immediately the ringing in my ears stopped (I've had ringing in my ears for as long as I can remember). The little aches and pains disappeared. And my anxiety disappeared.  Thinking this might be a fluke, I took it off. All of my symptoms came back. So I put it back on. This is by far one of the best things I've bought.

rating 5.0. BEAUTIFUL! AND BEST CUSTOMER SERVICE I'VE EVER ENCOUNTERED I LOVE this beautiful product and the customer service is truly the best I have ever encountered!

My pictures show the beautiful box and lovely packaging, the pretty drawstring bag the necklace comes in, the quality of every single item. Take a look if you're curious.

This necklace has gotten more comments than any necklace I've EVER worn.

(I only wish it weren't flat on the back-- would be nice if it were round on all sides)

The thing is, not only is this a beautiful and completely unique piece of jewelry that turns heads, it seems like I might be more at peace when wearing it.

If that's not enough, they send you a GORGEOUS FREE GIFT! NO KIDDING. The free gift looks to be just as valuable as the main necklace and it comes in its own cute little bag.

I had a problem with the cord on my necklace and my free gift broke when I dropped it...I contacted them and QUICKLY recieved replacements for BOTH! I had no idea they would replace the free gift, but that's the kind of company this is.

I don't know these people at all, but I am so confident in this company and their products that I recommend them wholeheartedly!

And if you are on the fence, jump off! You'll love your pretty necklace and if you don't, these people have your back. You've got nothing to lose.

input:
rating 5.0. A warm, delicious scent that doesn't crawl up your nose. I recently bought Native brand natural deoderant in Sandalwood Vanilla, and fell in love with the scent. I have been trying to find a lotion or a solid perfume to match it, and have come up empty- handed. While ive found great scented lotion, it just wasn't quite correct.
I took a chance ordering this, but was incredibly surprised when this is exactly what I had been searching for. Not "close" to what I wanted; it was perfect.
I'll be ordering again. Such a lovely, warm, and low key scent. I was complimented on it within hours of wearing four the first time.
Thank you.

rating 1.0. Scent is too faint Hoped for a lightweight earthy balm, but the scent in this product is so unnoticeable I just don’t bother using it.  It barely smells like vanilla and I can’t smell sandlewood at all.  Scent disappears right after application.  Would not purchase again.

rating 4.0. Lovely! This is a lovely fragrance.  It doesn't last as long as liquid scents, but that's fine with me.  It is soft and subtle, yet very pleasant.  I don't want to stink like so many modern perfumes seem to do.  Give me something warm and sweet and I'm happy.  If I want to, I can reapply when it fades.  Very nice.  I don't think it's at all over-priced as some reviewers have expressed.  How much you use each time is up to you, but a little bit goes a long way in my experience.  Looking forward to trying the Pink Peony next......

rating 5.0. Magical! I only received my solid perfume today and already I’m in love with it. When first opening the tin, the scent is very light but don’t let that fool you! After it’s applied, the oils warm on the skin and fragrance just blooms!  Not at all overpowering but definitely notable. Not overly sweet (some perfumes are so saturated you can “taste” it 10 feet away), the sandalwood vanilla is earthy and fresh and nostalgic. When I asked my husband to smell it on my wrist, he had to take a second whiff. That is exactly what a great perfume should do.
rating 5.0. It has a sweet powdery smell It smells very nice- subtle and fresh. The packing is very nice with a post card :)

rating 5.0. I absolutely LOVE this perfume and scent! Sandalwood and vanilla are two of my favorite scents together and this product nails it. I apply my everyday perfume each morning but throughout the day, I like to freshen my pulse points and back of my neck with this perfume.
My favorite part of it is that I apply it right before bed and then, all night long and in the morning, the soft residual scent still resides and smells sooo good.
I had something similar when I was little in an Avon pin my mom had given me. It had the most delightful tin compartment of pretty perfume on the back.
I especially love the tim this product comes in and the charming, old fashion branding. I keep one in my purse, one by my nightstand and I have given. 2 away as a gift to friends, after they also fall in love with it!
I highly recommend this product.

rating 5.0. healed ears! These turned out better than expected! I have had metal sensitivity issues since I was little myself, and so I was hesitant to let my daughter pierce her ears to begin with because I knew what she was possibly going to face. Sure enough she had the metal sensitivity that came with 5 plus months of her ears just never wanting to completely heal over. A friend mentioned plastic earings to me and a quick search on Amazon led me to these. First night in and her ears had zero drainage, zero redness, zero reaction. We simply made sure the clean the plastic earings first with her ear cleaning solution, and cleaned her ears before putting them in and they haven't left her ears since. We have had them in for 6 days now and cleaned them 2x a day with the same solution that came from the shop where she got them pierced and they look great. Highly highly recommended for sensitive ears. Will definitely be ordering more. Age of my daughter is 6 1/2 almost 7 if that is helpful to anyone :)

Thank you so much for making this wonderful most beautiful piece of jewelry for me, it's my very favorite necklace and jewelry piece in my collection.

Update:
I had a really good experience with the seller, the day I posted this review my necklace had broken out of nowhere and sort of just fell off my neck, I realized the clasp had broken so I messaged the seller to see if I could receive a replacement and they happily did so. My only complaint is that it's not quite as pretty as the first one the text isn't quite as big so it's harder to read and the peridot charm is a bit dull compared to the original but I'm still very grateful and I love my new necklace I'm still sad my old one broke but I'm so happy with the way the seller handled the issue. rating 4.0. Great for reduced scarring risks Very cute and well made. I had trouble with my delivery because my mailman puts peoples mail in other peoples mailboxes but I found it and the seller was very helpful and friendly throughout the search.
I got these because I’ve always wanted a nose piercing but have keloid scars and don’t want to risk any on my face. These fit great. I’m still working out how to position how I want the comfortably since they do hurt a bit to wear. My biggest thing is to not wear these all throughout the day. Take on and off every two hours to prevent skin breakdown from pressure on that skin or any cuts. But they are so pretty, the seller was prompt and lovely, and now I can have my piercing without the obnoxious scarring.
other_product_reviews: rating 5.0. They grew on me When I first got them I thought they were BEAUTIFUL but wouldn’t suit me. I wore them a week and thought they sat unevenly on my ears due to my hidden keloid scars changing the curve of my ears. I didn’t want to give up on these so quickly so I tried some more secure, supportive backings and it made all of the difference. These earrings light up my face and make my skin look glowing. They are so beautiful I am glad I got them. I’ve never been one to like druzy earrings because some just look plastic, but these are real and look very real. I love them and the artisan that made them has so many other pieces I might go bankrupt buys all of their jewelry designs.

rating 5.0. LOVED IT! It arrived early and just as described ... LOVED IT! It arrived early and just as described by seller. Ordered it unfinished so we could paint it to match the exact color of the accent wall in our dining room. Two coats was all that it needed and it came out PERFECT. Will be buying more as gifts!

rating 4.0. Pretty but... Pretty. Edges were a little rough could have used a light sanding before the paint. And the paint coat was very thin around the edges. At the price paid I was expecting a little better craftmanship.

rating 5.0. Awesome seller!! Awesome seller and product! I can’t say enough wonderful things. This seller went out of their way to replace the capital letters for lower case that I needed. These are fantastic quality, well made, first class for the upcoming wedding we need them for. I would HIGHLY recommend them, they ship very timely. Don’t think twice! Love them!

rating 5.0. Very pretty and nicely cut I received this and painted it white. It’s a beautiful letter and my little girl loves it.

rating 5.0. Love it! It’s awesome!! I love my R! I ordered the 16 inch infinished so that I could paint it myself to match my decor. It arrived sooner than expected. I loved how it turned out after I spray painted it. I just wish it came with hardware to hang or at least a predrilled hole in the back. I was afraid of hammering in a small nail and possibly cracking the top of the R. I was finally able to hang it up and I think it looks great!  I would definitely reorder again from this company in the future!
rating 5.0. Beautiful Just wow. Buy it now! You wont regret it. Great packaging and high quality. Bought the unfinished and painted it white myself.

rating 5.0. Beautiful. I ordered the unpainted 16 inch M. I'm very happy, it's perfect. We used these to hang it: https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B01M062YJ7/ref=ppx_yo_dt_b_asin_title_o05__o00_s00?ie=UTF8&psc=1

Seriously all we did is use a hand screwdriver. The wood is soft enough that you don't need anymore. These will go far enough in to hold without going all the way through. We hung it on a nail in the wall. Maybe you'd need more if it's going to be hung above a crib and/or you live in an area with a lot of earthquakes, just for peace of mind.

For us however, that was all we needed. I'm very happy and I'd recommend this product to anyone.

rating 5.0. LOVE! This was a great purchase. I'm so happy with the letter. I ordered in unfinished so I could stain it to match the woodwork in my home.

rating 2.0. Quality/craftsmanship was good, but pay a lot of attention to what ... Quality/craftsmanship was good, but pay a lot of attention to what your letter looks like in the font they show. I ordered a "P". The P in the sampled font seemed a little "busy" and I was worried that I might be a little difficult to read in person. Well, it was VERY difficult to read in person, and nobody who looked at it could actually tell what letter it was! So, as long as your letter looks great in the sample font, I'd be very careful. Otherwise though, like I said, I wish I could read it better because it looks very nice :(

rating 1.0. It looks good in the picture but it really has no quality ... It looks good in the picture but it really has no quality control to it. The sides of my letter were not painted so you can see them when it’s hanging on the wall. It’s also very flimsy so be careful when trying to hang. Plus it wasn’t sanded so you can see wood splinters coming off it. I ended up sanding the rough edges myself. Oh and my family doesn’t think our “D” really looks like a true “D”; go figure. There is no hanger or hole to hang it by as well. I wish I would have returned!

rating 5.0. Wonderful product Wonderful product. Fast shipping. Definitely felt a huge relief. I highly recommend this product over other similar products. Please give this company a try and you’ll see for yourself the quality difference and the huge relief from the steamers.

rating 5.0. Best part of my mornings! I LOVE every single one of these shower steamers!!!
rating 5.0. Easy to use A good product, which came quickly and was package well. Would order an alternate option next time to try all they have to offer.

rating 5.0. For minor headaches Not a miracle product but it does have some positive results. I had super high hopes for this product. I have had headaches and migraines for most of my life and I have tried so many things. These are one of the better products but it really only helped with minor headaches. I didn't expect a magic shower bomb that would suddenly cure the headaches that doctors have been trying to figure out for years, but I guess I expected a little more relief than these provided.

They are great for headaches related to sinuses. They helped wake me up and they relieved some sinus pressure when I had a head cold and a headache. They did provide slight relief, only while I was in the shower, from a non-sinus headache and even then it was not a consistent result. Zero relief from migraines, but I was not expecting a shower bomb to help there.

rating 5.0. Headaches Away with These Steamers With all the stress we're currently experiencing, these steamers have helped immensely.  Put them on a soap holder, as I use body wash, and the shower smells of peppermint within seconds.  Nice lasting smell too, even after the shower is finished.
rating 5.0. Great scent! I love these steamers. Really strong but great scent.  Perfect for just a hot steamy shower.

rating 5.0. Love these things! I love love these shower tablets! I’ve tried the sleepy time and the headache rx. The scents are lovely and fill up the bathroom and my whole room! The beaches rx is incredible at clearing your head and helping to shorten headaches. The sleepy time relaxes you and gets you ready for bed. I’m excited to try other scents.
They arrive intact since they are so carefully wrapped. And again these are so convenient for a shower since not all of us have access to a tub or the time to soak in one.
You won’t be disappointed

rating 5.0. Great shower steamers These didn’t really help ease my headaches but the smell during the shower is absolutely amazing!! The shower steamers are wrapped tightly so the smell is divine when the package is opened and the aroma does not fade. I would purchase more of these consistently but it’s a little pricey to purchase frequently. The aroma will permeate the entire house. I have used half of one during a shower and saved the remaining half for another shower but when I do that, of course, the second half’s aroma isn’t as strong. I purchased  different scents and they are all good.
rating 5.0. soothing and helpful not a miracle cure on its own, but effective. perfect for soothing and getting rest or waiting for medicine to kick in

rating 1.0. The scent is STRONG I can’t speak to the effectiveness of these steamers in the shower but what I can say is the scent is STRONG. So incredibly strong that my whole closet smells despite having put the entire bag in another ziplock bag. I’m a little nervous to try them if they are this potent through two bags..

rating 5.0. Love the smell! The day these arrived I had been dealing with a headache all day.  I used one of these in the shower that night and it helped me.  The scent on these is amazing.  They smell clean and refreshing.  I placed it in the shower floor out of direct water flow and it lasted for about 10-15 minutes.  I will definitely purchase these again.  I had a sample of the Sleepytime in my order and they also smell good.  Not as fragrant but still a calming, relaxing scent.
rating 1.0. Nothing to say I can’t tell you anything about this product because I ordered it almost 3 weeks ago and I have amazon prime.

rating 5.0. You can tell by the scents that these are made with natural herbs. And I love that. My only complain is that they dissolve somewhat quickly. But the aroma is really great. I would make them even stronger if it was up to me. Great product guys!

rating 5.0. Great Product Great quality product. I am so impressed by the wonderful, all-natural smell! Many natural products like this have a very mild scent. These are strong!! The Headache Rx steamers are exactly what I was hoping they would be. I plan to try others, though I think this one will win strongest scent because of the peppermint.

rating 5.0. Really Helps Relieve Headaches Obviously these shower tabs won't eliminate your headache/migraine, but they definitely offer some relief to them. If you place the tabs in the back of the shower, NOT directly under the stream of water, they last quite a while in one shower. The scent is strong, not overpowering, but enough to inhale and exhale and feel relief/ relaxed. I usually have the water running hot so it gets steamy before I get in, then turn it down a bit once I am in, and the tab scent is strong and feels spa-like. Even if you don't suffer from headaches, this scent is still relaxing and smells nice.

rating 4.0. VERY Strong The scent of this can be a bit overpowering out of the pouch, and you need to put the pouch in a separate plastic bag or else it will permeate. However, product works as expected and dissolves in about ~5 minutes in the shower.
rating 4.0. Strong scent These shower steamers have an extremely strong scent, which in my opinion is a good thing.  While it didn't take my headache away, it was a pleasant experience.

rating 5.0. Beautiful scent and value for $ Originally I was going to buy the lavender, but I get migraines so I bought the pink headache shower bombs. When I opened the package they also sent 2 free lavendar ones to try- cool bonus!  They smell beautiful and last for longer than I take a shower for. I will be a continual buyer- always have these on hand.

rating 5.0. Smells great, best shower bombs! These shower bombs are great! The scent is good and I have tried almost all of them. They have always included a sample of another scent in all of my orders.  The headache one does not take away my stubborn migraines but it does smell great and that makes you relax. I will keep buying this brand. They use packaging that can be recycled, bombs have bubble wrap around them to keep from breaking.
rating 2.0. Holy strong These shower steamers work as they should but are so very strong it made my headache worse. I will probably try to break them and see if I can use just a tiny amount…

rating 5.0. I really like these! I’m not sure if it helps my headaches but it is soothing for sure. I would buy more. I really like that fact that it’s a small business and they gave me a free sample of the lavender. It’s the little things!
rating 5.0. It works! Bought on a whim and it worked so well, I ordered a 2nd bag already. My husband and I both use it.

rating 5.0. Very soothing These are great!  They really help to ease congestion and provide a relaxing scent in the shower.

rating 5.0. Worth the money I suffer from migraines and was worried about spending this much on steamers bc of others in the past but these are worth it. The smell is amazing!! They are huge and I break them in half and it last longer then my 30 min shower. 😅

rating 5.0. Worth the buy! As for the product name I’d say it’s slightly misleading, though I personally couldn’t come up with a better one js. Doesn’t technically “steam”, but this product doesn’t disappoint in any other way. I’d say they work better whole rather than breaking them in half (length of shower doesn’t matter). These are definitely an essential for people who primarily take showers. It’s definitely therapeutic. Also, I got a cool bonus sample with my order and I NEED to know if, or when, these are going to be available for purchase! It was called Tropical Refresher or something like that and it provided me with the best shower I’ve ever taken. My bathroom and I smelled like citrusy tropical candy and it was wonderful.

rating 5.0. Lifelong headaches! This product smells great, I was a bit skeptical at first, as I have tried numerous aromatherapy, medicines, and acupuncture to relieve migraines. I have had them at least twice a month, my entire life, and they have become debilitating. I decided to try this, just to see if it worked, and, although I was in the midst of a bad migraine, it did help relieve most of the suffering. I would definitely recommend this to anybody who has any type of headache. It smells good, makes your whole body relaxed, and after your bath or shower, you will notice a difference.

rating 5.0. Best shower steamers This company makes great steamers. Out of all the ones I've tried, this company's steamers actually last the duration of your shower and scent is really great and not too overpowering
rating 4.0. I love it ! This is an awesome product but kinda expensive for 12 tabs! Definitely recommend breaking in 1/2!

rating 5.0. Smell fantastic, very relaxing As with many other people I suffer from severe migraines and I will try just about anything to get some relief. I have to admit I was skeptical of this product but the reviews of other buyers convinced me to try it. The package arrived quickly and the company even throws in a trial "relaxation" scent. You can smell these as soon as you open the bag and they are heavenly. I used the first one when my migraine level was at about a 4/10 and although it didn't necessarily take it away it did add a spa like quality to my shower and overall helped me to relax. I placed the steamer right out of reach of the shower spray towards the wall. I noticed that this placement kept the scent in one area helping it last longer and magnified its intensity. It also lasted through my entire shower which included an extra conditioner treatment and shaving my legs so that was a nice surprise.
rating 5.0. Needs more in the bag! I love love love the smell. Just wish there were more in the bag. I make 1 last for two showers.

rating 5.0. Try these if you suffer from migraines I have terrible migraines, and pressure headaches.  I like shower steamers, and I use oils to help relieve my headaches so when I saw these, I had to try them.  Like any other shower steamers you just place it on the floor and let the steam fill the air with the scent.  These have peppermint, basil, and rosemary.  They are a tad more than other shower steamers but if you are like me, I’ll try anything to give me some relief.  I gave a bag to my DIL who also has migraines, and she said they help her too.  Win for the MIL!  Lol.  I’m recommending these to anyone with headaches.

rating 5.0. Break in half! Love these shower bombs! The scent is very nice and it came with a sample for a different one, too. I will say that unless you’re taking a 30 minute shower, break these in half! I just barely finish a half a bar in my “everything” showers where I shampoo, conditioner, exfoliate AND shave. Will def buy again!
rating 1.0. Didnt like the smell Nice product i just picked a bad smell. Would like to try a different one next time.

rating 4.0. I think the item may work, but why Red 40? So this item was bought out of desperation. I have been having chronic migraines almost weekly for over two years. When I tried them I was surprised I did feel a difference in the minutes after my shower. However, it isn’t on the list of ingredients online, and it says chemical free, however on the package it says it contains red 40. I’m by no means a natural food and product only person, but Red 40 has been linked to a lot of neurological conditions, including migraines. Why would this be put in a inhaled scent for migraines? I fear long term this may not be the solution for me, as well as think it’s odd this fact is hidden until the product arrives, especially from a handmade company.
