I tried to return however since I chose to have mine personalized I am now out $49.00 and have a useless product that I can't do anything with. I understand why I can't return it, but it doesn't take the sting out of the fact that I spent $49.00 and now have nothing to show for it.

rating 5.0. I love it. The only two things I wish it ... Finally received this case! I love it. The only two things I wish it had was a hole for the camera and a stronger magnet. Other than that, great quality!

rating 5.0. Slightly expensive but worth every penny This is the highest quality case I have owned.  The leather wallet is thick and sturdy leather.  The plastic case has leather inset on the rear.  It looks stunning to be honest.  The magnetic feature keeps the case adhered to the wallet and also doubles as a magnetic case for mounting in the car or elsewhere.  The only issue is that wireless charging does not work through this case - likely due to the metal in the case for magnetism.  I can't fault the manufacturer for physics limitations.  If you are looking for a non-bland option for a case and you like the wallet idea - this is the case for you.  Very attractive and durable.

input: rating 5.0. Beautiful and homemade! These are lovely. Clearly made and shipped lovingly. These are what I would make myself if I had the time of talent! Glad I can pay someone else to make these beautiful in paper towels!
rating 5.0. Lovely! Utilitarian! We love these! I've been trying to get my husband off paper towels and these are the only substitute he's liked. They wash and dry well so far (1 time).

rating 5.0. Useful size and thickness These are on the thinner side, but that’s what I wanted. We use these for dinner napkins and light kitchen tasks. They are small enough for the kids and if we use them wet they dry very fast. The natural color hides light stains. Might buy more.

rating 5.0. Quality reusable product at a price you’ll be good with. To eliminate household waste, I was looking for sturdy fabric napkins and these are just right. Everyone in our family uses (and reuses) these pretty cream-colored napkins with their colored edging. I throw them in the wash, and they are ready for another meal. We also tried bamboo waffle patterned napkins which are good but bulky and white so I often have to bleach them. These Spring Mix napkins are our favorite, much more pleasant to use than paper napkins and softer and more absorbent than traditional linen napkins, which are too slick and large for everyday use. Solid product, good business.

rating 5.0. great replacement to paper paper towels I used to be the queen of paper paper towels.  So addicted to their use.  But when we hit the lockdown in March 2020 and the subsequent paper goods shortages of April 2020, I made the change in May 2020 to use cloth in various forms to replace  or cutback my disposable paper use.  Back then I bought one set of these Spring Mix Natural Undyed Unpaper Towels.  I love them!  And of all the various cloth type things I switched to - these are the ones that best serve as a direct replacement to the single use disposable paper towels.  So today I'm back on Amazon to order a bunch more, so that I have even more to last between laundry days.  And since I've also still not have stopped 100% (maybe 80% so far) on using paper towels, I think by having even more of these on hand and handy right on the counter I'll reach for these even more than I already do when I need a quick paper towel.  I also am still in search of some kind of dispenser like container that would make grabbing one easier.  So far I find just folding in 1/2 and stacking has worked okay, but I'm always looking to optimize things.
rating 5.0. Awesome!!! I love these. I re-ordered after my first order because I like them so much. I'm using them to replace paper towels. They're thin and just the right size. I really love them!!
rating 5.0. Excellent usage of these small squares used to replace paper towels & napkins. Easy to hand wash & dry quickly.
rating 5.0. Great clothes to use in place of paper towels! Really like these cloth towels to help me reduce using paper towels.  Haven't washed them yet, but they work great.

rating 5.0. Absolutely wonderful This product is exactly what I needed to stop going through so many paper towels. They save me money and they are made right here in the USA.

rating 5.0. Good quality These cloths are soft.  The serge stitching is flat, not bunched up as often seen.  I needed these cloths to be flat so the flat surging was important.  They wash up easily.  I had a need to hand wash a couple and they dried soft, not stiff like a normal air-dried towel.  Also, the fact that they are not dyed made it easy to use to clean up around a wound and it did not leave lint nor irritate sensitive skin, and, it also cleaned up without leaving a stain.  I would buy them again.

rating 5.0. Obsessed with these These are a home run. The one star reviews have me perplexed because the scent of the eucalyptus and peppermint is so strong it literally has a cooling effect, I can feel it in my eyes it’s so strong (in a good way lol)! I was so sick- getting super congested and having headaches and these did the trick. The one star reviews say things like “they didn’t work” - first of all, these aren’t medicine. They cannot magically decongest you. The essential oils in combination with the hot water will help temporarily open airways, but it’s not mucinex lol and it’s not supposed to be. These are strong, long lasting (even after they dissolve the scent lingers for a WHILE), and a great value. Support small and get these Over Vic’s.
I’m so in love and impressed!!!

rating 3.0. Confused My husband is very conjested in the morning, so I heard about these tablets to help with this.  First, they are not cheap; however, after seeing all the five star reviews, felt these would definately do the trick.  The company included two free tablets (that was nice).  They smelled good and my husband and I were excited to use them.  Followed the instructions to the tee.  It did fill the house with a great smell; however, my husband said they did absolutely nothing for his conjestion.  I titled this review "confused" because I don't understand how everyone could give this product five stars and rave about how they relieved their conjestion.  I know my shower doesn't work any differently than their shower does (in fact, our shower doors go to the ceiling creating ample steam).  After four days, we realize these were not worth the money, as they did nothing for the conjestion my husband experiences.  If you only want to have a smell in your shower and home (which only lasts a couple of hours), then go for it.  However, if you are purchasing them to relieve your conjestion, don't bother.
rating 5.0. You don’t need a lot I really like this one, you can cut in quarters and honestly that’s just what I need and the scent lasts longer in the bathroom! Will definitely buy again!

rating 5.0. BEST Shower Fizz Look, I've tried shower fizzies you can buy from the local store including the brand that starts with V and ends with ick's. This thing BLOWS all those away, the scent filled the entire bathroom and really helped to clear up my sinuses. I would give this a 5/5! --they also sent my a free gift that was 2 headache shower fizzies which I really appreciated. Great company and quality.

rating 5.0. Lifesaver! I bought these last week since me and my daughter are both battling colds. I had used shower steamers before and was unimpressed, but figured I would give these a try. They worked like a charm for both of us. We both noticed improvement in our congestion and were able to sleep so much better after using these. I highly recommend them, and will definitely be buying again!

rating 5.0. Fabulous in the shower and as a room freshener The eucalyptus product is so potent, I only use a 1/4 of a tablet while I shower, just to have an “aaah” moment. Hubby & I both have short showers, and the 1/4 tablet works long enough for both of us.

Also, I accidentally discovered that storing this bag in a stuffy room freshens it up. We were rearranging bedrooms and one of our sons (now grown) had left behind a super stuffy room (I’m being polite, it totally stunk) and I happened to have the unopened bag in a basket of things that I left in the room. I came back later and the boy-stink was gone, gone, gone. I thought we’d have to repaint and deodorize that room to make it livable but the tablets work great.

We’ve already bought the lemon version, which is not as potent, but still very good. Planning on buying more :)

rating 5.0. Oh so good. These little tablets are AMAZING! Got them in the mail today, a day earlier than the estimated delivery window, and couldn’t wait to try them. They cane perfect timing, my daughter and I both have asthma and allergy season with the dry desert weather are always difficult. I popped one of these in the shower after it got nice and steamy and I am breathing better than I have in over a week. My 3 year old loved it too! I also got the headache version and will definitely be trying one of those with my next migraine. Couldn’t be happier with this purchase, I will definitely be ordering more!

The scent is pretty strong but nowhere near nauseating like some products. The tablet dissolved after about 10 min but my entire bedroom still smells like peppermint and eucalyptus. It had the effects of Vick’s chest rub but a much better scent. I’ll take this over medicine any day!

Thank you so much for making such a wonderful product!

rating 5.0. Just what I was hoping for! I bought two of the extra small in shiny silver for my cats. They have two names, the hearts, and my phone number on them. It is not crowded at all and easy to read.
The tag is solid and has a little weight to it, not cheap feeling at all.
They arrived 5 days earlier than what was estimated. I’m very pleased.

rating 5.0. Great product and awesome presentation This tag is the perfect size for my small kitty (9lbs). The ones at the pet stores are always too big. As you can see in the photo, this is about the size of a dime. Shiny and sturdy. Doesn't feel or look cheap.

The packaging is what really brought me here to leave a review. It was lovely! A tiny little package filled with tiny little packages. All made with nice materials. The seller clearly put a lot of thought into the "unboxing" experience. It was like receiving a little gift!

Priced lower than competitors (I paid just under $8) and a much nicer product!

Highly recommend and will definitely be back once Mimi invariably loses this one. :)

rating 1.0. Barely legible and ships from China I had no idea I was ordering something directly from China. Took weeks to receive the order and the engraving is barely legible. rating 1.0. Too small & just not good I don’t know how to post this review without giving out my address, so it’s crossed out as good as I can with still showing that it messed up.

I sent them a return request just to let them know what happened & they closed it out stating that they printed what was given to them. My bad for ordering the really small one, but you can barely read what is printed.

rating 3.0. Good enough Bought these to decorate wedding fan favors.

What I liked:
1. Good color options (I chose burgundy to match the wedding colors)
2. Pre-cut to the perfect length
3. I loved the little icon option in front of the text.
4. Personalized item that actually arrived very fast (I paid extra for faster but still would have come faster than other personalized items I've purchased in the past)

What I did NOT like:
1. This is listed as satin finish/satin ribbon. It is a satin finish but not fabric ribbon, it's more like gift wrapping ribbon and the satin finish is only on one side. I would have preferred fabric ribbon. These crinkle if you make any mistakes (see pic).
2. Approximately 20 of the ribbons cut off the Y at the end of the bride's name (see pic) and since I didn't plan for THAT MANY unusable ribbons, I ended up short for my wedding favors.
3. I purchased knowing assembly was required but MAN assembly was a pain, hot glue creates a dark spot so I had to get creative and cover the center with a decorative paper rose (more assembly, more spend)

rating 5.0. Very unique ring I adore this ring, it means a lot to me.  I didn't use it as a mother's ring, I picked the stones to represent my parents and my brother.  I think this makes a great memorial ring as well, both my dad and brother have passed and every time I look down at this ring it's a reminder they are always with me.  I get compliments on this ring often and I've been told it is very unique.  The only recommendation I would make is if you have stones with similar colors, separate them with the other color.  For example, February (purple) and June (light purple) resemble a lot when side by side, so I put August (light green)  in the middle to separate them and I think it worked very well, I'm extremely satisfied.  See pics I posted with the separation.

rating 5.0. High-Quality, Great Value For The Price, Customized Monogram, Delivered in 2-Days, What More Can I Say? Purchased this on a Wednesday and it arrived by Friday, and it exceeded all expectations, especially for a custom monogrammed product! Here are a few high-notes:

Leather: This is clearly a high-quality leather, it has a nice hand feel and is plush. You can tell it is real because it is smooth on the top and textured underneath.The color is nice as well, I ordered tan. I can't help but think that this leather keychain will wear in really well over the years, I can't imagine it wearing out or breaking anytime in the foreseeable future.

Monogram: I got my wife's initials straight across AMH and I selected Gold. This is as expected and there isn't much to report because it was executed as expected. I would say that given the handmade nature of these items made by Northwind Supply, making these monogrammed items individually to meet each customer's request shows a great attention to detail. I would order with confidence that Northwind would get your order right the first time.

Hardware: I went with the Antique Brass, which turned out nice to give this a little character. I believe the pin holding the leather together is a screw-type piece that pokes through the leather in a set hole and then is turned shut. It does not appear to be something that can be easily unscrewed, and I don't plan on messing with it as it seems very secure.

My brother is getting married in the spring, and I'm definitely going to recommend Northwind Supply to make some items for his groomsmen gifts, well done guys!

rating 5.0. Love My Keychain Just ordered this product recently and it arrived today.  Very quick for a monogrammed product.  Mine is the chestnut color.  It’s a very nice, rich color.  A little more red than I hoped for, but very nice.  The strap is a hair longer than a credit card, the leather is sturdy, and the fastener is very solid - this won’t be falling apart.  In the package was a card with the sellers website in it.  I hadn’t realized that this is a small, American business, and every product is handmade.  I was glad to be supporting them.  I wish I had seen their actual website before ordering here.  They have some other products there that I like even better, such as a key strap with a clip on the end.  Also, I found it easier to figure out the colors on the website.  My only frustration with ordering on Amazon is I felt that it was hard to figure out which colors were which.  On the seller website this is easier.  Also, to the seller if you’re reading this, I really would prefer an option to have a clip on one end and a matching ring on the other.  I’d be happy to pay for the additional piece as an add on option.  With all the products offered it’s either/or, and the materials are too nice to spoil the look by putting something on the other end that doesn’t match the metals in the product.  All in all, a great product!  I highly recommend it.  In fact, I already sent the info to two friends who are getting married soon and are looking for gifts for their wedding parties.

rating 4.0. Well made product I like the personalized name a lot. It's thick and not flimsy. Well made for sure.

rating 4.0. SUPER CUTE BUT IS ACTUALLY A TRADITIONAL HEADBAND I bought this band, because the way it's worn in the image is so regal. I thought "finally a headband that is more aligned with and designed for how I like to wear them. Unfortunately, although my head is average size, this item is too tight to be worn in the relaxed way that's shown in the photo.

HOWEVER, you can still achieve that same look by placing the band on loosely and securing with hair pins, which is probably what was done here. I was hoping to not have to do that. I liken this experience to that of the "off the shoulder" blouse that is actually just wide neck blouses that you have to keep pulling off your shoulders so that it can be an off the shoulder blouse for at least a moment.

For the above, I subtracted 1 star, but kept 4 stars for the following reasons:

Other than that, the band is colorful, beautiful, well-made, and even with what I said above, you could still situate it like the lady has it in the photo, or you can wear it as a regular band and can probably get away with wearing it as a necklace. It also can be matched with various colors and dressed up or down.

rating 5.0. Lovely and affordable piece for those who can appreciate tone n textures  of a nature/camping print I bought this for my dad for Father's Day. I believe it's watercolor, but it's very rich in pigment. Not very detailed but that works with style. The choice of colors are particularly special as they are the tones of a deep, rich pine forest, a smoldering charcoal as well as the glow of the campfire. It's a great piece for one who enjoys the tone and texture of watercolor. The nature, camping theme is just perfect. I plan on buying the complete set for him.

rating 5.0. BEST WEDDING GUEST BOOK EVER!! This was the BEST idea for an alternative wedding guest book!! I ordered oak and mahogany (for backdrop) at first, but when I received it, realized the mahogany was a little more red than I envisioned. I asked the seller if I could mail it back and get the ebony backdrop instead.

The seller told me I didn't need to send the entire product back, and would INSTEAD mail me the ebony backdrop (Expedited 2 DAY shipping) so that it could arrive in TIME for my wedding!! I received the ebony backdrop only 1.5 weeks later, which was WELL before my wedding date! It was easy to undo the screws, and switch out the old back drop with the new one.

I am so HAPPY with this purchase and just want to tell the SELLER THANK YOU SO MUCH for accommodating my requests and even paying EXTRA for the 2 day shipping!!

The product itself is HAND-MADE - you can smell the fresh wood, and feel the craftsman ship of the entire product. The etching of our names, wedding date, and fine/floral details on the rectangular box is amazing and super clear to read! It comes with a stand, so you can display it for your wedding guests at the wedding, and it has a sturdy wall mount on the back for when you put it up on your wall to enjoy for years to come. It is packaged so well (saran wrap, bubble wrap), you don't have to worry about it getting damaged in transit.

This is probably my most FAVORITE purchase I've made for my wedding, and so excited to enjoy it for years to come! If I could give the seller AND product a 100 stars I would! Thank you SOOO much for being a part of my big day in such a sentimental and significant way!!! I am so grateful!!

rating 4.0. Something different I bought this as an alternative to a guest book. Everyone loved it and asked me all about it. The only thing I was disappointed in was that the wood itself is a cheap poly wood just spray painted with different colors to give off the perceived look of the different wood like walnut, mahogany, cedar and other woods. Other than that the item is great.....not a deal breaker. Just thought I was buying something that was actually mahogany wood not cheap poly. If you are ok with this, you will love it. Thank you for making and offering something different for weddings.

rating 4.0. Beautiful with one flaw This is a great product, I took off one star because of the box you can add to hold the hearts. First it comes unassembled, which is fine if assembling it was a breeze, it’s not. It’s a royal pain in the ass. The video makes it simple enough it’s not that is hard to assemble the problem are the slots and and holes that do not fit properly. I had to use a knife to scrape off some wood to make it fit into the holes. And stick a scissors in the holes to stretch them out. Took me over 45 minutes just to assemble it. Please fix this flaw it’s rather irritating to have to scrape off wood off a brand new product just to be able to make it fit in the slots it supposed to be made to fit in. The heart itself is beautiful and well made. Fix the box!

Their response was, it’s because they used a different font style on the box than they used on the center of the heart. I replied back & asked them to redo the box top, they never responded. It’s a beautiful guest book alternative but I would not recommend getting it from this seller. Their customer service leaves a lot to be desired. I waited another week before writing this review hoping they would respond, but still nothing.

rating 5.0. Amazing little earrings! These earrings are exactly what I was looking for!! A tiny, thin hoop that I could leave in my ears. At first I was worried that I wouldn't be able to get them in my ears without bending them out of shape. But I opened them carefully and was able to get them on and get them closed without damaging the shape. I read some reviews where people had to use them in their 2nd or 3rd piercings but they fit into the first piercings on my ears. I just got them so I can't talk about longevity yet.

rating 5.0. Perfect for helix piercings! I don't normally leave reviews but these hoops really impressed me. I ordered them for my double helix piercings after getting tired of studs- earring backings irritate my piercings for some reason (posts too short perhaps?), so I was immediately attracted to these hoops without backings. They're thin enough to fit in without force, and if your ear is a little thicker, they bend easily so that you can finagle them to fit. While I totally understand how the bendability of these earrings may be a con to some people, I actually found it really useful in inserting them. They're too small to fit adult lobes, but for an adult helix piercing, the daintiness and small size is absolutely perfect. They look darling!

rating 5.0. Simply Elegant I bought these earrings because I needed something simple that would go with other jewelry I own. Very easy design and I like not having to worry about a backing.

rating 5.0. Super cute and good quality. I decided to re-pierce an old earring hole that had grown in. I thought I would probably be able to shove this guy through since I had accidentally done it once a few months ago. Well, there is a little bulb on the end so it didn't work. I had to get a needle and slowly push it through from the back until it slowly made it's way through. Then I had to shove a different earring through the widen the hole. All of the was breezy until I had to try shoving that little bulb through next. It smarted for sure, but I got in and nothing got infected so this is a good quality earring.

rating 1.0. cute...but VERY uncomfortable. i bought these to wear in my 2 cartilage piercings i’ve had for well over 5+ years. keep in mind i’ve never had any issues with any type of metal in my ears or any allergies to any metals. putting this through my piercing hole was uncomfortable and awkward as there the knot at the end has to go through which irritated my ear to begin with. about a day or so later my ear began to feel hot and looked a bit swollen, i thought it was because i has stretched the hole too much from said knot. it became too painful to even sleep and i had a constant throb in my ear. this morning i took it out and it was hard to take the earring out because of how swollen the area has actually become. when i took the piercing out, it looked like the “metal” had already tarnished into this weird black//colored metallic that would’ve been directly in my piercing hole. i have 18 piercings in my ear all together, so i know fake sterling silver when i see it. this product is not safe and really caused some trauma to my ear to which i have to now soak and clean to bring down swelling and pain. Not sure if this was just a fluke in production but i will not be buying anything like this again. (as i sit from my bed with my entire right side of my ear throbbing and purple.)

rating 5.0. Hold up very well! Very dainty and cute! Go well with other earrings and can still be professional. I wanted hoops I could keep in a bunch of cartilage piercings 24/7 to keep my holes open and these have held up well. I’m normally very sensitive to sleeping in earrings but these don’t really bother me. They haven’t gotten messed up from showers or hair products. Only one earring got stained a dark color on half of it but I think that’s because that hole got slightly infected and must have bled and stained it. But the other earrings have held up great and besides one hole bleeding for a bit these earrings haven’t caused any irritation to my sensitive ears. It’s hard to fully close the backs but even if you can’t get it right away they don’t fall out or really get stuck on your hair or clothes. I’ve worn these for about 3 months and I’d recommend!

rating 5.0. I love these Shower Steamers! These shower steamers have amazing fragrance. My favorites are the Morning Energy - which are so helpful mornings I wake with a migraine - and the Sleepy Time - relax me for a great night sleep.

The bombs are solid (some from other vendors are powder upon opening) and last for my entire shower. I also like that two sample bombs come with each order.

I would like purchase in lots bigger than 10. GREAT product!

rating 5.0. I'll buy this again and trying other scents as well I really enjoy these. I'm pregnant and find it hard to relax and fall asleep now that I'm in my third trimester and these are great at night when I shower in the dark with just a nightlight. The scent is strong and will give a great waft every time it comes into contact with the hot water. Im usually in the shower for about half an hour and I put this in the very back and it usually lasts throughout the entire time. If I put it near the front it dissolves in about 5-7 minutes and can be a little overpowering. It also came with a sample of the their stress relief scent which is just lavender and lemon and honestly smells like fruit loops.

rating 5.0. Amazing product!! These shower bombs last almost 3 separate showers and smell amazing!! The presentation of the item in the box was very top notch. They also added two complimentary stress bombs to try out. I can’t wait to try them. Will def buy from this company again!
rating 5.0. Great quality Very good quality. The fragrance is pretty intense but make the shower pretty relaxing.
rating 5.0. Perfect before bedtime Favorite of mine. I actually enjoy dropping this into an evening bath!

rating 5.0. Amazing I love every purchase I have made. It came with a cold kicker sample and a stress free sample and I swear by them. They smell amazing and in great time. I will be ordering more soon.

rating 5.0. My second time buying these... I just love them so much! Great product, love the free samples!  If I could make recommendations I would just suggest to offer different quaintly options. For example, 10p, 24pc, 36pc, etc.  Also, I would recommend making a monthly subscription option because I'll goes through these fast and I'd rather just subscribe to a subscription that will cover me with a months worth of supply.  I'll be ordering more in a few days!

rating 5.0. AMAZING! This product is amazing! My fiance has a hard time falling asleep at night. After using for a few nights, he says he hasn't slept better. Package came with 2 free of the stress steamers and those are amazing as well.

rating 1.0. No scent, not worth the money. We have three bathrooms. Two stand up showers and one tub. I’ve tried these in each of the bathrooms which are all different sizes. I’m unsatisfied, to say the least. They don’t provide much scent, you literally have to dip it in the shower stream to see it fizzle for a few seconds. Their scent is so faint, it’s has to be less than 6 inches from your nose to smell. They do bubble up when water is sprinkled on top- but, they do not dissolve with just steam. I’ve even tried steaming the showers with the door closedfor 20 minutes with the steamer by the shower head before getting in ... still no scent, but it did fizzle and melt away.

I wouldn’t waste money on these.
rating 5.0. Amazing! Love these! They smell great and come with clear instructions. I have a larger shower so I put the cube on the shelf which worked perfectly. Will buy from y’all again!

rating 5.0. Love These! Smell great and work well! These shower steamers fill that gap for me, and I love that The Herbal Zen makes them by hand and includes a sample of another scent in their packages- great product and great advertising!
rating 5.0. These are just the little something extra you need I bought them for myself. My husband used them all.

I would purchase more of these consistently but it’s a little pricey to purchase frequently. The aroma will permeate the entire house. I have used half of one during a shower and saved the remaining half for another shower but when I do that, of course, the second half’s aroma isn’t as strong. I purchased  different scents and they are all good.

rating 5.0. BEAUTIFUL! AND BEST CUSTOMER SERVICE I'VE EVER ENCOUNTERED I LOVE this beautiful product and the customer service is truly the best I have ever encountered!

My pictures show the beautiful box and lovely packaging, the pretty drawstring bag the necklace comes in, the quality of every single item. Take a look if you're curious.

This necklace has gotten more comments than any necklace I've EVER worn.

(I only wish it weren't flat on the back-- would be nice if it were round on all sides)

The thing is, not only is this a beautiful and completely unique piece of jewelry that turns heads, it seems like I might be more at peace when wearing it.

If that's not enough, they send you a GORGEOUS FREE GIFT! NO KIDDING. The free gift looks to be just as valuable as the main necklace and it comes in its own cute little bag.

I had a problem with the cord on my necklace and my free gift broke when I dropped it...I contacted them and QUICKLY recieved replacements for BOTH! I had no idea they would replace the free gift, but that's the kind of company this is.

I don't know these people at all, but I am so confident in this company and their products that I recommend them wholeheartedly!

And if you are on the fence, jump off! You'll love your pretty necklace and if you don't, these people have your back. You've got nothing to lose.

input:
rating 5.0. Pretty, discreet, and saves my fingernails. So, it's pretty rare that I write a review, but I'm pretty stoked about this. I tend to use fidget toys when I'm anxious/bored/restless to keep my hands busy. But, being a person with ADHD, I'm constantly misplacing my fidgets. And then my poor fingernails pay the price.
I'm super pleased with this necklace! It looks like jewelry and is super discreet, but it is perfect to keep my fingers busy. And it is pretty tough to lose something that's hanging around my neck!

rating 5.0. Beautiful!! This is a gorgeous piece of custom jewelry that I will enjoy wearing and showing off. As an Autistic person, I like to have something to fidget with, and being able to wear something like this is fantastic.

Update: I loved my first one so much that I ordered another one, so I can switch them to match my outfit. 😀

rating 5.0. Well made and very cool! I love this! Its well made, very cool and the perfect fidget gadget.
It keeps me from messing up my nails and is really discreet.
I'll be buying a second one for sure! Thank you!

rating 5.0. Unique necklace In truth, I don’t really fidget with the necklace much.  Although, I would certainly recommend this as a fidget (especially if you tend to lose things).  I really like the unique design and the numerous possible color combinations. It is very lightweight and well-made, and I love the colors within mine.  I definitely recommend this product.  (I got the leather.)

rating 5.0. Love this! Absolutely love my necklace!  The colors are super vibrant, it's incredibly fun to play with, and I get loads of compliments on it whenever I have it on.  I also appreciated the personal note.  Very tempted to order more.

rating 5.0. A great necklace for fidgeting!! This item arrived yesterday and I already love it! They make a great noise when rubbing together and are great for fidgeting! Would definitely recommend it!
rating 5.0. I love it Lighter than I thought it would be, but I love using it as a keychain!

rating 5.0. Great piece of jewelry/multifunctional Just received my necklace and I absolutely love it. I’m a nursing mom who’s daughter likes to fidget with something while doing so. I’m not a fan of the teething necklaces out there and she didn’t need anything to teeth on just something to twiddle with so I found this option. I love the style of this and will still wear it even after I’m done nursing. She’s already taken a liking to it. Thanks so much!!!

rating 5.0. Very well made The custom necklace that we ordered came faster than we expected. The colors are bright and the design is really clever for fidgety people. We bought this for our son, but it's nice enough that I could wear it too.

rating 5.0. Pretty and functional Just got mine today and I love it! Very lightweight and quiet (doesn't jingle when you walk). It's great for keeping my fingers busy while I'm thinking at work instead of snacking.
I'm bad at knowing what colors go together so I just told him that I wanted a blue/silver mix and that I'd leave the rest up to him and I think it came out great.

rating 5.0. Quiet fidget that won't distract others. My son was recently diagnosed with high anxiety and rigidity. He gets frustrated when things are a little too chaotic or other kids are being disruptive. I was looking for a quiet fidget that wouldn't distract the rest of the class. This fit the bill perfectly. When he gets anxious he spins the rings around his finger and remembers to breath. It is surprisingly light, but very well made. I love that it is on a good quality necklace (we opted for the metal chain) so he can't lose it. I also bought my daughter one since she focuses better when she is able to move her hands and have something to play with. Both of the kids love them, definitely a win.
rating 5.0. Perfect for my teen! This has been such a great fidget necklace for my 13yo.  Thank you for making it fashionable and useful!

rating 5.0. Discrete and effective for ADHD kids My 3rd grader with ADHD is very sensitive to anyone thinking she's strange or different in any way. This necklace just looks like pretty jewelry, but it is a quiet and incredibly effective fidget. My daughter's teacher has reached out to let me know that it has really increased her ability to focus in class, and it's not at all distracting. It's also well made and durable, a fantastic value, and actually very attractive. I can't say enough positive about this. I just ordered a second one in case the first gets lost!

rating 5.0. Perfect, durable fidget I have been searching for a fidget to carry with me everywhere! Pocket fidgets have a tendency to get lost and others break easily. This necklace is just what I needed! It still looks cute with most outfits and shows me to fidget away. I've been wearing it for over a month now and it looks just as nice as the day it arrived in the mail.

rating 5.0. Well made, discrete fidget jewelry I bought a blue and silver one for my 12 year old daughter with anxiety and a green and black one for my 10 year old son with ADHD and they both love them. I opted for the chains to lest longer and they get compliments on them all the time on being such cool jewelry. A nice discrete fidget that won’t get lost.

rating 2.0. Beautiful, not sturdy This is a beautiful simple design. Unfortunately it’s not sturdy at all. The ring holding the larger rings to the necklace broke off in the first week and the rings were lost.

rating 5.0. Great gift for your fidgety loved ones I've ordered two of these necklaces now. One for my offsprings partner and one for my offspring. They are very clever, useful and well made. You can dress them down or up and people dont question if it's a stim necklace and that makes my offspring more comfortable wearing it in public.

rating 5.0. Helps with fidgeting!!! I have a terrible need to fidget constantly. This has manifested into terrible habits, my worst being picking at my cuticles until they bleed but my most recent being scratching my neck raw. This necklace has helped so much!! Now when I feel the need to start picking or scratching, I just play with my necklace. It makes a slight noise but everyone that has been around me said they didn't even notice it so that's definitely not a deal breaker. I also love that it doesn't necessarily look like something I'm using to ease my anxiety. I wear it to work (business casual) and get so many compliments, it just looks like a cute necklace. I would recommend this product for sure, and I'll be ordering more in the future in different colors!

rating 5.0. Beautiful and useful Got two of these, in my kids favorite colors and they really love them. We loved how nicely they were packaged- and the bag will be useful to store it in, if they have to take it off at school for gym.

I highly recommend these as gifts, and will definitely be buying from this artist again in the future. The quality craftsmanship means you are giving a gift that will last a lifetime.

I was very pleased with the quality- and my kids absolutely love them.
other_product_reviews:
rating 5.0. Best creation in the World! This review-is written by my 13 year old, who got this as a gift. It is the most satisfying creation that has ever been made. I've been having a very stressful time, and these little thingies are helping me get through that. They are beautiful and a way to help take my mind away from the things that are stressing me out.

I really love the half mobii too- I love the sound it makes, and how it feels in my hand. It really is so satisfying.

rating 5.0. Beautiful and functional I highly recommend- this is both beautiful and well made. I purchased these a few years ago- but recently when my teen was having serious medical issues, he found it really helps him cope with stress and anxiety.  My mobii became his, and he uses it to de-stress and cope. Recently I ordered him another mini- in his favorite colors. They are very durable and the small size means he can have it in his pocket and take to school easily.  Emotional and metal health are important, and kids going though medical issues can be under a lot of stress. This really helps him de-stress.

input: rating 5.0. Scent is amazing! Product arrived very quickly and packaging was well protected. Received a free 2-pack sample of another scent with my purchase. I love the aroma of this shower steamer. When the hot water hits the steamer the essential oils scent is immediately released. I took several deep breaths and felt an overall feeling of calmness. I could still smell the scent after my shower. Amazing product to use after a stressful day. Will order more for myself and friends.
rating 5.0. Wonderful! Love these. Can’t imagine taking a shower without them. I will definitely reorder. Packaging was very nice.

rating 5.0. The BOMB! Best yet Love them! Very fragrant. Just what I was looking for. Best I've used to date. Note with order was a great personal touch as well as the 2 samples of an additional scent. Total thumbs up!

rating 2.0. Lite Smell They do smell nice when they are in full force, but that does not last long.  The lemon oil overpowers the lavender scent which is why I purchased these. rating 5.0. rating 5.0. The aroma is amazing! Honestly, I didn’t notice any changes in stress levels or relaxation but the smell during the shower is absolutely amazing!! The shower steamers are wrapped tightly so the smell is divine when the package is opened and the aroma does not fade. I would purchase more of these consistently but it’s a little pricey to purchase frequently. The aroma will permeate the entire house. I have used half of one during a shower and saved the remaining half for another shower but when I do that, of course, the second half’s aroma isn’t as strong. I purchased  different scents and they are all good.

rating 5.0. I enjoyed them so much that I have already purchased a second bag as a gift for another friend and as ordered myself sample packs of each of the other scents available by this seller to try out, too.

rating 2.0. Not so sure it works The packaging was great. Smells amazing.
I bought for my bf who has anxiety attacks often. Usually getting ready in the morning. He still had an anxiety attack coming out of the shower, the day he used this... not sure if I would recommend for that.

rating 2.0. Meh, not impressed I bought the Stress Fighter, and didn't find the scent to be very noticeable, which I guess is ok because I didn't like it much. I couldn't smell the lavender at all; it was overwhelmingly lemony, and not a good lemon -- more like a bathroom cleaner lemon.
Two free samples of the Morning Energy scent were included -- nice! But it didn't smell much different from the others, again overwhelmingly bad-lemon with a trace of peppermint and no detectable rosemary.
Judging from other reviews, the packaging has changed. The steamers were not individually wrapped, they were all bundled together in partially open cellophane, all inside a resealable pouch.
Bottom line: interesting novelty, but ultimately not worth the cost (about $2 per steamer).

rating 5.0. Last My Whole Shower Time! I have tried many shower steamers and many of them disappear within the first couple minutes of my shower.
And when I use a shower steamer, I want to take my time and relax in my shower. I am not taking a 5 minute shower. (And yes, I do place the product the furthest spot away from where the water hits.)
Now this product by The Herbal Zen, lasts a long time and the scent is relaxing. They even threw in a sample of 2 shower steamers to try as a thank you for purchasing their product!! Now that is GOOD customer service.
And YES, I will be coming back!!

current_product_reviews:
rating 1.0. FAKE ARTIFICIAL COLOURS. Aerosolized in water and steam and then you inhale the artificial dyes. I used these a long time ago when they did not have fake artifical dyes.

I guess the money saving is too lucrative like all the other Chinese manufactured shower similar products.

Every one of them has artificial dyes - some of the colourings are banned in more advanced countries like the EU. Not so in the US.

Make of that what you will. Do you want artificial dyes being aerosolized so you inhale them in a shower, as well as potentially staining or being absorbed by skin or staining your shower?

Fragrance may well be real, but it is weak.
other_product_reviews: rating 1.0. Fake crude oil derived colorants. Just noticed that this company uses artificial colorants, many of them banned overseas (but not by the sketchy venal FDA). Natural ones cost more of course, but... this company chose to make weirdly bright colors. Like the food companies wirh their weirdly bright red colored chips. I bought a few. Will try to return them. The product page on Amazon does not detail the crude oil derived colorings used. The packaging does.

rating 5.0. Measure your entryway. Wished I got the bigger size. I love this product! You see, I live in an apartment building, and my mat is placed right outside my apartment door. My mat is not exposed to the elements and I don't have multiple feet
wiping crud-laden, gnarly ice-spiked, boots across it. This mat is more a designer, work of art, piece. Why would you even think of wiping your nasty boots on a Van Gogh? Keep a durable, rubber boot mat/tray on the INSIDE of your door! That said, I believe the mat is excellent for apartment dwellers, and should be marketed, thusly.

rating 2.0. Scent dissipates almost immediately - ineffective I bought this anxiety relief essential oils roll on with high hopes after reading great reviews. However, I was disappointed. The packaging and presentation was wonderful. The product itself, fell flat. The oil rolled on nicely, however the scent disappeared minutes after applying, which is unlike my other essential oil products that I use. After 5 minutes, there was no trace of the scent at all. This is not effective for aromatherapy.

rating 5.0. Where Has this Been All My Life!? The presentation of "Chill Out" Relaxation Blend Roll-On Essential Oil is brilliant! Once you open the package, you can see how much Maddie, the EO Crafter, truly cares about what she makes, how it looks, and YOU! Beautiful presentation, thoughtfully done! "Chill Out" is a phenomenal scent. I applied it to  my inner wrists, my temples, and my lower neck (so the scent could waft up when I inhaled.) This is a great EO blend that melts into your skin beautifully with no mess after application. Some roller ball applicator bottles release far too much product, but this one does not. It allows you to apply the blended oil conservatively, assisting you in the need to apply without overdoing it. The scent is a soft, peaceful one; It does not assault you! Its perfect in strength, not cloying - but absolutely present and accounted for. I have severe anxiety disorder, and some days are fairly hard to get through. I'm not saying that "Chill Out" essential oil blend takes anxiety away. I can say that the scent dials down some of the feelings of tension, irritability, etc that I experience, and helps bring me back to a place that's more centered and calm. I wish that the scent was a little longer lasting, but this is truly not a deal-breaker! I will continue to buy this blend from Maddie. I like it enough that I want to have a bottle to keep in the house and another to keep in my handbag for assuring comfort when I'm out and about. Thank you, Maddie, for making such a terrific, quality product!

It does not hurt that it seems to be somehow indestructable AND beautiful
Bravo

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Sweet Prime Day Find! I’ve wanted to own a piece of orgonite jewelry for a long time, but most orgonite items I’d seen online seemed vastly overpriced. So when I saw this attractive, affordable pendant by Ezina Designs on sale for Prime Day, I ordered it immediately — and I’m glad I did. The pendant was delivered very fast, and it’s just as pretty as the photo on Amazon. I love its sacred geometry — the Merkaba / Metatron symbolism, the embedded chakra gems on the front, and the graceful copper Tesla coil on the back. As to whether it actually ‘works’  — I guess your mileage may vary. I certainly doubt that it’s ‘bad luck’ or ‘demonic’ as a couple of reviewers seem to think! (FYI, Babylonian Talmud and traditional Kabbalistic writings mention Metatron as an angel of God, not a ‘fallen angel’ or a ‘demon’.) On the other hand, I’m not sure that it really does all the wonderful stuff people say it does. But to quote The X-Files, ‘I Want To Believe’ it does, and who knows? Maybe that’s enough to help the wearer create their own happiness, health, and good luck. Anyway, it’s lovely and the price was right, so thank you, Ezina Designs, from a very happy customer!

rating 5.0. I am absolutely in love with these rings! After taking a home ring size measurement, I ordered two size 10 rings hoping for them to fit my middle finger. The rings arrived and I found them to be big so I messaged the seller, went to a local jeweler to get the rings sized and was able to have rings send in an exact size of 9 3/4. The size 10 rings I ordered turned out to be 10.5 from the stamping of the letters. I was SO pleased and impressed with this seller’s response time, problem solving skills and the product they created! I gifted the bigger rings to my husband who wears them proudly, purchased another set as a gift for grandma and personally wear my own perfectly sized rings! I couldn’t recommend this product more. My only recommendation would be to get your finger sized so you are purchasing the right size and contact the seller before purchasing if you want an exact measurement! I love the rings so much and don’t plan on taking them off!

rating 5.0. 21 YEARS OF LIFE WITH MATCHING RINGS (picture does not do the rings justice)! I have never writen a review but my incredible experience warrants that I share the following. My twin daughters turned 21 a few weeks ago. I am in the midwest; they are across the country. I wanted to get them something memorable that they would love and keep forever. I could not find anything unique that was affordable and meaninful. I found the Hannan Design Personalized ring and had the engravings, "M & M & M". It stands for Mom, Maggie and Molly. My daughters said it was the best present they have gotten from me. One daughter does not wear rings so I thought she could put it on a necklace or have it as a keepsake. She has not taken the ring off her finger! Initally I only ordered rings for the twins as I was not sure I wanted 3 rings should we not be satified.
However, I ordered another M & M & M; now the 3 of us have the same rings. I could not be happier. The picture is decent but the rings are even more beautiful in person. Thank you!

rating 5.0. Tiny, easy to wear. Perfect. I realize that this is supposed to be a name ring. That said, every year I set an intention in the form of a word. rating 5.0. Beautifully made! A true lover of silver, I was looking for a nice silver ring to display the names of the loves of my lives (my children), but I didn’t want to spend a fortune doing so.

I stumbled upon this vendor and the idea of stackable rings was so cute, I decided to give it a try so I ordered one ring with three names to see if I woke like the design.

I ordered the option with the hearts between the names and it’s absolutely stunning! The finish of the ring is beautiful, it’s nice and sturdy without being bulky, and the engraving is high-quality.

I have already ordered two more so I can have my own trio and I can’t wait for them to arrive. I envisioned wearing them on my right hand middle finger, but it doesn’t fit so wearing on the right hand ring finger instead.

My ring finger size is 7.5 so I ordered an 8.0. It doesn’t fit on my right hand middle finger, but fits on the left. I only wear my wedding ring on my left hand so these will be worn on the right.

If you’re considering this product, go for it! You won’t be disappointed.

other_product_reviews: rating 4.0. Third one I purchased and happy with all This one is the reversible sapphire/ruby and both stones show and sparkle in the light nicely.  The Ruby is more vibrant than the sapphire, but both are very nice.  I usually wear an 7.5 - 8 but ordered 7.5 feeling the band was relatively thin.  It fits nicely on either ring finger and had I got an 8 it would have worked on pointer finger or middle finger, but then would have been loose on the ring finger.  It appears sturdy, a nice antique looking gold (not shiny) & good craftmanship.  I recommend the ring & seller.

rating 5.0. Great product, not perfect I like this thing. It's very nice looking, the beads are a decent size for what I was looking for. It also comes with an extra elastic band so that's very appreciated. I expect this to last a good while, and it's comfortable for the most part.

Main complaint: I feel like the beads are coated with some kind of epoxy or resin. They look nice because of it, but they dont feel perfectly smooth to the touch. I think that's a miss on this bracelet. For a bracelet that is meant to massage the senses and energy, it fails on that front.
I have a tigereye-only bracelet with larger beads that feels better. And personally I would have liked the beads a touch bigger, but that's personal preference.

Regardless, I still like it overall. I give it high 4 stars so may as well give it the full 5 stars.

It had obviously been scraped up and the bottle is a bit damaged which kind of sucks because it won’t look nice on my perfume tray. But the product is still quality.
other_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Makes a great gift! The packaging alone shows how much the seller wants to make sure the customer is thrilled to get this necklace. I loved that it came wrapped so nicely and the necklace is beautiful! I was also pleasantly surprised by the bonus earrings mine came with especially because I love a large hoop and I cannot wait to wear them. I also really liked the care tips on the card included in the box. Overall I think this makes a great gift for anyone or even yourself.

input:
rating 5.0. Spectacular! Flat and durable, this fun vibrant blue band is spectacular! It’s super lightweight and very comfortable. I don’t even feel it on my ankle. And my Alta fitbit is very secure. I love all the bands from this company. I have 3 and will be buying more.
Make sure you get the correct size depending on if it’s for your wrist or ankle. And follow the simple instructions for inserting your fitbit.
I highly recommend this product, you will not be disappointed.
rating 5.0. Great for ankle or wrist. Is the first to actually fit either my ankle or my wrist.  Very strong Velcro and yet not uncomfortable.  Would recommend.

rating 5.0. excellent quality. This is excellent quality for a reasonable price. I ordered the peach color and love it. Sometimes I even forget I am wearing it. I have an Fitbit ultra and it stays safe and secure in the pouch. Follow directions and your Fitbit will not fall out.  I will wear this till it wears out and then I will order another.

rating 5.0. More Steps Counted I love this ankle band for my Fitbit Alta.  I get so many more steps logged by wearing this rather than wearing my Fitbit on my wrist.  Especially when walking in stores.  If I'm pushing a cart, my steps don't register very well.  With this ankle band they do.
rating 5.0. This seems secure and the fit is perfect. It is nice to be able to have ... This seems secure and the fit is perfect. It is nice to be able to have another place to wear my fitbit.
rating 5.0. Love! My old band looked like an ankle monitor Love! My old band looked like an ankle monitor! Was. Running joke amongst my friends.  This is so much cuter AND comfy. Gonna buy more!
rating 5.0. Five Stars i love this. i will def be ordering more. great quality.

rating 5.0. Soft, secure ankle strap for fitness tracker! I can't wear a watch or fitness tracker at my job due to health code regulations and searched for options to wear my tracker on my ankle instead. I own a Garmin VivoFit 3 and most of the ankle straps I found for the Garmins were kind of bulky and didn't have the best reviews.  I spotted this ankle band for the FitBits and, after looking at the dimensions of my Garmin and comparing it to the FitBits, I chose the option for the FitBit One.  It shipped and arrived faster than initially thought,,,, AND, It works PERFECTLY.  Even though my tracker is not a FitBit, it still fit in the pouch perfectly and it is 100% secure.  The strap is very soft - I can't even tell I am wearing it!  Definitely very satisfied with my purchase!

rating 5.0. Perfect for wearing under pants or skinny jeans Love these ankle bands...very light weight, you forget your wearing it.  The edges of the Velcro have a tendency to dig into skin at certain angles so less painful edges would be nice. but after a an adjustment or two you find a fit that works. I really like the pocket design that holds the Fitbit, very simple and highly effective.  I’ve  been looking for ankle bands that would fit under pants and jeans that aren’t bulky and I finally found the perfect band...definitely buying again!
rating 5.0. Very comfortable and secure I really like my fitbit ankle band. It is very comfortable and it tracks your steps more accurately than on my wrist. Love it!
rating 5.0. Five Stars I've tried different bands for my fitbit, but this one works out perfectly

rating 5.0. I like wearing it on my ankle during business meetings This item keeps my Fitbit highly secure when compared to the ribbon wristbands I had been wearing. I like wearing it on my ankle during business meetings. Very well made, would recommend this purchase!

rating 5.0. can't even feel its on. love it.
can't even feel its on. more than once i had to check to make sure it was there! mutilate choices if colors.
going to order more colors!

rating 5.0. BUY IT!!! This product is awesome!! It looks exactly like the picture and is very light weight.  The silicone fitbit bracelets make my wrists break out, cloth is a great idea.  This is a great alternative and it's very comfortable.  Well worth the price!!

rating 5.0. Nice for wearing around your ankle. My Fitbit Alta HR fits perfectly in the little pocket and seems secure.  It is also comfortable.  It does exactly what it claims and is well made.  It counts my steps by does not track my heart rate, which I assumed it wouldn't since it the unit is within fabric. For that, I had better luck with the band extenders.  That being said, this is definitely a good, comfortable, option.  I wouldn't hesitate to buy it.

rating 5.0. Comfortable, secure, and nicely made This is exactly what I’ve been looking for! I couldn’t wear my Fitbit because I got burn-like marks on my skin where the metal contacts touched. I prefer to wear it on my ankle because it counts steps more accurately and other styles of ankle bands were black and clunky and looked like something you wear on house arrest. These are less obtrusive, more attractive, and very comfortable. They are also neatly sewn and well-made, with a good pocket design and sufficient Velcro to keep your device secure. I will be ordering more!

rating 5.0. It is so nice and light I think my Fitbit records steps more accurately on the ankle.  This one is thin and comfy to wear.  Others have said it doesn't hold the Fitbit in the pocket but you have to give it a stretch to make sure it is under both layers.  I wear it in the pool doing exercise and have had no problems.  It is so nice and light, stays on, dries quickly and is comfy to wear.  I would highly recommend to friends.

rating 5.0. Great product and seller Exactly what I needed and seller is very accommodating!! The first size I ordered didn’t fit and upon my contacting her, she sent another size promptly! Highly recommend if you’re looking for an ankle band for your Alta/Alta HR

rating 5.0. Wish I had thought of this first! I generally don't leave reviews because I am usually not that impressed with items I order but I am in love with this item!  It is so comfortable and with the black band it just looks like an ankle wrap and not a clunky monitoring device from jail!  I will be ordering more in other colors to match my clothes.  I also love how secure my Fitbit Flex 2 is in the pouch.  I was worried I would lose it but it took a minute to get it in the pouch because of the double flap and I love that.  There's no way it is coming out.  Great product.
rating 5.0. Worth it Pretty. Quick shipping. Sure beats my previous house arrest monitoring device looking one I had!

rating 5.0. Great little band. It's lightweight and not binding. I hardly know I'm wearing it. Thank god the Fitbit Flex 2 is waterproof. I forget I'm wearing it and step right into the bath or shower.
rating 5.0. Very light and comfortable to wear Very light and comfortable to wear.  So much better than the bulky black one.  I can get one to match every outfit!
rating 5.0. Great product. Great product. The band is comfortable, cute and secure. I have multiple colors. I highly recommend this product

rating 5.0. Simple and perfect. I've had it for nearly 6 months now, and still in good shape. Perfect and soft to hide under socks, and pretty enough to wear out with short socks. I'm going to get a few more colors.
rating 3.0. Mixed feelings Nice idea and comfortable but Fitbit slides out. Lost my Alta  twice while wearing it.

rating 5.0. Fitbit one band works for Misfits as well! I love these!  I am using them as ankle bands for my misfit 2.  Finally I can keep better track of my steps, kicks, and biking without people remaking that it looks like I'm under home arrest.  My oldest band is starting to pill a bit, but I've worn it daily for several months through work, exercise, swimming and beaches. The misfit 2 bulges a little in the pocket, but it isn't terribly noticeable and the pocket holds it securely.  I now have an every day band and several for dressing up a bit.

rating 5.0. So comfortable, I often don't know it's there. I like to do fitbit challenges with some online friends. It's tough when you've been walking around at work or the grocery store with your hands full, so you only get a fraction of the step credit. This little band fixes that. When I got it, I thought it'd fall apart, but it's smooth and feather-light and holding up well after a few weeks. You just pop the bands off your fitbit and slide the little module inside the band's inner pocket, then put it around your ankle. Velcro keeps it on. I am ordering a spare soon because I like wearing it during workouts and I would prefer to switch it out while I wash the other band (and so I have a choice of colors). The one upside/downside is that I really can't feel it when I wear my Alta in the band over a sock, so I will get paranoid and check that it's still there. It's never come close to falling off, though.

rating 5.0. READ THE INSTRUCTIONS! Received mine today and so far so good! I see a couple reviews that it kept falling out but you have to tuck it into 2 slots just follow the directions... See it's in there snug...
Now it's Out with the old in with the new! I really liked my other 1, I just got tired of ppl asking if I'm on house arrest lol

rating 4.0. Finally getting accurate steps! This band is great. Its comfortable, tracks my steps way more accurately, and although more expensive than other makers its well worth it not to look like an ankle monitor. Haha. The main issue I have with it is getting my fitbit flex to fit into the pocket. It takes some effort but once its in the pocket it feels very secure. Overall I'm very happy with it. Would purchase again!

rating 5.0. Love this! This is so great!  It’s comfortable, inexpensive and the Fitbit stays safely in the pocket with the overlap design. I like the black, although it looks a bit like an ankle monitor for someone on parole, so maybe I should have chosen a different color. Haha. Anyway, I highly recommend this!

rating 2.0. lost the entire band and my fitbit in 3 days I am writing this review to warn people that it isn't very secure as i lost the entire band on the third day of wearing it. rating 4.0. Used it as a wrist band for sleeping I bought this because I wanted it for sleeping and I have very thin wrists (5 1/2 ") and other bands  I've used for the FitBit One are too big.  This works and is very comfortable and light weight.  When closed with Velcro it still had a big end hanging off.  I just cut it off with a scissor and so far so good.  It got 4 stars instead of 5 because it is difficult to get it into the pocket.  It's much easier to get it out.  But it doesn't fall out, so that's good.  Getting it into the pocket takes some work.

rating 5.0. Soft and secure! This band is so soft, I can't even tell I'm wearing it!  I've only had it a day, but I can tell I'm going to love it. I can wear it alone for around the house, or over a sock for errands. For serious walking, I put it under my sock for extra security from sticks and branches snagging on it. The pouch is made of soft stretchy material like the band, in a contrasting color, so I can tell which side is out just by looking at it. It's easy to put the fitbit in, and does hold it very securely. I really love this little band, and I will probably be buying more! After I've worn it a while, I'll try to remember to update this review with an evaluation of its longevity.

rating 5.0. It’s perfect I haven’t had any issues with my Fitbit Alta falling out of this. It fits well and I forget it’s on. I wear it on my ankle. Love the hedgehog design and the durability of the whole thing!  I will be buying more in a variety of colors.

rating 5.0. Fantastic little device I don't usually write reviews but I like this little device for my Fitbit so much I wanted to recommend it highly to others who have previously lost/misplaced their fitbit using the 'traditional' Fitbit holder. I like this little sleeve because it's so compact yet easy to put on my ankle each morning, using the velcro strap. Slightly pricey, but worth every penny, as I'll now never lose/misplace my Fitbit and you don't even know you're wearing it, yet it keeps the Fitbit secure. Highly recommended, very well made!

rating 5.0. Comfortable and still going at 6 months.... I've been using this for about 6 months and it is still working good. I forget I am wearing it about 5 minutes after I put it on. I also think my steps are more accurate because my Fitbit is measuring the steps from my foot and not my arm. I got this because I hurt my shoulder when I was moving my arms too enthusiastically one day to make sure my steps were being recorded. Now, I don't have to work about that. Also, my Fitbit on my wrist always interfered with using my mouse, so that problem is also solved.

rating 5.0. Cute and well made. Tiny studs like this are perfect for multiple ear piercings, I'm happy there are folks out there who make them at all, much less this well.

This is me being a nerdy gardener, but I wouldn't call them cherry blossoms. They're more of a buttercup, cinquefoil, or single/wild rose; maybe you could pretend they look like plum blossoms if you squint hard.

They're cast incredibly well though, the earrings are cute and highly detailed, and are neatly polished with no ugly seams or pits. The posted photos are completely accurate and represent exactly what you get. The packaging is both cute (very giftable) and protects the earrings perfectly during shipping. In this case, the price accurately reflects the quality and attention to detail. If all their jewelry is this well made, they've got themselves a repeat customer.

input: rating 5.0. Favorite Ring Ever I've had my ring for months and love it. There is a bit of a learning curve for getting it on and off your finger, but you get used to it quickly. Keeps my hands occupied when I'm nervous or stressed out, which is exactly what I needed.

rating 5.0. So helpful, and beautiful too. Geoff & Steel Lynx, I cannot thank you enough for this. I have ocd and this has already helped me keep my hands busy to avoid picking. Both the ring and the fidget balls I ordered are beautiful. The craftsmanship is really incredible, and my order came even quicker than I anticipated. I plan to order more as soon as I can.

rating 5.0. Forget about every other fidget tool there is, and get something from this shop! I can't express how much I love these two rings. I originally ordered the black, grey, and silver one as a ring. But it looked good on the black necklace, so I swapped it out with the rainbow pendant. I remember when the fidget cubes and the like hit the market, and people have gifted me some of those items, but this blows all of them away. And the rings are even more beautiful in person.
I have two recommendations: if you're getting a ring, size it for your index finger. That way it's only kind of bulky on one side. Also, because of the way these move, I recommend getting a piece with more than one color. It is much easier to see how the piece works when you can see the individual rings move in and out.

rating 5.0. Great fidget toy I purchased this ring as a Christmas present for my son who has autism.  He always has a fidget in hands and especially likes rings on rings. He was never into the fidget spinners but I thought this would be perfect. He loves it and has kept it on his thumb most of the time since he opened it. I like it’s not so obvious as self-stimulating item since it’s small, which may mean we lose it eventually. If we do, I’ll definitely buy again.

rating 5.0. Love it! Got this for my son and it's by far his favorite fidget to date. We're going to put it on a chain though since he has a habit of taking it off and forgetting about it. And I like his so much that I ordered one for myself!

rating 5.0. LOVE I love this product!! I was looking for a fidget toy that was small and could bring to work to help ground me when I dissociate. And this ring is perfect!! I usually wear a size 5 but ordered a size 6 since the ring is bulkier. The fit was perfect, and the ring wasn’t that bulky!!! I highly highly recommend this ring!!! Love the color too!

rating 5.0. No more pen clicking! This ring is AMAZING! I’ve always been pretty fidgety - twirling strings on hoodies, popping my pop socket up and down, etc. I was looking for a “fidget” ring because I’ve been driving my coworkers nuts by clicking my pen in meetings. I ordered a size 9 so I could wear it on my thumb, and it fits perfectly. It rolls smoothly up and down my finger, and while it does make noise, it’s a very soft clicking sound that shouldn’t drive anyone crazy in meetings. I chose expedited at shipping and it was still delivered sooner than expected.

rating 2.0. Cheap materials I was so disappointed when I opened the little box to find very cheap little rings,held onto one main link. There is no universe where this would be considered “steel”. You can actually see where the cheap rings are not quite seamlessly held together. Just junk. It probably costs $3 to make this. Tops.
I tried it on, hoping it would at least be comfortable and I could overlook the materials, but no such luck. Totally uncomfortable. I ordered a ring spinner and hopefully, that will be better.

rating 5.0. Such a cool fidget ring! *Update I really love this ring so far. It arrived sooner than anticipated and was packaged very nicely. I ordered a size bigger than I normally wear thinking because it has 4 rings it might be kind of tight -- but I probably could have ordered my normal size and it would have fit fine. It's thick for daily wear if you are used to wearing typical bands or rings. I actually like the thickness of it because it's a fidget ring and I like knowing it's right there. I'm really happy I can choose the colors of the ring and customize it like that.
Overall this is a very cool ring! I'm happy to purchase from a real human being, too!

Update 4/2/2020: my previous ring fell down the drain. I ordered another ring immediately and forgot to pay for express shipping (yes, I needed a new one that bad). I messaged the seller and asked if I could pay for express shipping but at that point, nothing could really be changed so I had to just wait it out. But the seller made the ring quickly and shipped it so fast. I also ordered aNOTHER ring so if I lose this one, I'll have a backup. I have anxiety and ADHD so keeping myself focused is really difficult. I never knew what I was missing until I got one of these rings. It took losing it for me to realize how much I actually fidget with it because I'd go to fidget... and realized over and over again that oh yeah, it's missing.

The seller is awesome for making these rings and shipping so fast. Thank you so much!!
rating 5.0. Love them! My daughters loved these rings!  The colors are beautiful, and they move well.

rating 5.0. Love this ring.... I found this while shopping for another fidget toy for my son.  I bought it because I am a fidgeter.  I absolutely love this ring.  I am a teacher, and I find myself fidgeting with it throughout the day especially during passing periods.  My son even commented how much I must really love the ring because he noticed me fidgeting with it while I was driving.  Buy this, you won't be disappointed with your purchase.

rating 5.0. Great fidget toy! Excellent product!  I have several Mobii from this designer/artist, and each of them is a high-quality product.  Perhaps best of all, the artist is incredibly easy to work with, and your Mobii will probably be produced within 48 hours (mine were both within a day, but I don't want to promise anything FOR the artist!).  I am EXTREMELY pleased to have purchased a few different Mobii, and I have really liked them all.

rating 5.0. Well crafted colorful strong rings that freely moves around finger. Arrived on time and packaged really well.  Ordered 2 customized rings mix of purples, & blues. They are stunning little beauties. Well crafted stong rings that freely moves comfortably around finger.

rating 5.0. Lovely and helpful A friend had given me the gift of one of the small Mobii devices, and then she told me that she had gotten a ring and loved it.  I love my small rainbow Mobii, so I thought why not let's get one of the loose rings.  Well I picked my own colors, which was so fun to start.  I got it in the mail last week and have not been at all disappointed.  The ring is just as well made.  It's light, easy to wear, and great to fidget with.  It is nice to be able to wear it and play with it.  I love this artist and the approach he makes to creating these pieces.  I can't recommend the ring highly enough.  My one note for folks is when you get it to keep playing with it until you get the rings lined up the way that slides on best for you.  That took a little bit of playing with for me.
rating 5.0. Amazing product Product is amazing, I love it. I think I might buy another. Everything was great from the shipping dates to the packaging to the product! Definitely a good buy!

rating 5.0. Thanks much needed Yay!!! Just got my beautiful custom ring! Now I have something to play with instead when I'm anxious (basically always) or absent mindedly sitting around instead of rolling of my finger nails and the like. Thanks guys I'll probably be buying more : )

rating 5.0. Best ADHD fidget I've had. This is the best fidget for me, period. I've been a lifelong run my index finger and thumb together kinda dude, but now I just flip a ring or two off and around the tip of a finger, almost perpetually, kinda dude. I've had the ring for about a week now and it stays, progressively, longer in/on my hand reach day. Today, it's been with me every moment that I wasn't peeing.

I do wish the rings were contiguous material rather than a bent rod but that'd be some kinda fancy milling operation and a significantly higher price point. The rings aren't separating and I've played with this thing a lot already, so I suspect that they'll stay intact in the relatively long term unless I damage them.

The product is great, and there was a personalized note in the box, which is a touch you're only getting by supporting a small business that cares. Do that. Support these cats; they're doing it right.

rating 5.0. Very nice! Now I cannot stop playing with it I received it yesterday, superfast considering I only ordered it a few days ago, and now I cannot stop playing with it. I tend to have a bit of anxiety when I am stressed or nervous and have developed some bad habits such as skin and lip picking. What I like about this ring is that you can carry it with you anywhere and have it readily available if you need it. Today I had a stressful day and this ring helped a lot. I was able to quietly play with it during a few company meetings as needed and throughout the day. I purchased size 7.5 with 5 rings, but ended up removing one of the rings to make it less bulky and to fit my index finger better.  Love it!

rating 5.0. Cool little fidget ring! Cool little fidget ring! Purchased for my husband, who chronically needs something to keep his hands busy. Great craftsmanship, back to order another for me!
ETA: Ok, so I bought one of these for my fidgety husband and had to come back to buy one for everyone in the family because we had a hard time taking turns. This item is deceptively simple, but once it's in your hands there is a ton of fidgeting potential. We all "play" with our own rings differently and love that you can just slip it on your finger and forget about it.

rating 5.0. Great products! I've ordered a few different items, including the half fidget ball, the necklace and now this ring. I absolutely love this seller's work. rating 4.0. Great idea but color rubs off I really love the concept of the ring. I wear it
On my thumb. And fidget it up and down a LOT. I’ve had it for about 2 weeks. And a lot of the color has rubbed off onto my thumb. That’s why I can’t give it 5 stars. It makes my finger look dirty. I am guessing that if I had gotten plain, that would not happen? I really don’t know. Like I said, I love fidgeting with it. But can’t give it 5 stars due to color run off and my finger catches on the split of the rings.

rating 5.0. Best purchase ever! So I have had this ring for less than 24 hours, and already it has become one of my favorite things ever. I bought it (as well as one of the palm toys) to have at work to keep my hands occupied, given that I'm extremely anxious and need something to do with my hands, and this ring is exactly what I wanted.

It's easy for me to fiddle with, and doesn't get in the way of me doing things like it feels most rings do. I have kind of thick fingers, but the size 9 fits me perfectly. I got the dark silver and very light blue, and it looks very, very nice.

Anyway, I highly recommend this for someone who needs something quiet to play with at their desk!

rating 5.0. AWESOME - looks great and PERFECT for fidgeting! The item arrived exactly as described.  It looks and feels great - it's very light.  Most importantly, it has given me a fidget that is helping me to stop fidgeting with my hair.  It's amazing to have something with me at all times that I can redirect my hands to when I want to reach for my hair.  The ring looks beautiful and is so affordable.  Thank you!!!!

rating 5.0. Beautiful and rolls smoothly. Love it. It's awesome. I don't wear it all the time since it is a bit bulky, but I love having it in my pocket to fidget with. I may put it on a necklace in the future but I'm not sure yet. I bought the smallest size and then took off one ring at a time to make sure I'd get the right fit, so I got a second two-loop thumb ring haha

Also, keep in mind that if your ring isn't rolling on smoothly, make sure all the loops are facing the right way. It feels a lot smaller if one ring is facing the wrong way. I wasn't sure what was going on at first, but just keep that in mind if yours is feeling awkward at first.
rating 5.0. Great fidget! This is a great fidget. It looks nice as a ring, and the motion is very smooth and satisfying. My son loves it too, so I’ll be ordering one in his size soon.
