rating 5.0. Amazing little piece! I ordered the spin ring just a few days ago. I've always been a bit reluctant to order anything that is not *Prime as I've had a bad experience in the past. But Steel Lynx has great reviews already and the price was more than affordable.
my Spin ring arrived well ahead of the estimated time frame.
The colors I chose are vibrant and exciting and even better in person. I'm so happy with my chosen custom colorization.
The spin ring is not really meant to be worn as a constant wear ring as the multi ring bands makes the ring a bit bulky on my finger and that's totally ok. Just when my hands a bored and something to fidget with.
I absolutely LOVE this and I will definitely Order from Steel Lynx again! And soon!

rating 5.0. I LOVE THIS RING I'm a fidgety person, I've tried so many things to help.  I just got this in the mail today and it is so satisfying to sit at my computer and work and fiddle with it while working.  Thank you so much.  I will be ordering more Mobiii soon.

rating 5.0. Very Fun! The color is wonderful, very vibrant, and it's very fun to play with! Keeps my hands occupied while I'm reading or paying attention to something else, and is very well made too.

rating 5.0. Description is True The description is true. They are bulky yet light weight. rating 5.0. Satisfying stress relief This is a very satisfying piece of jewelry. The movement is smooth as liquid and visually stunning. The links seem durable, something that was important to me as a known stress ball destroyer. The light chime of the rings against each other is also pleasant. I can wear it on my finger, and the fit is excellent, or I can string it onto a necklace or bracelet. It would have been nice to know how many rings come with each size, but even without that this has been a worthwhile purchase. Well done, Steel Lynx.

rating 1.0. Not as portrayed in pictures... I am very unhappy with this purchase because it was not what I expected. When I requested a return, the first label I saw on Amazon required me to pay for shipping, then I received another direct email from the seller with the correct label which was confusing. rating 5.0. Very good for busy hands. I bought it for one of my kids who has ADHD. She seems to love it.

rating 5.0. Such a great ring! Amazing! Oh my gosh the ring is amazing! The colors were exactly as I asked for. The ring came super fast, way earlier than stated. rating 5.0. fantastic for subtle fidgeting and nervous habits! I really love these rings! I have a terrible nervous habit of picking at my cuticles and these rings are so helpful. The bands make a small jingle when they pass each other as I move the ring up and down my finger but they are by far the quietest "fidget toy" I own. The bands move over each other really smoothly, they never get stuck, so I think the rings are really expertly made. I can wear them at work and play with them during meetings without it being bothersome or embarrassing. Having something I can wear around all day so it is right there when I need it, so I don't have to think about it, is great for breaking the nervous habit.

The colors are really nice and vibrant, so the rings are pleasant to look at as well! Pre-pandemic, all my co-workers wanted to play with these rings and the larger mobii balls also sold by this shop that I always had on my desk. I've gotten a bunch of compliments on them.

As it says in the item description, the ring gets a bit bulky in the smaller sizes (more bands) so I only like to wear them on my index finger. Originally I got a range of sizes, but recently I tried the suggestion of removing 1 or 2 bands to increase the size so I can wear them all on that finger and it worked perfectly!

I have 4 of these rings so far and I'm ordering more to try out all the fun color combinations :)
rating 5.0. Perfect!! This is a great stylish ring that you can fish it with!!!

rating 5.0. Great product from a small business! This is my second medium mobii fidget ball.  I love Geoff's work.  My orders were processed quickly, even for my custom color selections and they arrived without long delays.  In total, I now have 9 of his fidget balls (7 small and 2 mediums) and I'm sure I'll be ordering more in the future.  Love these things, they keep my restless hands busy while at work and at home.  Easy to carry and perfect in size, at least for me.

rating 5.0. Very Satisfying I bought two customized small ones and one rainbow medium one. They are very well-made, very fun to play with, and look fantastic! I've been looking for this kind of toy for a really long time, and now I finally got what I want! It is perfect for people who need to keep their fingers busy to focus in class and solve hard problems. In particularly, this is a great alternative to playing with your keys or clicking with your pens in class or office, which might be quite annoying to the others.

Although two of three metal knots are with customized colors, they still arrived at my doorstep within a week. Very impressive on that. I certainly wish the rainbow one can contain more colors--it now has red, orange, yellow, green, blue, indigo, and violet, which are indeed the colors commonly in a rainbow--but, it probably won't hurt if we have some in-between colors. However, this "standard" rainbow colored knot just look fine to me, of course.

The other super trivial complain is that the name Möbii, which is I assume is a tribute to the famous Mobius band, is not mathematically correct here. Hopf fibration would definitely be way, way more accurate, but probably not a very good brand choice anyway. (Please ignore this paragraph which is pure nerdy talk.)

rating 5.0. Best there Is! I am so happy with my order from Steel Lynx. The Stress Mobius Toy is the perfect size to fit in my hand, my pocket or whereever to keep it handy for when my hands get bored.
It's not heavy, it's very light weight and the rings move very easily around each other and through each other - satisfying the habit of twisting, tugging or pulling. I even find the sound that the little steel bands make in moving around each other to be satisfying.
The colors I chose in my custom colorization order are amazing, they are vibrant and exciting. They are way better in person and I love them.
The order time to delivery was short than expected and I am so happy with my order I will definitely purchase from Steel Lynx again, and soon!

rating 2.0. Little too big and not quiet I was interested to try this fidget toy. I purchased the small and the medium. It was nice to be able to choose the colors. I really like the look of them. The small one is a nicer size for my hand and had more of a fluid movement. The medium size had more rings and didn't move as easily. These are definitely not silent like other fidget toys. They would slip out of my hand often also. So, would not be a good choice for a student in a class or an adult in a work environment. It wasn't my personal preference for a fidget toy since there wasn't much movement. I feel like the price for the small one is fair at $7.99 but the medium size is high at $19.99.  I prefer the roller chain fidget toy, sold elsewhere, that has silicone bands, it is silent and I can do more things with it.

rating 5.0. My favorite fidget! It's beautiful! The size and weight are perfect. I asked for mostly emerald and forest green with random accents, and it's gorgeous. I love it! It's hard to find well-made fidgets that aren't juvenile, but the Mobii is the kind of thing I can drop in my purse and take out during meetings.

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Unique and perfect fidget! I have so many Mobii at this point that I have lost count. I have them in every size and tons of color combinations, with the medium sized Mobii outnumbering the others by a significant margin. The are a perfect size for most any hand; you can choose any variety of color combinations and customize your fidget (who doesn’t like that?!); and they make great gifts. The movement is smooth and never ending, and it is lightweight. I honestly have one in each vehicle and probably every jacket pocket.  I’ve also had quite a few “borrowed and never returned.”  :)  They really are addictive and unique. I highly, highly recommend these awesome fidgets!
other_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Awesome versatile fidget I purchased this “half” version in the dark silver and sapphire blue as well as dark silver and pink ice.  I can’t decide which I like best!  Of course, the movement is the same for each. I honestly wondered before ordering if I would like the half version of the Daydream, but I have every other Mobii style and size, and I’ve never been disappointed. I certainly wasn’t in this case either. You have lots of movement with these half versions. You can flip rings over and over or place the Mobii on a finger and roll the rings over each other. If you prefer a little more movement with your fidget, you may like these even better than the full Mobii. I will say that these half version Mobii do make a bit more noise when just flipping rings in your hand, but as I’ve said before in reviews, they are aluminum rings. Of course they are going to make some noise when they strike each other. It’s not loud, as you might expect with a heavier metal. It’s also not a big deal to me. Just know that it won’t be silent. Although, when placed over a finger and rolled, there is very little noise. If you’re wondering if you’ll like this fidget, I seriously doubt you’ll be disappointed. I highly recommend trying the half daydream!

rating 5.0. Love my Mobii Daydream I have a TON of these Mobii fidgets, including the Daydream in pink ice. I had to add this bright blue one to my collection!  I am a female with small hands, and this still works well for me. The movement is smooth and fluid, and, of course, addicting. I’ve gotten lots of family and friends hooked.  I’ve also tried the half version of the Daydream, and I love it, too!  I flip it around and around or place it over a finger and roll it over and over. I highly recommend both versions.

rating 5.0. Unique necklace In truth, I don’t really fidget with the necklace much.  Although, I would certainly recommend this as a fidget (especially if you tend to lose things).  I really like the unique design and the numerous possible color combinations. It is very lightweight and well-made, and I love the colors within mine.  I definitely recommend this product.  (I got the leather.)

rating 5.0. Very large, but not heavy. Good for use with one or two hands. While the Daydream is a bit large for my hand, it works because it is so lightweight. (I now have 5 of the Daydream Möbii fidgets.)  The individual links/rings are much thicker than the Medium and Small Möbii, and I really like the feel and movement.  I usually take a medium Möbii fidget and the X-large Daydream with me when I go anywhere.  This is very well made and a great fidget. You will be surprised by how different the rings feel in comparison to smaller Möbii. Highly recommend!

rating 5.0. Great color combination; great fidget!  Good size for most hands. I currently have numerous Möbii fidgets:  medium anodized aluminum, medium stainless steel, small anodized aluminum, small stainless steel and copper, half though (stainless steel), extra large daydream, deep thought (stainless steel—husband’s), aluminum and stainless steel rings, and necklaces (aluminum).  I truly love them all!  This Unicorn Rainbow medium Möbii fidget gets a lot of use, and I have to keep it from getting stolen by admirers. :)  The colors are very pretty, and, as with all of my other Möbii fidgets, I like the feel and movement.  It keeps my fingers occupied while I work, ride in the car, etc., etc.  I am completely addicted to these; I don’t go anywhere without two of them.  The seller is great!  He also customizes these, which I also recommend for anyone—school colors, team colors, whatever. They make great gifts. I’m telling you, someone is always trying to take it when they see it. This Unicorn Rainbow is a wonderful color combination and has probably gotten the most compliments.

rating 5.0. Love these rings! The colors are awesome! (Pictures don’t do them justice.) To begin, I have purchased each of the following (many in multiples):

Möbii Daydream, Deep Thought, Half Thought, Medium Möbii, Medium Stainless Steel Möbii, Small Möbii, Small Stainless Steel and Copper Möbii, Anodized Aluminum Spin Ring, Stainless Steel Spin Ring.
(All except the Small Stainless Steel/Copper Möbii and the Medium Stainless Steel Möbii are pictured above basically in the order they are listed. The two not pictured are the same size as the other Small and Medium Möbii and are well represented with the seller’s pictures. And, please ignore the busted knuckle from yard work. :) )

If you are like me, and like to comparison shop using reviews, I hope the inclusion of each item is helpful. That said, for simplicity, I will be copying and pasting the same review on each of the items I have purchased.

While the Daydream is a bit large for my hand, it works because it is so lightweight. The individual links/rings are thicker than the Medium and Small Möbii, and I like the feel and movement.
The Deep Thought is nice and heavy with a good feel to it. I purchased it as a gift to my husband. It fits well in his large hands, and he seems to like it.
The Half Thought is wonderful! It is definitely one of my favorites. It has wonderfully simple and smooth unending movement. The weight is just right. It does make more noise than the tighter fitting Möbii fidgets—I mean, they’re stainless steel rings. The noise doesn’t bother me, and it’s basically as loud as you make it.
The Small Möbii fidgets are really nice for discreet fidgeting at meetings, etc., and they work well for just fingertip fidgeting. The colors are vibrant, and the customization option is a lot of fun!
The Small Stainless Steel and Copper Möbii is really nice—another favorite! The weight is great, and the movement is very smooth. I really like the copper mixed with the stainless steel.
The Medium Möbii fidgets probably get the most use (yes, another favorite) because of the perfect size, nice movement, and fun colors. They are lightweight and quiet (not silent). I do also have a Medium Stainless Steel Möbii, which, of course, has a little more weight to it and a good feel. The Stainless Steel version probably has slightly better overall movement. Although, I do still tend to pick up the brightly colored Aluminum version more often.
The Spin Rings (Anodized Aluminum and Stainless Steel) are both wonderful, whether you wear them at the base of the finger or in the middle—depending on fidget preferences. Of course, the Stainless Steel version is heavier. I really like both. I like more rings per spin ring for fidgeting and spinning, but obviously, more rings make the entire ring much thicker. If I wear a thick ring on my right (dominant) hand, it tends to interfere with writing. I usually just switch hands or set it aside.
Everything I’ve received has been very well made and delivered in a cute little Möbii-branded bag. As other reviewers have stated, the personal, hand-written “thank you” note is a nice touch. I had a few large orders, and the seller even included a free Small Möbii in two of the shipments!! I was super excited! (Geoff, I hope you’re reading this: Thank you so much!!!)
These make great gifts and have been a hit with my family and friends. I am addicted! I highly recommend any of these Steel Lynx products, y’all!! You can’t go wrong!

If you are like me, and like to comparison shop using reviews, I hope the inclusion of each item is helpful. That said, for simplicity, I will be copying and pasting the same review on each of the items I have purchased.

While the Daydream is a bit large for my hand, it works because it is so lightweight. The individual links/rings are thicker than the Medium and Small Möbii, and I like the feel and movement.
The Deep Thought is nice and heavy with a good feel to it. I purchased it as a gift to my husband. It fits well in his large hands, and he seems to like it.
The Half Thought is wonderful! It is definitely one of my favorites. It has wonderfully simple and smooth unending movement. The weight is just right. It does make more noise than the tighter fitting Möbii fidgets—I mean, they’re stainless steel rings. The noise doesn’t bother me, and it’s basically as loud as you make it.
The Small Möbii fidgets are really nice for discreet fidgeting at meetings, etc., and they work well for just fingertip fidgeting. The colors are vibrant, and the customization option is a lot of fun!
The Small Stainless Steel and Copper Möbii is really nice—another favorite! The weight is great, and the movement is very smooth. I really like the copper mixed with the stainless steel.
The Medium Möbii fidgets probably get the most use (yes, another favorite) because of the perfect size, nice movement, and fun colors. They are lightweight and quiet (not silent). I do also have a Medium Stainless Steel Möbii, which, of course, has a little more weight to it and a good feel. The Stainless Steel version probably has slightly better overall movement. Although, I do still tend to pick up the brightly colored Aluminum version more often.
The Spin Rings (Anodized Aluminum and Stainless Steel) are both wonderful, whether you wear them at the base of the finger or in the middle—depending on fidget preferences. Of course, the Stainless Steel version is heavier. I really like both. I like more rings per spin ring for fidgeting and spinning, but obviously, more rings make the entire ring much thicker. If I wear a thick ring on my right (dominant) hand, it tends to interfere with writing. I usually just switch hands or set it aside.
Everything I’ve received has been very well made and delivered in a cute little Möbii-branded bag. As other reviewers have stated, the personal, hand-written “thank you” note is a nice touch. I had a few large orders, and the seller even included a free Small Möbii in two of the shipments!! I was super excited! (Geoff, I hope you’re reading this: Thank you so much!!!)
These make great gifts and have been a hit with my family and friends. I am addicted! I highly recommend any of these Steel Lynx products, y’all!! You can’t go wrong!

rating 5.0. Beautiful simplicity Beautiful necklace; classy, simple, clean. I love this look!  It goes with everything, even layers well with other necklaces.

input: rating 1.0. Not as described I was super disappointed with my purchase. I ordered the 16 inch, 5 letter name, painted grey. First of all the measurements are off. The first letter is 16 inches but subsequent letters are only 7 inches. The wood is thin for the price, and there are no brackets to hang it. I would have been better off getting high quality letters from pottery barn or RHbaby and child. This really is not worth the money. I would love to return it and get my $88 back!

rating 5.0. Amazing quality, and size as expected Amazing quality, and size as expected.  I originally received the wrong size and reached out to the seller. They sent me a replacement right away and for the inconvenience even gave me the next size up at no cost. I really want to order another one for my older daughter's room! Worth every penny. I did purchase as non painted and just spray painted it myself.
rating 2.0. Not ready to hang... Disappointed that it didn't come ready to hang. No hooks or anything on the back. Great wood work and it would have scored 5 stars if it was ready to hang.

rating 5.0. Beautiful 12 inch Nursery Sign! This is such a beautiful sign!! We ordered it for my little girl's nursery above her bed. I wasn't sure what size to order as some people recommended the 16 inch but I am so happy I ordered the 12 inch. It is the perfect size. I think 16 would have looked too big. The cursive was beautiful for the name of Annalynn. I ordered the unpainted and just painted myself at home. It shipped extremely quick and I absolutely love the sign. I would highly recommend!!
rating 1.0. Disappointing... I asked for a 16” so instead of them making the whole name bigger they just added this weird thing at the end!!!!! So disappointed!
rating 5.0. Well worth the investment This is amazing!! I ordered this for my best friends babyshower and used it as a guest book. Everyone absolutely loved it!!

rating 5.0. Really great I really liked it! I must admit though it was a little thicker than I expected but thats my fault for not reading the dimensions so it was a litte hard to get it to stay on the wreath but I still made it work and it looks beautiful! I bought the 4-8 letter 24" wide, the"i" is connected, and I got it unpainted bc i wanted to have a little fun with the design. So I spray painted it and spackled on the colors I wanted. It was a gift and the receivers really loved it sooo overall I love it!
rating 5.0. Fast shipping/great quality Super fast shipping, great communication, and amazing quality. We love the way the name looks!

rating 5.0. Five Stars I got the 16 inch after reading reviews here and it's the perfect size for my daughter's nursery. Great quality for the price, and shipped faster than estimated!! Acrylic paint went on easily!

rating 3.0. It is just rough cut plywood. They didn't sand ... It is just rough cut plywood. They didn't sand any of the surfaces. A lot of prep work has to be done before you can paint it. For the money I paid, I expected it to be paint ready when I opened then box.

rating 3.0. It came out beautiful! the only problem is that it was broken ... It came out beautiful! the only problem is that it was broken between the letters when it got here. Nothing some wood glue couldn't fix but if I purchase something I expect it to come undamaged.
rating 5.0. Five Stars Absolutely perfect! It came faster than I expected. I'll probably order again! Love love love!
rating 5.0. Excelente Lo ordene sin pintura porque quería darle el color que yo quisiera la verdad buena madera excelente madera y muy fácil de usar

rating 5.0. But she was quick to answer and gave me options so I would be happy and it all worked out and came out beautiful It came out smaller than I thought because the size only applies to the first letter. the rest vary and are smaller. But she was quick to answer and gave me options so I would be happy and it all worked out and came out beautiful!!!!
rating 5.0. Five Stars Wonderful piece perfectly executed. Thank you!

rating 5.0. EXCELLENT product and fast delivery intact EXCELLENT product and fast delivery intact.  I agree with the other reviews that you can certainly go bigger.  The first letter is indicative of the size as it is a capital letter - the letters following are naturally smaller because they are lowercase.  I didn't really think that through when ordering so I ordered the 12 inch because I thought the 16 would be too much, but 16 would have been perfect. I ordered the gold painted, despite one bad review posted on the paint job, because I didn't want to be bothered sanding and painting myself.  I was delighted with the paint - flat classy color.  I bought hooks to tap in to the back before hanging it.  They cost less the $2 - no biggie.  You could also hang with ribbon or nails hidden inside the spaces between the letters.  I would order again or give as a gift.  TRULY a find at a great price and fast.
rating 5.0. Love it Beautiful and worth the money!

rating 5.0. Excellent It is Perfect! I am in love with it, the customer service is excellent, I communicated with them wanting to know the styles of how the name would look like and they sent me an image with Swirl and I asked to see it as well without the swirl and they showed to me with no problem.... I ordered the 18" and I don't regret it. My recommendations to you is to grab a ruler or a measuring tape and look at the size to see what fits for you.

rating 4.0. The size is for the first letter only It is seriously such great quality for the price. And the shipping time was fantastic! We weren't expecting it for a few more days still!

My only complaint is that I didn't realize the size you order is the size of the first letter only. We ordered our last name in the 8" because we are going to hang it above a door frame so we didn't want it too big, but only the first letter R is actually 8". So it is a bit smaller than we had pictured, but it will work fine still. Just something for someone else to consider when ordering.

rating 5.0. Great product! I got the name unpainted to save some money and it worked out perfect. I followed the instructions that were provided and the sign came out great! I bought .97 hangers at Walmart and nailed it to the back and it was easy to hang up. Looks beautiful and the quality is great! Highly recommend

rating 5.0. Loved It!!! I loved the product!!! The design was beautiful and very durable! It was packaged securely and the seller contacted me promptly for clarification as my product had special characters! I was extremely satisfied!!!!
rating 5.0. Five Stars Cute and came really fast for a customized item.
rating 5.0. Perfect for children’s room/nursery So adorable! Got the 16 inch almost wonder if I could have went with 12, it’s very large.

rating 5.0. Highly recommend! Great product. Well made. Arrived super fast (I don't even think I waited 48 hours from the time I ordered it), and excellent customer service! It does not come with hardware or hanging holes on the back and I haven't figured out how I will hang it so it sits flush to the wall. Other than that I am very pleased!
rating 5.0. Perfect for children’s room/nursery So adorable! Got the 16 inch almost wonder if I could have went with 12, it’s very large.

rating 5.0. Beautiful. I cannot say one negative thing about this product or the ordering and shipping process. The quality is fantastic and every letter in my daughters name came out beautifully. We ordered the 16" in bare wood. The product was layered and wrapped in tons of cardboard and marked as "extremely fragile, do not drop". My first thought when I saw this was "dang it's going to be flimsy", but I was wrong. It's a decently thick cut and you can tell the product was handled with care. It shipped and arrived according to the standard shipping we paid for. I will be ordering another in a different font for my sons room. I would recommend this product.

rating 4.0. Worth it! I loved how the name turned out! It arrived it a fairly quickly time frame. The only issue we had is that the wood started to separate in two spots. We used a heavy duty glue and some clamps to fix. Once it dried it looked as good as new. Definitely recommend spray painting like the instructions suggested. To hang we just used adhesive tape on the back side of the name.

rating 4.0. Love this! Love this!! Seemed smaller than expected but overall I love it. I bought the unpainted one and am choosing to paint it on my own since I didn't want to pay extra for it to be painted. It looks adorable above my daughters crib though!

rating 5.0. Perfect touch I love this sign! It was exactly what we were looking for to put over the dresser. I went with the 16 inch letters and spray painted it myself a glossy white. I love how it turned out!
rating 5.0. Love this!! Love!  Very well made!  Super fast process and ship time!

rating 5.0. Beautiful piece, exactly as described I ordered the 42" long option, unpainted. It is exactly 42" from the curl of the A to the tail of the N. rating 5.0. You can spray paint it yourself Did the size 36" for my newborns nursery, but instead of having it painted (reviews mentioned the paint not drying and sticking to the paper it came wrapped in, and I didn't want to take any chances) I got it in natural form and purchased spray paint for home depot. Best move ever! Also, where the A's are located we nailed within and hung it that way, so the wood isn't destroyed and can be moved if needed. The dot for the letter I was hung with the picture adhesive that's easy to peel off.
All in all its it's a beautiful piece of wood, nice quality, easy delivery, and well built to last. I will purchase again in the near future.

rating 5.0. Simply Gorgeous The final product arrived a whole week earlier than expected, so that was a pleasant surprise. I ordered the 16x20" and it's the perfect size. I think anything small and you would have to squint to see the stars and constellations. This was a gift for an employee and she absolutely loved the idea and the novelty of it. We purchased a frame from Michaels (dark grayish) to match with the black and white color scheme of the print. The star map itself had a slight bluish gradation to mimic the starry night, which is a beautiful effect. Seller also included an extra print because I wasn't clear if it was 2 names or 1 full name, so that was very sweet. It was one name, but my employee's SO is a graphic artist, so she will see if he can do some magic to blend in the ampersand. Overall, highly recommend product and Seller.

rating 5.0. If I could give more than 5 stars I would! If you are debating getting this at all, you should stop the debate and go on ahead and get this. I put mine in a cheap black frame and it still looks amazing. The quality of print is fantastic and the price is on point for the quality (I say this because I have a tendency to be cheap and debated if I could make it myself, ultimately deciding to just order it and I'm glad I did). The customer service is great! When it asks for a location and be specific as possible, I used Google earth to get exact coordinates and typed that in, but how you would type it in for Google maps instead of in the N,W style. Imagine my surprise when I open the package and there is a note saying they weren't sure if I wanted the coordinates printed my way or their normal way, so they included a print of both (rather than wasting precious time trying to contact me to figure it out which would have delayed the order). And the cherry on top is that they shipped using UPS so I didn't have to worry about USPS bending it or messing it up somehow, although I will say it is packed well enough that even USPS might have a hard time messing it up.

To make a long review short: get it!

rating 5.0. Fantastic customer service! I bought this for my husband as an anniversary gift. Much to my surprise it was on my doorstep ON OUR ANNIVERSARY and it was more perfect than I could have hoped for. They even wrote the sweetest note and circled the date that was printed on it. I was truly having a rough day and this seller restored my faith in humanity. They did not need to do what they did. They did so out of the kindness of their hearts. And it being as amazing as it was was just another cherry on top. It even had the coordinates to where we first met and he was blown away when he saw that. If you’re contemplating getting this, do it. You won’t be sorry.

rating 5.0. Beautifully Significant! Perfect Gift! I purchased one of these necklaces just to see the quality before ordering more. I received it quickly and just in time to gift it to my principal for Principal’s Day. She loved it! I did, too, so I ordered 3 more to gift at the end of the year to the teachers my kids had this year. I wrote a note to go with it about how amazing the dandelion is. It is one of the only plants that all parts can be used: root, stem, and flower. It has been used medicinally. During WWII Japan controlled 90% of the rubber supply. Scientists found that they could make a latex using the white substance in the dandelion stem. This dramatically helped our efforts in the war. People used to routinely plant dandelions rather than grass in the yard because it was useful, rather than grass that was just for looks. Practicality over aesthetics.
To sum up, this necklace with the pretty pearl (even more significance in a pearl that is produced from hardship in an oyster) is a fantastic gift. The meaning behind the dandelion flower (I didn’t even go into how it symbolizes the earth, moon, and stars or wishing when blowing), makes it even more special.
I’m glad I found this on Amazon. I’m sure I will be purchasing more!

The colors are neither too boyish nor too girly, which is what I needed since the decor needs to be suitable for both. They’re very easy to position and reposition, and no one can believe they are just decals. I’ve not had a single one fall off and I get many compliments. I very highly recommend these!
rating 5.0. Beautiful and good quality! These are great! I really wanted to add to my playroom and these are perfect! They stick so nicely and are easy to remove! Beautiful colors too!

rating 2.0. Looks great but does not stick well The colors were great, size was accurate, and they look just as pictured.  My concern is after a month they begun to peel.  I can stick them back down but it’s only temporary.  Being transparent, my walls have the orange peel texture so it’s not a completely flat surface.  Cute but I won’t buy again.  In fact I’m looking for new ones made with a different material hoping they stick better.

rating 3.0. Not great for textured walls They’re just okay. I have standard textured walls and when I started applying these circles I was really excited because they are good quality and seemed to stick to my walls perfectly.. when I was done I saw about 1/4 of them already lifting. I had my husband really “rub” them into the wall. When I woke up the next morning seemed like the same ones were lifting again. Most of them are sticking great but for $20, if I have to buy another pack just to replace the ones I lose along the way, it’s not worth it. I could do almost my entire playroom wall. My ceilings are extremely high, 12ft I’d say, I did about a 10x12 foot area but definitely need about 6-7 more to “finish” not enough to spend $20 on a whole other set.. we will see how they hold up. If they don’t last more than 6 months I’ll update. But I already know I’ll have to come in here daily to restick lifting ones
rating 1.0. Wanted to love, but waso I would have loved these, if they hadn't shorted me several sheets of decals.
rating 5.0. Perfect for my daughters playroom! These are adorable and so easy to use!
rating 5.0. Great I love it! Easy to stick, looks great!
rating 5.0. LOVE! LOVE LOVE LOVE these! We installed them on the playroom wall (white paint, smooth surface). They were very easy to apply and have held up without any issues.

rating 5.0. An easy pop of color So easy to use and they stick so well! I didn’t want to use the black color included. I did order 2 packages so I could have more colors. This wall is a little less than one full pack not including the black dots. So fun!

rating 5.0. Must have for easy decorating! I wanted to add some color to our playroom, but didn't want to leave nail holes or deal with finding things to hang up. These decals are perfect, easy to put up, and covered this wall nicely! So far they have stayed put- one or two I have had to press on the edge for a moment to stick it back down but then it's fine.

rating 5.0. Love Them! I got these to do an accent wall in our playroom, and I just love how they came out. I like that they are not perfect circles, which gave me more freedom to have mistakes in the pattern I placed them in. Instead of measuring them out into a perfect pattern, I divided all of the colors and placed them as random as possible. I had to move a few a couple of different times, and they came right off and re-stuck with no issues. I highly recommend!

rating 2.0. They’re ok I have bought a few decals from this shop and these are my least favorite. The dots are bigger than you would think, which is fine, but they have almost like a construction paper cutout type look. It’s hard to describe. May be exactly what other are looking for, but not my fave. They are super easy to install though and stick very well.

rating 4.0. This is a beautiful piece. I can't wait to give it to ... This is a beautiful piece. I can't wait to give it to my sister who is very hard to buy for. rating 5.0. I thought it was so beautiful. Update.

I get sI many compliments. I must wear my glasses around my neck for my job and I barely notice the chain on my neck. I wish you made bracelets or watched, because I would definitely buy.

rating 5.0. Abalone pearl eyeglass chain Love this chain for my glasses. It's beautiful, comfortable on my neck great workmanship all around.. I will order more of these.

rating 5.0. Don't Delay, Buy One Today! I'm far sided, so whenever I need to look at something up close, I need to grab my glasses. This chain gives my glasses some style ... and I totally love abalone! Good craftsmanship and use of color.

This eyeglass chain is absolutely gorgeous and obviously great care was taken to make it just right and now I can consider it a piece of jewelry - and a very beautiful piece at that. Thank you very very much!

input:
rating 5.0. Nice little rings I ordered three of these rings. They appear to be of good quality silver and I love the simple hammered design. A 5 1/4 fits my ring finger perfectly so I could wear a 5 or a 5 1/5. Its sometimes hard to get half sizes in silver rings so I really appreciate that this seller offers that. I ordered them in a 5 1/2 because this style of ring often runs a little small but they are actually true to size. The are very comfortable to wear but my only concern is that they are extremely dainty and thin. I'm almost afraid they might bend easily with daily wear. Other than that I really like them. I just hope that they wear well.

*****UPDATE*****
I've been wearing them almost daily since I received them and they are surprisingly strong for their size. They have no changed color in any way or tarnished. I've had no problems with them. They're good quality and so comfortable that I almost forget I have them on. I love them so much that I'm considering buying more to stack on my middle finger as well. They're just beautifully made rings. Very happy with them.

rating 5.0. Love the rings, problem with shipping/order I absolutely love my rings.  I first ordered a silver ring and then ordered a rose gold and gold one. The only negative comment I have is that I had to place two different orders for the gold and rose gold and was charged shipping for both yet I received 1 box with two rings in it. I don't think I should have been charged for two shipping rates since they shipped it in one box and I don't like the fact that they assumed that both rings were for me,  they very well could have been ordered as gifts, so two ring boxes in that case would have been nice. But over all the rings are gorgeous and fit perfectly.
rating 5.0. Great Stacking Rings Just what I wanted!  These are thin and shiny and stack around my Solitaire just perfectly! Very happy I purchased these!

rating 5.0. Sturdy, beautiful and delicate but STRONG! These bands are SOOOOO comfortable. I bought them in every color. I wear a size 8 and they fit perfectly. I suggest you buy a set of AT LEAST 6.
For me, 8 looks the best. Reasonably priced even though they look thin...they are sturdy!

rating 5.0. Beautiful!! They came really quick and the seller ... Beautiful!! They came really quick and the seller was awesome when I had questions. I'm so happy with how they came out. I've gotten many compliments on how lovely they are.

rating 5.0. GREAT PRODUCT AND SERVICE I am into stacked rings and these are perfect for stacking.  The hammered finish is different.  Being only 1mm wide, they are not bulky and I am able to wear the three stack rings with two of my small solitaire pieces. Definitely 5 stars and 2 thumbs up.

rating 4.0. Nice rings! Beautiful rings!  I'm really happy with them. They work well with my other rings and when stacked with other things I can change the look of my rings to match my mood. They also look fun all together by themselves. A nice unique look. They are not sterling silver, but you cannot tell, they look great with my gold and silver jewelry.

rating 5.0. Most stacking rings look like parts from a piece of machinery The photographs of these rings cannot do them justice: they are exquisite and super-fine to both the eyes and the fingers. Most stacking rings look like parts from a piece of machinery. These rings are so bright, delicate, (sturdy, too), faceted from the hammering, and simply beautiful enough to wear even as singles. The whole exchange with these artisans was a pleasure. Very rapid delivery for custom work. Could not be more pleased nor more highly recommend.
rating 1.0. One Star These are not worth the money they are charging.
rating 5.0. Beautiful and Strong Exactly as pictured and described. The rings are beautiful and strong even though they are thin. They are very  comfortable to wear everyday. The sizing is true.

rating 5.0. Unique but impressive They are so delicate but amazing.  They look exactly as pictured.  I had gotten gold ones and loved them so decided to get a set of silver and rose gold to mix it up.  They haven't bent or damaged.  I do take them off at night and when I clean.  They exceeded expectations
rating 4.0. Four Stars I loved these but after few months they turned black. Im a lite disappointed

rating 5.0. Fit was perfect! Packaging was exceptional! I used these rings as ring guards, but they would work just as well individually.  They were absolutely as described and fit just perfectly.  The package was extra pretty.  Perfect for gift-giving.  I would definitely recommend these rings.
rating 5.0. Beautiful, delicate looking but super sturdy! Beautiful craftsmanship. These are even sturdier than I expected. I’ve gotten many compliments on these, will buy from again!

rating 5.0. dainty, beautiful rings i ordered two of these, and two in rose gold.  i usually wear one of each color together, on my middle or pointer fingers.  these are really pretty, dainty rings.  they stack well together, or look great by themselves too.  because of the hammered finish, they appear sparkly.  i would highly recommend these rings.
rating 5.0. Quality craftsmanship! Very durable and no tarnish after 3 years. Has held up awesome with continuous wear!

rating 5.0. Beautiful Beautiful! I got one each of the silver, gold and rose gold and wear them together. Looks great and they’re very comfy, I wear them all day! They’re very thin, but don’t seem bendy or cheap. I recommend these if you’re looking for a pretty, everyday dainty ring.

rating 5.0. Nice ring Faat shipping and very well packaged. I will ve ordering a full set. I just got one now as I wanted to see the quality of their ring and I have to say that I was impressed. The ring is very nice. Can't wait to get the full set.
rating 5.0. Perfect stackable rings Adorable packaging, beautiful product absolutely love!

rating 5.0. The best accent ring ever I ordered three of these in rose gold. One as an accent ring on my pointer finger or thumb on the same hand as my rose gold engagement ring and oh my goodness, they are PERFECTION! I wanted something subtle, wouldn’t take attention away from my wedding ring, but accent the rose gold and that is EXACTLY this ring!

I also bought one silver, one gold & one rose gold to wear on my right hand ring finger as well. They are seamless & timeless! I wash my hands wearing them & they are still 100% same as the day I first put them on!

Love these! Dainty but the perfect accent ring!

rating 4.0. Classy, stunning but very thin These rings are so stinkin' cute! The seller does a fabulous job. They are very thin and understated but in an elegant way. As long as you expect them to be on the thinner side and not flashy, I would highly recommend them!

current_product_reviews:
rating 5.0. Would I buy again? I already have! I bought six of these rings (total) months and months and months ago in two different sizes, and one by one I lost them all with so much sadness because I loved them so much! Until I lost the last one they were shiny, comfortable, no bends at all even though I do a LOT of crafting and have 2 toddlers, so these can really hold up!!!

So when I had a little extra cash recently I knew I wanted to replinish my set, and ordered another 6 (total), and then contacted the seller as the listing only went up to size 11, so they worked with me to do another order of 9 more (total) rings, including 3 at size 11.5...

These are seriously my favorite, I wear them anytime I go out, and now that I am pregnant and my wedding rings don't fit I wear 3 on my ring finger just at all times. I've worn them everyday since the order and my finger and rings still look new, no discoloration of the rings at all, or any green on my fingers.

I'm so happy with the product and the seller/maker, I will definitely be buying from them again, hopefully something new and not just more replacements for lost rings LOL

rating 5.0. Beautiful piece of work!! Absolutely in love with this! First, and as noted in the product information, it’s critical you measure your stove to ensure it will fit. The sizing on these is very standard. You have to measure based on the length and width of your grates. I measured mine several times to be sure and as expected, it fit perfectly. My grates even have a curvature to them on the front end so I made sure to measure them at their longest point. It’s exactly as it was described and it makes a WORLD of difference to the kitchen!! The grates on my stove are stained from time, and ugly looking to me, so this hides them beautifully and works as an extra counter spot to display or showcase pots and pans for decor. Highly recommend this for anyone!!

rating 1.0. Poor Customer Service This review focuses on customer service more so than the product. As received, the product appeared well made and very sturdy. The problem was it did not fit my stove. Do not be led to believe that these are in any way custom to your make and model, even though the seller asks for that information, implying that it will be made for your specific stove top. They do mention that the covers are made to certain dimensions (then why ask for the make and model?) which is somewhat contradictory and I made the wrong assumption. They would only offer that if I send it back, they MAY refund me 60% of the cost. This, in my opinion, is unacceptable. As is, the cover sitting on top of the burner grates, looks awful. I am fortunate to have a husband who assures me, he can modify it to make it useable, but I am extremely disappointed in the seller's attitude regarding the problem and refund. If they are not custom, the item could have been easily resold at no loss, especially since I ordered it unfinished with no personalized additions to it.  Be very careful if ordering from these people.

rating 5.0. Definitely worth the money! [[VIDEOID:b6f844795eebc6f8e39ed54ea1ae2695]] This product is amazing!  It is very well made and definitely worth the money!  I got it in Special Walnut and it matches my kitchen perfectly!  Highly recommend!

rating 1.0. Stains I thought long and hard on spending 200 dollars for this stove cover. I liked the idea of extra counter space so I went for it. The very first day I put something from the microwave on it and it stained from oil drips. I reached out to the company. They told me the cover is decorative only. It does not say that anywhere in the description. Since I was not offered to return it I decided to sand and apply the proper finish myself. All would have been fine except this product is not real wood as the description leads you to believe. It is veneer on fiberboard which is also why it so heavy as other reviews has mentioned. I reached out to the company again with my new situation. Their response "This description denotes shelves, which we do create in solid wood; however, the stove top covers are solid wood on the sides with a veneer top. Because you've already noted the item is not in original condition (used, stained) we are unable to accept this item back, as you can understand."
Well I do not understand, I wasn't buying shelves so the description should describe what they were actually selling.
If I had known it was not solid wood I would not have purchased. I have since put in a complaint to Amazon to investigate. If it had been solid wood I would have sanded and resealed and all would be good. And if the finish had been correct it would not have stained.
UPDATE. A+ for Amazon. They refunded my money.

rating 5.0. I was looking for nice quality bows that were durable to withstand the elements ... I was looking for nice quality bows that were durable to withstand the elements outdoors, and because I needed 12 of them, I wanted to find something reasonable that wouldn't break the bank either. I found these and it was nice they came in a 12 pack. They were thoughtfully packaged. In fact, I kept the box it came in so that I could reuse it for storage. They made sure they were packed in that they would not get flattened or smashed in the process, which was nice. Nice, long wire to attach them. I was afraid after one heck of a wind storm we had with gusts of over 40 mph that I may of ended up losing one or some, but they all stood strong and not a single one looked out of place after the storm was over. The size was right for what I needed too. Thanks again!

rating 5.0. Well worth it! I was a bit scared because I bought quite a few of these, but once they arrived, all worry was gone. They are beautifully done, very full and sturdy. George was very responsive and great to work with.

rating 5.0. Stunning. Perfect bows. I just love them so much. Even the wire on the back is generous enough that hanging is very easy. rating 5.0. High quality, beautifully made bows These bows are incredibly well put together.  They look beautiful in my home and clearly crafted and packaged with pride.  I am quite frankly amazed to find something handmade and of such high quality online.  They are also shipped with such care - each bow is attached to a card and the card is then velcroed to the box (we saved the box and will use it to store the bows after the holidays). When I think of what it would have taken me to make these bows - go to a craft store, figure out what ribbon to buy, try to assemble bows, get frustrated, cut myself, get more frustrated, realize I did not buy enough ribbon, head back to the craft store...  They are worth every penny.

rating 5.0. BEAUTIFUL and worth the investment... I was hosting a Christmas party and wanted to go the extra mile with decorating.  These magnificent bows were the PERFECT addition.  They come expertly packed and are so easy to place wherever you need them.  The rich, vibrant color was so breathtaking and I received many compliments from my guests.  I ordered a dozen of them and placed them on the railings of my banister.  They looked like I had spent hours making home made bows to decorate but shhhh...I'll never tell...thank you for making such a high quality and beautiful bow.  It was PERFECT!!!

rating 5.0. QUALITY!!!! Purchased these beautiful bows November 2017. Thought someone would like to see a review from a buyer that has used the bows for a couple years. Have been proud to decorate with them for two Christmas seasons and have just opened the box to use for another season, and I smiled 😊 I am not someone that will usually post a review. In this case, the makers have DEFINITELY earned my praise!! The bows are gorgeous, and well made using quality ribbon. They have retained their beauty after an unusually early and unexpected heavy snow within just a few days of placing them the first year, followed by rain, and then a lot of direct sun during the two holiday seasons I have used them . I live in Alabama and we have a variety of weather from November to January. It can be all four seasons during this time of year . I use the box they were delivered in for storing them. They were secured well for shipping with velcro tabs to prevent shifting around that would cause wrinkles. I was extremely impressed with the care this company provided to make sure you received the quality they presented in their description!!! Quality and customer service is very rare these days and they deserve to have that acknowledged!! Thank you for your beautiful craftsmanship and care with shipping!!
MERRY CHRISTMAS!! 😊

rating 5.0. Stunning Pleasure I litterally just opened these and I am in love.
They are simply stunning. They are the perfect extroverted style for my introverted personality. They are eye catching without being over the top, extremely light weight (so much so that you easily forget that you are wearing anything) and very comfortable.

Normally my daily go to are huggie style earrings. But, I can see me now switching my routine up with these... i.e. work, errands or nights outs in an updo, pony or other these will work.

Only cons are that they seem easy to bend and that they will not stand up to sleeping in them nightly (as I do with my earrings or I will forget to wear any the next day)

Also, they are a little tricky putting them on so that the swirls in matching or complementary directions but this may just be a concern for just me.

For most people, I feel like these would be best for a second piercing. For me, however, these work perfectly as everyday earrings. The backing stays on really well (I've gone swimming twice with them and they've stayed on the entire time) and I am absolutely in love with these earrings. I also have sensitive ears and even a lot of sterling silver earrings irritate my ears. However, that was not the case with these. My ears haven't been irritated at all. Would definitely recommend to a friend.

rating 5.0. Perfect! I ordered the 3mm opal and sliver stud earrings. I recieved them earlier than expected and they are perfect! It's hard to find such tiny studs that are this meticulously made, and for such a great price. It's obvious this artist takes great pride in perfecting her creations. Tiny and flawlessly crafted, I am in love with them. In response to customers complaining about tarnishing; silver tarnishes. Especially if you wear the jewelry daily and it's exposed to soaps or cosmetics. It does not mean the silver isn't real or of a lesser quality. Another factor in sliver tarnishing is your body's ph. A more acidic ph will cause faster tarnishing. I'll definitely be adding to my collection of little treasures from this shop in the future!

rating 5.0. I bought 3 of these I initially bought these for my second lobe piercing so I didn't have to deal with sharp piercings poking me in the head all night. I loved them so much that I bought a second pair for my other lobe hole. And when I got my cartilages pierced this year, I went back and bought a third set so I could completely match. I did wait until the piercer suggested I swap them out but once that time limit was up, my ears adjusted to these very quickly. The metal is good quality and doesn't rust and isn't affected by chlorine (I swim at my gym every few days). They are pretty easy to get on and off but I don't take them on or off often. The closure part does make its way to the front and is visible sometimes. But it isn't ugly and could be seen as an interesting knot shape if you choose to see it like that. I recommend these to anyone looking for earrings to wear all day every day.

I say if you feel like you are in need of a push to get you to where you need to be, moldivite could help you, just be mindful that it won’t be easy.

rating 5.0. Where Has this Been All My Life!? The presentation of "Chill Out" Relaxation Blend Roll-On Essential Oil is brilliant! Once you open the package, you can see how much Maddie, the EO Crafter, truly cares about what she makes, how it looks, and YOU! Beautiful presentation, thoughtfully done! "Chill Out" is a phenomenal scent. I applied it to  my inner wrists, my temples, and my lower neck (so the scent could waft up when I inhaled.) This is a great EO blend that melts into your skin beautifully with no mess after application. Some roller ball applicator bottles release far too much product, but this one does not. It allows you to apply the blended oil conservatively, assisting you in the need to apply without overdoing it. The scent is a soft, peaceful one; It does not assault you! Its perfect in strength, not cloying - but absolutely present and accounted for. I have severe anxiety disorder, and some days are fairly hard to get through. I'm not saying that "Chill Out" essential oil blend takes anxiety away. I can say that the scent dials down some of the feelings of tension, irritability, etc that I experience, and helps bring me back to a place that's more centered and calm. I wish that the scent was a little longer lasting, but this is truly not a deal-breaker! I will continue to buy this blend from Maddie. I like it enough that I want to have a bottle to keep in the house and another to keep in my handbag for assuring comfort when I'm out and about. Thank you, Maddie, for making such a terrific, quality product!

rating 3.0. A Tad Bit Misleading I bought this because I thought it would smell like coconut - since the picture on the label is a coconut.
It does not smell like coconut at all.
It’s not bad and it’s a great blend that works for relaxation - just not what I was expecting scent-wise. Because of that, I’m a little disappointed. In all fairness to the maker, the product lists coconut carrier oil LAST with *multiple* oils listed before it in the ingredients section. Just make sure to read the ingredients I guess. The other oils in this seem to overpower any coconut that might be in it and I was excited thinking this would smell like coconut. No harm, no foul. Just not “coconutty.”

rating 4.0. Soooo super cute!  Just wish it came in a tropical scent! :-) This essential oils roll-on is adorable in its packaging. Underneath, the roll-on is also wrapped with a cute “handmade with love” labeled brown paper wrap.  This company’s owner sure does know how to impress in presentation!  Unfortunately, the scent is just not for me.  From the picture of coconut halves on the actual product label, I thought for sure this roll-on would bring relaxing thoughts of a serene, tropical paradise to mind.  However, there is not a bit of coconut smell in it at all... which I was hoping for.  Any tropical scent makes me feel like I am on vacation on a Hawaiian island and that’s what I was truly looking forward to in this product.  If only this company made other scents... input: rating 5.0. Tumbler is functional and stylish! Ok so I paid a little extra for the sparkly rose gold monogram and I love it!  Overall impression- terrific!  This tumbler is slim and fits well in my hand. The matte finish is nice against the rose gold. The finish is very smooth but I don’t feel like the tumbler will slip out of my hand. The lid Fits tightly which is nice for keeping beverages at the desired temperature. The straw is made of a heavier material so as long as I don’t lose it, it should last for a long time. This tumbler seems more expensive than it actually was. I’ll test this out for about a month to see how the monogram holds up. If it lasts I’ll order more as Christmas gifts for my staff. Thank you to whoever made such a cute product. I’m very pleased so far!

rating 5.0. Skeptic turned believer Edit: picture is from 7/29/19

I love this pendant. The rope necklace that it came on is hit and miss, but almost a month later I still wear it all day every day and sleep with it close by.
Extremely utilitarian and comes with a very endearing message from the artist herself.

To be clear, I am a skeptic by nature and require evidence before I can adhere to any particular thought pattern.
That being said, this pendant feels like it was lovingly, precisely crafted and makes a huge difference in my life. You can say what you like about Reich's philosophies, but if you really dissect them, he had some good points. And here is the proof; Yet another fantastic creation spawned out of his revolutionary ideas.
It does not hurt that it seems to be somehow indestructable AND beautiful
Bravo

rating 5.0. Beautiful piece and truly works! I wear this necklace quite often. I love that it does make me feel better. One thing I did notice though, if I ever wear the Tesla coil side to my skin, it gets very warm. My friend has one as well, and she has noticed it, too. I believe we are both highly sensitive though, because my husband has one and hasn't noticed a thing. I wasn't looking for this, but had put the necklace on, and started to feel warm, flipped it over, and didn't feel the heat any longer. Another day put the necklace on without checking the side, and felt the warmth. Sure enough, coil side was down. It works!

current_product_reviews:
rating 2.0. Pretty but impractical The craftsmanship is beautiful, but unfortunately several small yet important details were not well thought out.

1) CON: The Latch
I had a similar case before that came with a snap and a more slender strap, which is ideal. The snap on the other version was easy to open and close, even without looking (plus it worked to snap the cover open), but this latch is harder to use. In addition, the latch sticks out and catches on pockets, making it very difficult to get the phone out of a pocket.

2) CON: The Strap
The strap is too short, so the latch on this version does not hook when the wallet side of the case has cards and cash. Also, the strap is so wide it pushes a person’s finger up to where the finger covers the bottom lens of the camera on newer iPhones.

3) CON: Phone Shell
While I love that the shell is a soft silicone, I was disappointed to see it is glued in to the case, not sewn in.

4) PRO: Holes for wrist strap
There is a metal ring on top as well as one on the bottom, giving flexibility for how the wrist strap is latched.

Overall, this is fantastic quality genuine leather but is too poorly designed to be worth purchasing.
other_product_reviews:
rating 5.0. Quality workmanship I am still impressed with the quality of this case after using it daily for five years!

At first the leather was stiff, but it softened over time. The strap with the snap was sturdy and held up to heavy use. I liked that the strap could be used to keep the cover open or closed.
The stitching held up well. One corner began to come undone after five years, but the rest has stayed sturdy.

I was able to fit a license, credit & insurance cards, as well as cash in the wallet side and still snap the cover closed.

This case is well worth the price.

rating 5.0. Nothing to complain..perfect buy!! I waited a few days before writing the review. I ve been wearing this ring for about 5 days now(in the shower, cleaning, sleeping, doing dishes). I have no doubt that it is sterling silver and it won’t turn your finger green, unless maybe you have an allergy to silver. It scratched a bit but no more than my normal 14k rings would. Now...about the design...it’s a 6mm plain band with a decent thickness. The purpose of this ring it’s the inscription. If it’s not about the inscription you may not like it. I’ve seen reviews where people didn’t like the design, that is why I am mentioning this. For me it’s all about the inscription and that, came out beautiful. Much better than expected. Size wise ...I think it may run a bit small. Maybe half a size.
I love it and I would recommend it to anyone as a gift or for themselves. The seller is great too!! 😬

rating 5.0. Too Cute My son read polar express in class and he asked Santa for a bell from the reindeer this year.
Mind you, he asked for it the week of Christmas. So whom ever you are that creates these THANK YOU.
It came in the day before X-Mass.
This was the gift hidden in the tree and he opened it last, his face lit up was so much joy. Hes a 7 year old kid who is in to so many boy things and this is the last of his little kid childhood we will be seeing. Needless to say it was so impactful to us.
He was astonished to see a golden ticket and the placement card for what row, and deer the bell was from.
Show and tell to his class was like Christmas all over again. His teacher (this is during COVID) allowed them to do a show and tell on their zoom class call. She was touched that their story had reached him. The detail on the gift was just enough to bring 14 Kindergarteners on tablets to their full attention. Santa Sleigh Bell made such an impact on us. THANK YOU

rating 5.0. Highly Recommend this brand This smell I would describe as woodsy with a twitch of men’s cologne but not overwhelming. I wish I would just get the smell of wood without the extra, but I’m not sure it’s possible. The smell is strong and throws just enough. I don’t like to be overpowered by scent, I like to walk in and say “something smells good, but I’m not quite sure where it’s coming from”. If you Melt several you’d get a huge throw of smell for sure. I was surprised to read someone say it smelled like nothing. These waxes are so potent I have to bag them. I really love this company out of all wax melts I’ve tried in the past. I will be purchasing more of them. I’d only suggest they add the scents over and under tones like a perfume lists them so I’d have a better idea. This is a beautiful masculine smell that I mixed with leather and coffee melts and it creates a very rich delicious smell in my home.

rating 5.0. Perfect for Daddy's Girl. With custom engraving, this bracelet becomes a treasured keepsake. I chose to put my daughter's name on the front and "Daddy's Girl" on the back. No matter how it wears over time, my daughter will value this gift long after I'm gone. She is 23 years old, but I could see this gift as perfect for most any age. I am considering one for my 5-year-old granddaughter.

Thanks in part to the packaging, this bracelet gives the impression of class and charm - not the cheap fragile feeling I feared from such a well-priced dainty-looking gift. Dainty-looking is perfect for my daughter, as she would never wear heavy chains. Fortunately the actual sturdiness is much stronger than the dainty appearance suggests.

Final thought: God bless this seller for engraving and shipping so quickly. This bracelet was a last-minute gift idea just a few days before my daughter's birthday party. During the ordering process, there's a field where you can write a note to the seller. I explained the urgent need, and the gift arrived in time. Overall a perfect buying experience.

rating 5.0. Absolutely gorgeous! Beautiful.

The bracelet has a nice feel and weight to it. Super comfortable to wear - not too large or too small.
Now, I want to discuss the pendant. I love it. It is not super shiny. It has a beautiful natural look. The metal is beautifully decorated as well.
A common note reading the reviews was questioning the quality of the stones after seeing the pendant. I was sure it would be absolute garbage. NOT SO. Please note it has a matte finish that leaves it with the beautiful natural sheen. I can not wait to wear it on a chain!
TLDR: I love the bracelet AND the pendant!
Excuse me while I manifest my dream life, which includes being a top amazon reviewer! (Time to put my excessive covid-induces purchasing to use!)

rating 5.0. SUPER COMFORTABLE ALL DAY WEAR WITHOUT PAIN! Seriously.

I pierced my ears when I was 19 and they never healed, I just had problems from the start and eventually just stopped wearing earrings. After receiving metal screw type clip ons from my grandmother's collection I began to wear earrings again, but only for limited periods of time, like I'd stash them in my purse then quickly put them on before dinner, then as soon as the dinner was over, off they went and into my purse and my ears in such pain.

I tried magnetic earrings and they were better, but I still have to take them off after a few hours and again, a lot of pain after wearing them.

These invisible plastic findings are a miracle! Very comfortable, stable on my ear, and I can wear them all day without any pain or problems afterwards. I am SOLD!

I intend on purchasing more and more and wearing earrings again!

These came as described and arrived on time!

rating 5.0. Perfectly delicate This is exactly what I was looking for. The seller's size chart is accurate for which sizes fit each kind of piercing.

The 7 mm hoops work for my cartilage and 2nd lobe piercing. I haven't tried them in my 1st lobe piercing, but I think that'd be okay too.

They are very thin. The look is subtle. Some people may have been disappointed because they wanted an earring that looks a little bolder or catches the eye more easily.

So far, they don't bother my sensitive ears. They're easy to sleep in - most earrings in my cartilage bother me if I sleep on them. My 2nd lobe piercing, for whatever reason, usually has a very strong allergic reaction to most earrings, even though my 1st lobe and cartilage piercings do not. I am glad to have found earrings that don't cause this. (I will update if I do start to have a delayed reaction.)

I will almost certainly purchase more of these later. Love love love.

Great & Affordable Nose Ring/Hoop in hoops i wear size 7-8mm depending on the brand because some 7mm's are a tad bit to small and then some 8mm's are to big so it just depends on the brand, some aren't accurate. a month ago purchased this 7mm nose hoop and i literally didn't expect to love it like i do. not only does it fit perfect but the color hasn't turned at all either and i don't ever take it out. the one thing that almost made me no purchase it was the fact that it didn't have a closing clasp which i purchased another brand with the clasp and liked how that one was even though it was hard to line up and get opened and closed once in my nose so there's definitely some negatives to that which now that i've tried this one i actually like this one better because i was able to still close it myself it just doesn't have an actual clasp but i can still rotate it perfectly fine in my nose without feeling any discomfort. the other brand i purchased had weird sizing so i actually prefer this one now and am glad that i tried it. i will be ordering 1 or 2 more for backup, it's definitely worth it and the price is affordable! well done.

rating 5.0. Once I figured it out—amazing & clever earring Lightweight, comfortable, clever…great value in this ingenious little twist earring. I appreciate the gold fill quality.
Ok full disclosure: my first attempt at putting these in was a failure. I tried to force it.
Included in the lovely package were simple instructions and a reference to a video on Elisabeth’s Instagram. I stubbornly thought I could wing it and ended up frustrated through my own ignorance. She suggests you gently pull them apart—do this! Especially if you have a higher volume ear lobe like I do.
I bought the 5-6 mm size since I wanted a “lobe hugger”. I didn’t realize I have a little bigger ear lobes than average. The solution (once I wrestled them out of my piercing I had forced it through) was to gently pull the spirals further apart. Ta-da! Now I’m very happy with the fit and ease of using them. Highly recommend. I eventually want a third ear piercing but for now threading these through my 2nd piercing hole is satisfying the aesthetic I want. Love these so much. I’ve been recommending them to friends like crazy.

rating 5.0. Great earrings! I’ve wanted a double piercing for a while but haven’t wanted to go through the discomfort and possible infection! These are amazing earrings, which give the perfect illusion of a double piercing! Very lightweight, but durable.

rating 5.0. Perfect! Make sure they’re not backwards though! If you’re putting these on and the second loop is BELOW your piercing hole, you have the earrings backwards! Swap the right and left earrings and they will go in as they’re supposed to, with the second (“fake piercing”) loop sitting ABOVE your piercing.

That said, these are absolutely perfect. I love them! So beautiful, dainty, and comfortable. They 100% look like you have two piercings in your ears. Can’t recommend highly enough!

rating 5.0. Totally looks like two earrings! I LOVE these earrings! They’ve become my daily-wear earrings that I don’t have to take out to sleep, shower, etc., and they really do a great job of staying in place without the need for adjustments. rating 5.0. Stunning, affordable and the packaging is a wonderful surprise. These art deco style earrings are absolutely beautiful in so many ways. While the earrings are long, the design is glamourous with delicate lines and is not overdone. The silver metal is light on the earlobes and are secured with latch-style earwires. They look so lovely with your hair in an upsweep that displays them perfectly. I love how they sway above my shoulders.

The price is affordable and well worth it. And the most surprising part of these lovelies out of Hawaii is the packaging. They arrive boxed with a signed invoice from the designer and a photograph of a Hawaiian beach. A real photo. It's so very charming and altogether these would make a perfect gift if sent by mail.

There is more jewelry in the Hawaii Beads Jewelry catalogue that I am definitely going to check out. But these earring are now my new favorites.

rating 5.0. Compact, stable, and unobtrusive This works exactly like I wanted it to. I had been concerned it would tip if only one pair of glasses was on an arm, or if two glasses were hung on the same side. It doesn't. It's extremely stable, especially considering it is lightweight plastic. The glasses don't knock against each other when they hang. It's easy to get them on and off without knocking other pairs off. It keeps my three pairs of working glasses off the desktop, where they were constantly getting lost, or having something land on top of them. It takes up about as much space as a bottle of water. Simple but very useful.

It's extremely stable, especially considering it is lightweight plastic. The glasses don't knock against each other when they hang. It's easy to get them on and off without knocking other pairs off. It keeps my three pairs of working glasses off the desktop, where they were constantly getting lost, or having something land on top of them. It takes up about as much space as a bottle of water. Simple but very useful.

rating 1.0. Not worth the money. At any cost. This item was so fragile! It broke as I was removing it from the bubble wrap it came in! Why would a glasses stand be so fragile?! I returned it, which was a very easy process. Decided to use a ceramic jar instead to wrangle my reading glasses.

rating 2.0. Very flimsy I had high hopes for this product, I like the look of the design. I really wanted to like it. The problem is it’s made of an extremely lightweight material that causes it to tip over all the time. Taking glasses on and off it knock it off balance, lightly bumping against it causes it to tip. A simple solution would be a weighted base, which it doesn’t have. It is now broken since it tipped and crashed onto floor and broke apart. For the price, I would have been better buying a paper towel holder and sticky tape. Very disappointed, would not recommend buying. Gave it two stars instead one one since we did get a year worth of use out of ( even though it tipped all the time) before the final tipping broke it

It was shipped VERY quickly and got it within 2 days of ordering. Great product and great seller.

rating 1.0. My even bigger issue is that the necklace I received looks like it came from Clairs and couldn't possibly cost more ... Would give ZERO stars if i could.  Necklace broke immediately upon putting it on. No force was used as the customer service person tried to argue with me about.  I'm sorry but even if a little force was used (there truly wasn't) shouldn't a necklace be able to withstand that? What's the point if it's so poorly made it can't be slightly tugged On? My even bigger issue is that the necklace I received looks like it came from Clairs and couldn't possibly cost more than 10 bucks.  Seeing how I spent $50 with tax and shipping that's pretty dissapointing. Very flimsy, cheap, poorly made piece of crap.  Of course they refused a refund talking about how it's not defective because the links are oval it must have been pulled. They said they would replace it and I'm not going to bother because it's such a cheap looking necklace. Oh and be forwarned- REP TOLD ME THEY HAVE ONLY A 10 DAY RETURN POLICY!! Probably hoping that the cheap piece of junk won't break within 10 days. Who has a TEN DAY return policy? If that's not a red flag I don't know what is. If you look at the picture I posted you can see how thin and flimsy it is because the stamped letters sort of show on back side of the discs! Plus look at the chain! rating 5.0. Superb for ravaged sinuses I’ve been quite sick with a flu from hell and 3 weeks later still have ravaged sinuses and airway. I used Vick’s shower tabs which were fine but a little medicinal and a little expensive, found these babies for a fraction of the per use cost and they’re DIVINE. Love the fragrance, soothing experience for my dry and abused nasal and lung tissues...  and so grateful for the 2 freebie tabs that made this even more economic. So pleased, I’ll continue to use these into wellness because it makes for such an enjoyable shower.  The yellow/morning fragrance is not irritating for me as an allergy and asthma sufferer; recommend not placing directly into the path of your water spray because they will disintegrate way too fast - as indicated on the instructions.
rating 5.0. Great They smell great and last a few showers. Love them

rating 5.0. REALLY SOOTHING DURING THIS CHOTIC TIMES I wanted something to create some "happiness" during our 2.25 month stay at home order in Hawaii and I love the benefits of aromatherapy so I was happy to accidentally find these shower steamers on Amazon.  I understand that these are developed to "melt" in the shower but it's a fine line between the steam melting it vs too much water hitting it and it melts too quickly.  I've experimented with different ways to best use this product without having an entire square melt in a single shower and I've found that the best method it to put the square on a soap rack (metal rack that drains and dries) and sprinkle it with a little water and let the steam do the rest.  This way, I can stretch one cube to 3-4 showers!!!

rating 4.0. Good Bracelet and gift with a small gripe Being a big fan of gemstones and having studied many books on crystal healing, I can tell you that once I received both the bracelet and crystal charm gift, I can confirm you will feel a bit of an uplifting to your spirits and your stress will feel more relaxed and the negative energy you have felt for a good while will go away little by little. It is a real good feeling when wearing it. Along with the black Tourmaline crystal as the gift, you will feel more grounded to earth.

My only gripe however is that even though the elastic band that hold the beads stretches, I'm thinking one more stone would make this a little more looser, as my wrists are a bit big. It doesn't hurt nor injure me in any way but a bit of a overall length adjustment couldn't hurt much for men and women.

Overall 4 outta 5. Might get other bracelets later, but this is a good seller and quick on delivery.

rating 5.0. Lovely and affordable piece for those who can appreciate tone n textures  of a nature/camping print I bought this for my dad for Father's Day.
