I believe it's watercolor, but it's very rich in pigment. Not very detailed but that works with style. The choice of colors are particularly special as they are the tones of a deep, rich pine forest, a smoldering charcoal as well as the glow of the campfire. It's a great piece for one who enjoys the tone and texture of watercolor. The nature, camping theme is just perfect. I plan on buying the complete set for him.

rating 3.0. I love the idea of the necklace I love the idea of the necklace.  I bought two, one for my mother and one for my mother in law.  The chain itself is kind of flimsy. One thing that I would want anyone thinking about purchasing one to know is that the in the font used the letter K turns out looking like an N.  The letters used are all lower case.  I called the company to try to get some help with this as one of the names used looked misspelled because of this.  I did not receive a call back.  I did hear from them via email, but it was too late to do anything about it, as it was already a couple of days till Christmas.  I just gave it and explained that the letter that looks like an N is meant to be a K...

I read other reviews that said the “K” was not recognizable, but saw no pictures to go along with it. Maybe the seller changed this in the font because I see no problem on mine.
The metal is lightweight, but I wouldn’t want a heavy necklace anyways. Printing is beautiful and clear, and I ordered the short length chain which I am really happy with. Lays right inside neckbone area.
Can’t say enough about it...I love it for myself. Has my 3 kids’ names on it.

rating 5.0. Lovely and affordable piece for those who can appreciate tone n textures  of a nature/camping print I bought this for my dad for Father's Day. It was perfect because of the camping element, a favorite pastime. He loved it. As for the quality, I studied fine arts in college. Was impressed with the quality of the print. I believe it's watercolor, but it's very rich in pigment. Not very detailed but that works with style. The choice of colors are particularly special as they are the tones of a deep, rich pine forest, a smoldering charcoal as well as the glow of the campfire. It's a great piece for one who enjoys the tone and texture of watercolor. The nature, camping theme is just perfect. I plan on buying the complete set for him.

rating 5.0. healed ears! These turned out better than expected! I have had metal sensitivity issues since I was little myself, and so I was hesitant to let my daughter pierce her ears to begin with because I knew what she was possibly going to face. Sure enough she had the metal sensitivity that came with 5 plus months of her ears just never wanting to completely heal over. A friend mentioned plastic earings to me and a quick search on Amazon led me to these. First night in and her ears had zero drainage, zero redness, zero reaction. We simply made sure the clean the plastic earings first with her ear cleaning solution, and cleaned her ears before putting them in and they haven't left her ears since. We have had them in for 6 days now and cleaned them 2x a day with the same solution that came from the shop where she got them pierced and they look great. Highly highly recommended for sensitive ears. Will definitely be ordering more. Age of my daughter is 6 1/2 almost 7 if that is helpful to anyone :)

rating 5.0. Cute and well made. Tiny studs like this are perfect for multiple ear piercings, I'm happy there are folks out there who make them at all, much less this well.

This is me being a nerdy gardener, but I wouldn't call them cherry blossoms. They're more of a buttercup, cinquefoil, or single/wild rose; maybe you could pretend they look like plum blossoms if you squint hard.

They're cast incredibly well though, the earrings are cute and highly detailed, and are neatly polished with no ugly seams or pits. The posted photos are completely accurate and represent exactly what you get. The packaging is both cute (very giftable) and protects the earrings perfectly during shipping. In this case, the price accurately reflects the quality and attention to detail. If all their jewelry is this well made, they've got themselves a repeat customer.

rating 5.0. Absolutely gorgeous! Beautiful.

A common note reading the reviews was questioning the quality of the stones after seeing the pendant. I was sure it would be absolute garbage. NOT SO. Please note it has a matte finish that leaves it with the beautiful natural sheen. I can not wait to wear it on a chain!

rating 5.0. Where Has this Been All My Life!? The presentation of "Chill Out" Relaxation Blend Roll-On Essential Oil is brilliant! Once you open the package, you can see how much Maddie, the EO Crafter, truly cares about what she makes, how it looks, and YOU! Beautiful presentation, thoughtfully done! "Chill Out" is a phenomenal scent. I applied it to  my inner wrists, my temples, and my lower neck (so the scent could waft up when I inhaled.) This is a great EO blend that melts into your skin beautifully with no mess after application. Some roller ball applicator bottles release far too much product, but this one does not. It allows you to apply the blended oil conservatively, assisting you in the need to apply without overdoing it. The scent is a soft, peaceful one; It does not assault you! Its perfect in strength, not cloying - but absolutely present and accounted for. I have severe anxiety disorder, and some days are fairly hard to get through. I'm not saying that "Chill Out" essential oil blend takes anxiety away. I can say that the scent dials down some of the feelings of tension, irritability, etc that I experience, and helps bring me back to a place that's more centered and calm. I wish that the scent was a little longer lasting, but this is truly not a deal-breaker! I will continue to buy this blend from Maddie. I like it enough that I want to have a bottle to keep in the house and another to keep in my handbag for assuring comfort when I'm out and about. Thank you, Maddie, for making such a terrific, quality product!

Unfortunately, the scent is just not for me.  From the picture of coconut halves on the actual product label, I thought for sure this roll-on would bring relaxing thoughts of a serene, tropical paradise to mind. Any tropical scent makes me feel like I am on vacation on a Hawaiian island and that’s what I was truly looking forward to in this product.  If only this company made other scents... I would find this as a cute gift to give out as part of a larger package or stocking stuffer during Xmas time. input:
rating 5.0. Gorgeous...Better In Person...Don’t Hesitate UPDATE: I wrote a glowing review for this ring when I purchased it in 2/19. It is now 5/27/22. I wear this ring often & regularly receive compliments on it. I’m not hard on my jewelry; but, I don’t baby this ring either. The stones are as beautiful today as they were when I received the ring. The setting has never loosened. I always check the settings on my jewelry prior to wearing it. The stones remain secure. The silver has not tarnished. I hope this update, which I am writing almost 3 1/2 years after the original review, puts any doubts you may have about purchasing this ring to rest. I still love this ring.
ORIGINAL REVIEW: This is my first moonstone & labradorite ring. It is stunning. The setting is about 1 inch long. The band is not flimsy & fits quite comfortably. The stones are beautiful w/ lots of reflectivity when the light hits them. The stone colors are rich w/ no muddiness. The color changes as the light hits the stones. I ordered a size 9 for my index finger; but, can also wear it on my middle finger. It would work on your ring finger too, not too big. I wouldn’t recommend this for a pinky ring. My fingers are average, not long or short. Hope this helps you determine which finger you want to wear this on. The sizing is spot on. I have my own ring sizer & checked it. It took a couple of weeks to arrive; but, still came sooner than expected. It comes in a small plastic bag inside a solid plastic box that is encased in tape. This was inside a shipping envelope. The seller didn’t take a chance on damage happening during shipping. I was concerned about buying from a seller w/o having PRIME behind the purchase. I would tell you not to worry at all. This ring is amazing & could easily cost $20 more. It does have the 925 sterling silver stamp though I had a hard time getting a photo because it is small. I’ve attached photos including one of the ring next to a ruler so you can see that the setting is an inch long.

rating 5.0. Stunning!! Absolutely Stunning!! I have large hands so finding rings this beautiful that don’t look too small once on is difficult for me. This ring is perfect for my hands. I sized up a half size because sometimes that's necessary with a thick band or triple shank band, but I don't think I really needed to. I bought it with the intention of wearing it on my middle finger & it fits, just a smidge loose, & it also fits my pointer finger. It took a long time to get here, but still arrived ahead of the estimated delivery date. I'm very happy with this ring & recommend it. I would buy from Navya Craft again in the future.

rating 1.0. Horrible workmanship. It certainly does not look like the one from advertising photo. after looking at the photos at the amazon page, I ordered 7" size, hammered nugold bracelet.

However, what I received was completely different than what it was described & advertised in amazon.
I asked for 7", but they sent me 7.5" which is too big for my wrist.
also, the biggest problem was "hammered" style. As you can see from attached photo from the website, the hammered NuGold looks very nice and unique, however, what I received was looking more like "un-finished, scratch & bent, gold surface" bracelet.
It wasn't hammered properly like their advertising photo, nor shinny & cleanly finished.

Honestly, very disappointed at their workmanship.
UPDATE : JUNE 27, 2018
I have contacted the seller about this issue with the photos and explanation. They asked me to return the item. They have issued the return label, but I had to pay for the shipping back cost which I thought it was bit unfair. The item was received couple of days ago, but they have not contacted me back nor replied back on my email. So, I have contacted Amazon. Fortunately, after checking the communication between me and the seller, Amazon immediately gave me the refund. IT IS GREAT BEING AMAZON PRIME MEMBER !!!!
other_product_reviews:
rating 1.0. Very cheap looking rope material and does not worth $32 for two. Also shipping back cost is as expensive as the entire cost. This is cheaply made rope bracelet. As you can see in my photos, the finishing is pretty tight & clean but it looks cheap and feels cheap.
however, unlike the photos from the Amazon advertisement, once you get them on your hand, you just can not escape the feeling of how cheap it looks and feels. I paid $33 plus shipping (from Beijing, China) and waited 3 weeks for me to receive.
As soon as I opened the package, I felt that "wow....they are very cheap looking and probably it would cost less than a dollar to make them in China". That was my initial feeling. So, I decided to return back for refund.
That is where the biggest problem began. The seller sent me the return label, but he requested tracking # and I have to pay for the return shipping which will not be reimbursed.
This morning, I went to a post office to return. The lady who works there told me that the cheapest post return with tracking # was $32.52!!!!!!
What the hell????!!!!!!
So, I had to contact Amazon customer service to resolve this matter by A to Z Guarrantee Claim service... what a hassle!

rating 1.0. LEAVES BUILDUP IN LOCS At first, I really liked this product. As it was recommended by a loctician, I didn’t think I’d have any problems with buildup or residue coating my locks. I was just looking for a simple, light weight spray to moisturize and hydrate my locks when they become too dry before it was time for a full wash. Initially, I thought this product really hit the mark. But the more I used this product, the more buildup and residue I noticed in my dreads. At first I wasn’t sure if it was this product causing the issue, but after I observed the spray drying down on my dreads as this grayish white residue instead of being fully absorbed by my hair, I realized this product was the culprit. Maybe this product does better on wet hair, but I’m not willing to chance it. Keeping product buildup and residue out of my dreads has been a constant struggle, and I’m always looking for simple, hydrating sprays for my locks that refresh them without drying and hardening them. This one didn’t work for me, so my search continues. It may be worth noting that my dreads are traditional locs with the traditional sizing, not sister locs—some of them are pretty dense too, so the product may work better for others.

rating 5.0. Beautiful ring! I bought this almost a year ago and was going to update my review but realized I hadn't written one! When the ring arrived it was absolutely beautiful and beyond my expectations. I was worried about the possibility of the bronze top portion turning color, and sure enough, after about 2 weeks it did look tarnished. I was really disappointed because there was absolutely no way I could wear it looking that way, but I collect jewelry and decided to give cleaning it a try with my jewelry cloth.

To my surprise it was as good as new! Thiswas my first piece from this jeweler, but I have since purchased more than 10 pieces and they are all well made and clean up very well. I highly recommend purchasing a jewelry cleaning cloth. They keep all of the jewelry that I've purchased from this seller nice and shiny.

I live in a very humid tropical climate, but haven't had any problems as long as I clean it occasionally. Also, I haven't had an issue, but beware that almost all .925 silver is stabilized with copper and has the potential to react with some people's skin and leave a green residue. That doesn't mean the jewelry is cheap or bad quality. It simply reacts to some people that way.

I highly recommend this seller if you're looking for unique, intricately made pieces. They are definitely different, but that is what makes them so great!

input: rating 5.0. Best healing stick When you're allergic to neosporin and band aids it's hard to heal any wound. rating 5.0. A great natural first aid alternative for those w/ dermatitis/ eczema I live with dermatitis and eczema, as well as an allergy to bacitracin and a dozen other common product additives. I have tried other alternatives to Neosporin, etc that are far too oily, carry a heady odor, or are simply ineffective. My Boo-Boo stick arrived promptly with a handwritten note from the seller, and after several applications to trouble spots on my skin, there has definitely been improvement in comfort and condition. To top it off, the "glue stick" style design makes it easy to use and it smells fabulous - and who doesn't love some aromatherapy while you're healing? :)

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. This is the best stuff ever! I've always liked using products made by nature more than using man-made things full of chemicals, so I tried the boo-boo stick.  It's wonderful.  I'm a menace to myself in the kitchen, give me a sharp knife and I'll cut my finger every time.  I had a severe cut that kept bleeding and hurt a lot,  and I tried bandaids, peroxide, liquid bandage, Neosporin and everything else I could think of.  Finally I tried this boo-boo stick, and it worked.  The pain went away and the cut began to heal.  I can't say enough good about this stuff, and it's also great that it's all natural and made by a small business owner.  Try it, I think you'll love it as much as I do.  Mother Nature strikes again, and She is awesome.

rating 5.0. Love them! Love these, and I get a lot of compliments. A note to those who say they don’t fit or are difficult to get on: yes, it is tricky at first. You will get the hang of it with regular wear. And, all of our ears are different. You will need to bend them slightly to fit the curves of your very own ears. It’s not hard, but it does take a minute to get it right. If it’s pinching, bend it out a little bit. It’s really not difficult to customize these to fit and it’s well worth the effort.

rating 5.0. Exactly what I wanted! I ordered these on the 19th of Oct. I'd originally seen them in the Etsy shop but I'm accustomed to International Etsy shipments taking 3+ weeks. So I decided to order via Amazon instead. They arrived yesterday on the 25th. Sweet. As other reviewers have stated, these are textured but it's very random and helps them catch the light. Maybe my ears are just a good size for wearing climbers but I had no issue getting them in or getting them to stay put. I was looking for something minimilistic that would stay in place that was also unique. These are perfect. I am so happy with them.  I would think that really thick earlobes might present a problem and make wearing difficult but if you have medium to thinner lobes and you're on the fence, I'd def recommend buying :)

rating 5.0. I'll buy this again and trying other scents as well I really enjoy these. I'm pregnant and find it hard to relax and fall asleep now that I'm in my third trimester and these are great at night when I shower in the dark with just a nightlight. The scent is strong and will give a great waft every time it comes into contact with the hot water. Im usually in the shower for about half an hour and I put this in the very back and it usually lasts throughout the entire time. If I put it near the front it dissolves in about 5-7 minutes and can be a little overpowering. It also came with a sample of the their stress relief scent which is just lavender and lemon and honestly smells like fruit loops.

rating 1.0. No scent, not worth the money. We have three bathrooms. Two stand up showers and one tub. I’ve tried these in each of the bathrooms which are all different sizes. I’m unsatisfied, to say the least. They don’t provide much scent, you literally have to dip it in the shower stream to see it fizzle for a few seconds. Their scent is so faint, it’s has to be less than 6 inches from your nose to smell. They do bubble up when water is sprinkled on top- but, they do not dissolve with just steam. I’ve even tried steaming the showers with the door closedfor 20 minutes with the steamer by the shower head before getting in ... still no scent, but it did fizzle and melt away.

I wouldn’t waste money on these.

rating 5.0. Long-lasting fizzy, with sharp lavender scent I sadly don't have a bathtub in my apartment, so I try to make my showers luxe. Lots of shower fizzies are just (IMHO) ordinary bath bombs that dissolve really quickly. These are definitely different. When I put them in a spot that gets the shower stream about half the time, they last over ten minutes, which is great.

I love the scent of both this one (lavender) and the included stress buster sample. If you're looking for a soft, vanilla-chamomile, floral lavender, this is not it. I find the scent to be strong and sharp, which is just what I like. There's one reviewer who said their product had no smell, and I can't guess how that happened. The tablets are shrink-wrapped inside a resealable bag, and even now (5 weeks later, having used 6 of 4) it's still powerful.

Does it help sleep? Not that I've noticed, but I don't really buy into aromatherapy as a sleep aid (I just like the smell) so I wasn't expecting it to. And, yes, they're rather expensive -- but I plan to keep buying them because they do everything I want.

rating 5.0. Perfect for Daddy's Girl. With custom engraving, this bracelet becomes a treasured keepsake. I chose to put my daughter's name on the front and "Daddy's Girl" on the back. No matter how it wears over time, my daughter will value this gift long after I'm gone. She is 23 years old, but I could see this gift as perfect for most any age. I am considering one for my 5-year-old granddaughter.

Thanks in part to the packaging, this bracelet gives the impression of class and charm - not the cheap fragile feeling I feared from such a well-priced dainty-looking gift. Dainty-looking is perfect for my daughter, as she would never wear heavy chains. Fortunately the actual sturdiness is much stronger than the dainty appearance suggests.

Final thought: God bless this seller for engraving and shipping so quickly. This bracelet was a last-minute gift idea just a few days before my daughter's birthday party. During the ordering process, there's a field where you can write a note to the seller. I explained the urgent need, and the gift arrived in time. Overall a perfect buying experience.

rating 4.0. Very pretty Update: it fell apart. I put it back together but it never stayed constructed well after that. The decorations slid towards the opening and I wasn't able to get it perfectly aligned and the coils and bead popped off. :( if you're careful with it then it may last much longer for you.

This is a very pretty and showy hoop. Well constructed and I get compliments on it all the time. I bought it for my nostril piercing. I do wish it was one mm diameter smaller however and hugged my nose a bit more. The diameter is 10mm and this makes it easier to pull apart and insert but it does stick out a bit. I wish it was a captive bead but it's not so you have to make sure you properly bend it back in place to prevent a gap. I haven't slept with it on because I'm afraid it's going to pull apart and something will happen. But I'm paranoid. Otherwise it's very pretty and well made.

Update purchased a second one and it took forever to come. Also didn’t realize it was silver because my last one was gold kind of disappointed this time
rating 2.0. its really pretty but giving how inflamed it made my nose and ... its really pretty but giving how inflamed it made my nose and cartilage I question the material it is made out of
rating 5.0. Absolutely Beautiful Awesome quality! Great price. I will be purchasing more from seller in the future. This is my favorite nose ring out of probably 25 that I have

rating 5.0. Have worn it for a few weeks and its been awesome. Great quality and totally worth the wait Absolutely gorgeous! Have worn it for a few weeks and its been awesome. Great quality and totally worth the wait. Thank you so much! <3

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Sexy piercing I love my pierced nose, and i get compliments on this piece all the time!
other_product_reviews: rating 4.0. Miss you Tom, nice memory Seemed sort of cheap, but I love Tom Petty... in memorandum.
rating 2.0. Careful you know your gage size Beautiful. But I got the wrong gage.

input: rating 5.0. Love Love Love this ring Love Love Love this ring. Unfortunately, my 14 year old daughter took it from me. I may have to order another one later :) Thank you so much. Very fast delivery.

rating 5.0. Love it! Love it! I've been trying to find a fidget toy that I like for a while, and I haven't stopped playing with this since I opened the package, so I think this one is a winner! I got a size 9, which has three rings, and it fits nicely on my thumb and rolls beautifully up and down my finger when I play with it. Shipping was super fast too - it arrived the day before the first estimated arrival date. Very impressed!

rating 5.0. Must buy! Beautiful and comfortable! I'm in LOVE with my ring. I may never take it off. It is very calming to fidget with and its beautiful craftsmanship! I literally got it in the mail 10 minutes ago and couldn't wait to put it on. I've gotten so many compliments on it already! Great job and TOTALLY worth the wait!

Update: after almost a year after purchasing this ring, no loss in shape! Color is faded, but I think it still looks great. I hardly EVER take it off, I shower with it, workout with it, and even sleep with it. Cant wait to see it after two years!

rating 5.0. A Must Have For Typing Fidgeters!!! I can't put these down!!!  I love these.  I've got one for my left thumb and one for my right index finger.  I type a lot and they don't get in the way, but are ready to go once I stop typing.  the other fidget items I have (I also love my little ball of these rings) I must put them down to work, and end up 9 times out of ten, loosing them on my crazy desk.  I like that even now when I pause to think of what to type, ones on my thumb to fidget the thoughts through.  this is a must have for typing fidgeters.

rating 5.0. Great ring, but not for at work. I received the ring on time, then lost it by the second day. No one's fault but my own, but now I feel sad because I lost it. I wore it to work and after awhile suddenly realized I wasn't wearing it. I work as a cashier, so my best guess is that now someone else has a great ring.

rating 5.0. Cool little fidget ring! Cool little fidget ring! Purchased for my husband, who chronically needs something to keep his hands busy. Great craftsmanship, back to order another for me!
ETA: Ok, so I bought one of these for my fidgety husband and had to come back to buy one for everyone in the family because we had a hard time taking turns. This item is deceptively simple, but once it's in your hands there is a ton of fidgeting potential. We all "play" with our own rings differently and love that you can just slip it on your finger and forget about it.

rating 5.0. Love this ring.... I found this while shopping for another fidget toy for my son.  I bought it because I am a fidgeter.  I absolutely love this ring.  I am a teacher, and I find myself fidgeting with it throughout the day especially during passing periods.  My son even commented how much I must really love the ring because he noticed me fidgeting with it while I was driving.  Buy this, you won't be disappointed with your purchase.

rating 5.0. These are great! These rings are beautiful and different. I got one for my 2 girls and myself to put as a little extra in our stockings (thinking I should have gotten my husband and son one too). They will be so excited! I love how you can mix up the colors to make it your own! Geoff delivered these super fast! I highly recommend!

Shelley

rating 5.0. Do it.  Buy it. Very good quality, all joints are tight and even and it doesn’t leave your hands smelling metallic. Very quick delivery, I ordered this and a few other things, his stuff came in two days before the amazon fulfillment items. I wish I bought a larger size. My ring size is a 7 and I got a 7.5.  It fits fine on my ring finger but is awkward. I find it’s more natural using on the pointer finger. It is quiet but not silent. A lot less annoying to others than a clicking pen.

rating 5.0. Beautiful and rolls smoothly. Love it. It's awesome. I don't wear it all the time since it is a bit bulky, but I love having it in my pocket to fidget with. I may put it on a necklace in the future but I'm not sure yet. I bought the smallest size and then took off one ring at a time to make sure I'd get the right fit, so I got a second two-loop thumb ring haha

Also, keep in mind that if your ring isn't rolling on smoothly, make sure all the loops are facing the right way. It feels a lot smaller if one ring is facing the wrong way. I wasn't sure what was going on at first, but just keep that in mind if yours is feeling awkward at first.

rating 5.0. Great product, great seller, happy child. This is what we all hope for. My teenager has terrible trouble with anxiety, and feeling overwhelmed, especially at school. He is a big fan of fidgets, they truly help him cope. I loved the design/colors of these rings, and purchased a "3-ring", size 9 ring for him for Christmas (in addition to multiple other fidget "toys"). I was so happy with the item, with the extremely fast response from Geoff (Steel Lynx), the lightning fast shipment, and, most importantly, how much it means to my child. He absolutely cannot live without this one, has told me time and again it is his favorite, most effective fidget.

So, I ordered a second.

Sometimes, simplicity is most effective. Great seller, great product. May very well order more in the future. Thanks again, Geoff.

rating 5.0. Ring gauges are a bit thicker than the steel version, so you might need to size up or remove a band because it affects sizing I ordered a custom with Bright Pink, Amethyst, and Silverstar. It came and it's gorgeous.

The gauge of the bands is thicker than the steel version. I wear a size 6 in the steel version, but on this version, because of the wider gauge, for the size 6 to get over the knuckle of the same hand I typically wear the steel one on, I had to remove one of the bands. (fortunately, the silver color had 3 bands while the other two colors had two, so I could just remove the silver band and now all colors are even).

When I reorder more, I'll probably just order a size up.

This one also has the advantage over his steel version is that it does not smell coming out of the box. The steel one smells quite strongly of steel (and this is normal for steel, it's not a defect on his part)

Also, the customer service is fantastic, he even includes a little note! I will be ordering more for sure.

rating 5.0. Great fidget toy! Excellent product!  I have several Mobii from this designer/artist, and each of them is a high-quality product.  Perhaps best of all, the artist is incredibly easy to work with, and your Mobii will probably be produced within 48 hours (mine were both within a day, but I don't want to promise anything FOR the artist!).  I am EXTREMELY pleased to have purchased a few different Mobii, and I have really liked them all.

rating 5.0. Beautiful product! Amazing product! It came so quickly, I wasn’t expecting it until next week. it’s silent and smooth when I play with it on my finger. the colors are gorgeous. also the packaging with the handwritten note was a very nice and sweet touch. I will definitely buy from this store again.

rating 5.0. I decided to give this type a try and I love it so much more Arrived quicker than expected. I used to have a traditional spinner ring but lost it. I decided to give this type a try and I love it so much more. I can fidget with it on my finger or take it on and off. Slides around very smoothly. I will be buying more in the future! Very satisfied
rating 5.0. Five Stars Great customer service and quick response to questions asked.  My daughter loves her turquoise spin ring.  Thank you!

rating 5.0. Excellent! Well-made! I really love this ring!  The delivery was very quick and the ring was well packaged. I was very pleased with how light the ring is on my finger and how soft the sound of the moving rings are when I fidget with it. The ring was just as described. I'm sure it will earn many compliments and I will definitely let people know where they can purchase one. Thank you!

rating 5.0. Excellent! Well-made! I really love this ring!  The delivery was very quick and the ring was well packaged. I was very pleased with how light the ring is on my finger and how soft the sound of the moving rings are when I fidget with it. The ring was just as described. I'm sure it will earn many compliments and I will definitely let people know where they can purchase one. Thank you!

rating 5.0. Awesome! These rings are fantastic. Make sure to order up a little in the size. The first one I ordered was my usual size, but it came in just a smidge small, so I gave it to my sister. I ordered a larger size and it fit perfectly. I just ordered a multi-colored ring, so I’m hoping it’ll be just as great as my all-black one!

rating 5.0. like biting my lip or pulling at hair I have had fidgets my whole life but a lot of times they were harmful to me, like biting my lip or pulling at hair. This ring has really helped me redirect my habits and I will be buying many more. I will say, as someone who needs to use it constantly because of the consistency of my prior habits, after two weeks I've already noticed wearing on the colors, but the functionality and quality is top notch. If you want to wear it out with specific colors, I would say buy two; one that you can wear out and one that you can put a lot of wear and tear on. Again, awesome product.
rating 5.0. Five Stars Such a good tri-ring.  It even spins, if you select the right size for your finger of course!

rating 5.0. Great product with extremely fast shipping and friendly customer service Great product with extremely fast shipping and friendly customer service! My ring arrived with a handwritten thank you note. This is a great fidget item to discretely keep my hands busy when anxious. I can definitely see myself buying more products from Möbii :)

rating 5.0. Really nice fidget toy to have on me when I need ... Really nice fidget toy to have on me when I need it!  I did end up removing one ring to make it larger and it fits well on my thumb.  It is a bit bulky (still pretty, though), and works really well as a thumb ring on my non-dominant hand.  I love that I was able to choose my colors and have gotten compliments from coworkers.

rating 5.0. Satisfying stress relief This is a very satisfying piece of jewelry. The movement is smooth as liquid and visually stunning. The links seem durable, something that was important to me as a known stress ball destroyer. The light chime of the rings against each other is also pleasant. I can wear it on my finger, and the fit is excellent, or I can string it onto a necklace or bracelet. It would have been nice to know how many rings come with each size, but even without that this has been a worthwhile purchase. Well done, Steel Lynx.

rating 5.0. LOVE I love this product!! I was looking for a fidget toy that was small and could bring to work to help ground me when I dissociate. And this ring is perfect!! I usually wear a size 5 but ordered a size 6 since the ring is bulkier. The fit was perfect, and the ring wasn’t that bulky!!! I highly highly recommend this ring!!! Love the color too!

rating 5.0. Love, love my ring! This ring is awesome. It’s really comfortable (I wear it on my thumb.) I finally have something to fidget with that won’t drive people nuts. I used the quicksilver and moonstone colors. It looks all silver until you look close. Then you see it’s two colors. Very subtle, which is what I wanted.

rating 5.0. Thanks much needed Yay!!! Just got my beautiful custom ring! Now I have something to play with instead when I'm anxious (basically always) or absent mindedly sitting around instead of rolling of my finger nails and the like. Thanks guys I'll probably be buying more : )

rating 5.0. Very Fun! The color is wonderful, very vibrant, and it's very fun to play with! Keeps my hands occupied while I'm reading or paying attention to something else, and is very well made too.
My only quibble is that the rings are a little too lightweight for me, I think I'd prefer something with a bit more heft - though that might warrant a higher price, understandably so. Overall though, a very good product!

rating 5.0. Great quality Love my Mobii!  I purchased both the large and small and both are high quality items.  I enjoyed picking colors and having the option of having colors picked for me.  Would definitely purchase again!

rating 5.0. Fantastic! I love this ring! I just got it about an hour ago and it’s already proving to be very fun and useful. It came super quick too, which was just an added bonus. I plan on buying at least one more for my friend and maybe more. Love it!

rating 5.0. Awesome ring! I had never seen a ring like this before nor had I ever played with a fidget spinner. But I liked the way it looked especially the colors. I chose the lavender one I believe that is a silvery bluish light purple, even though I was afraid the color would rub off. I’ve had the ring almost a month now, wear it all day and it still looks brand new. I find myself rolling it up and down my finger all the time while thinking. I will be buying another ring as soon as I can pick out which color I want. Also the ring was shipped very fast and packaged nicely.
rating 3.0. Doesn’t move enough Doesn’t move enough to keep my kid busy. Not for really Fidgety people!

rating 5.0. Favorite Ring Ever I've had my ring for months and love it. There is a bit of a learning curve for getting it on and off your finger, but you get used to it quickly. Keeps my hands occupied when I'm nervous or stressed out, which is exactly what I needed.

rating 5.0. Fidget without drawing attention This is the second ring I’ve bought from this company. I love the look and the multipurpose of it! I can fidget with it in class and not draw attention to myself. The individual rings that make up the entire ring is a tad bigger than I was expecting but I still love it!

rating 5.0. Such a great ring! Amazing! Oh my gosh the ring is amazing! The colors were exactly as I asked for. The ring came super fast, way earlier than stated. It looks amazing and it fits perfectly! I am so grateful. I love the ring. The hand written note was also awesome! This ring helps me stay present focused and not get overloaded sensory wise. I am a lot calmer and can focus more now. Thank you for making me this awesome ring!

rating 5.0. Very nice! Now I cannot stop playing with it I received it yesterday, superfast considering I only ordered it a few days ago, and now I cannot stop playing with it. I tend to have a bit of anxiety when I am stressed or nervous and have developed some bad habits such as skin and lip picking. What I like about this ring is that you can carry it with you anywhere and have it readily available if you need it. Today I had a stressful day and this ring helped a lot. I was able to quietly play with it during a few company meetings as needed and throughout the day. I purchased size 7.5 with 5 rings, but ended up removing one of the rings to make it less bulky and to fit my index finger better.  Love it!

rating 5.0. Fidget away fidgeter! Here's your socially acceptable outlet. I love these; they're not as obvious as a fidget spinner and stash easily in a pocket without stabbing you. If you are a constant fidgeter, this is much more acceptable than tapping or chewing on a pen/pencil, tapping feet or what have you. I've got the medium and small sizes, and a ring. Might have to get more!
rating 5.0. Can’t live without these!! These spin rings are the best fidget I have found.  I keep one on each first finger.  I have a lot of time to fidget and these are the very best.

rating 5.0. Great fidget toy I purchased this ring as a Christmas present for my son who has autism.  He always has a fidget in hands and especially likes rings on rings. He was never into the fidget spinners but I thought this would be perfect. He loves it and has kept it on his thumb most of the time since he opened it. I like it’s not so obvious as self-stimulating item since it’s small, which may mean we lose it eventually. If we do, I’ll definitely buy again.

rating 5.0. Love it! Got this for my son and it's by far his favorite fidget to date. We're going to put it on a chain though since he has a habit of taking it off and forgetting about it. And I like his so much that I ordered one for myself!
rating 5.0. Love them! My daughters loved these rings!  The colors are beautiful, and they move well.

rating 5.0. Lovely and helpful A friend had given me the gift of one of the small Mobii devices, and then she told me that she had gotten a ring and loved it.  I love my small rainbow Mobii, so I thought why not let's get one of the loose rings.  Well I picked my own colors, which was so fun to start.  I got it in the mail last week and have not been at all disappointed.  The ring is just as well made.  It's light, easy to wear, and great to fidget with.  It is nice to be able to wear it and play with it.  I love this artist and the approach he makes to creating these pieces.  I can't recommend the ring highly enough.  My one note for folks is when you get it to keep playing with it until you get the rings lined up the way that slides on best for you.  That took a little bit of playing with for me.

rating 5.0. Amazing little piece! I ordered the spin ring just a few days ago. I've always been a bit reluctant to order anything that is not *Prime as I've had a bad experience in the past. But Steel Lynx has great reviews already and the price was more than affordable.
my Spin ring arrived well ahead of the estimated time frame.
The colors I chose are vibrant and exciting and even better in person. I'm so happy with my chosen custom colorization.
The spin ring is not really meant to be worn as a constant wear ring as the multi ring bands makes the ring a bit bulky on my finger and that's totally ok. Just when my hands a bored and something to fidget with.
I absolutely LOVE this and I will definitely Order from Steel Lynx again! And soon!

current_product_reviews:
rating 5.0. Love these rings! The colors are awesome! (Pictures don’t do them justice.) To begin, I have purchased each of the following (many in multiples):

Möbii Daydream, Deep Thought, Half Thought, Medium Möbii, Medium Stainless Steel Möbii, Small Möbii, Small Stainless Steel and Copper Möbii, Anodized Aluminum Spin Ring, Stainless Steel Spin Ring.
(All except the Small Stainless Steel/Copper Möbii and the Medium Stainless Steel Möbii are pictured above basically in the order they are listed. The two not pictured are the same size as the other Small and Medium Möbii and are well represented with the seller’s pictures. And, please ignore the busted knuckle from yard work. :) )

If you are like me, and like to comparison shop using reviews, I hope the inclusion of each item is helpful. That said, for simplicity, I will be copying and pasting the same review on each of the items I have purchased.

While the Daydream is a bit large for my hand, it works because it is so lightweight. The individual links/rings are thicker than the Medium and Small Möbii, and I like the feel and movement.
The Deep Thought is nice and heavy with a good feel to it. I purchased it as a gift to my husband. It fits well in his large hands, and he seems to like it.
The Half Thought is wonderful! It is definitely one of my favorites. It has wonderfully simple and smooth unending movement. The weight is just right. It does make more noise than the tighter fitting Möbii fidgets—I mean, they’re stainless steel rings. The noise doesn’t bother me, and it’s basically as loud as you make it.
The Small Möbii fidgets are really nice for discreet fidgeting at meetings, etc., and they work well for just fingertip fidgeting. The colors are vibrant, and the customization option is a lot of fun!
The Small Stainless Steel and Copper Möbii is really nice—another favorite! The weight is great, and the movement is very smooth. I really like the copper mixed with the stainless steel.
The Medium Möbii fidgets probably get the most use (yes, another favorite) because of the perfect size, nice movement, and fun colors. They are lightweight and quiet (not silent). I do also have a Medium Stainless Steel Möbii, which, of course, has a little more weight to it and a good feel. The Stainless Steel version probably has slightly better overall movement. Although, I do still tend to pick up the brightly colored Aluminum version more often.
The Spin Rings (Anodized Aluminum and Stainless Steel) are both wonderful, whether you wear them at the base of the finger or in the middle—depending on fidget preferences. Of course, the Stainless Steel version is heavier. I really like both. I like more rings per spin ring for fidgeting and spinning, but obviously, more rings make the entire ring much thicker. If I wear a thick ring on my right (dominant) hand, it tends to interfere with writing. I usually just switch hands or set it aside.
Everything I’ve received has been very well made and delivered in a cute little Möbii-branded bag. As other reviewers have stated, the personal, hand-written “thank you” note is a nice touch. I had a few large orders, and the seller even included a free Small Möbii in two of the shipments!! I was super excited! (Geoff, I hope you’re reading this: Thank you so much!!!)
These make great gifts and have been a hit with my family and friends. I am addicted! I highly recommend any of these Steel Lynx products, y’all!! You can’t go wrong!

Of course, the Stainless Steel version is heavier. I really like both. I like more rings per spin ring for fidgeting and spinning, but obviously, more rings make the entire ring much thicker. If I wear a thick ring on my right (dominant) hand, it tends to interfere with writing. I usually just switch hands or set it aside.
Everything I’ve received has been very well made and delivered in a cute little Möbii-branded bag. As other reviewers have stated, the personal, hand-written “thank you” note is a nice touch. I had a few large orders, and the seller even included a free Small Möbii in two of the shipments!! I was super excited! (Geoff, I hope you’re reading this: Thank you so much!!!)
These make great gifts and have been a hit with my family and friends. I am addicted! I highly recommend any of these Steel Lynx products, y’all!! You can’t go wrong!

rating 5.0. Perfect nose ring The packaging was perfect fast shipping. The fit was perfect you have to open the loop just a tiny bit for it to fit. Very light weight!
rating 2.0. Smh The only thing I don’t like about this nose ring is the fact that it doesn’t close and I didn’t know because now the nose ring is gone. I can’t find it.

rating 2.0. Way to big The loop was too big.
Extremely large

rating 5.0. Very African Queen looking! It is the PERFECT gauge if your still in a nose ring from the mall or the one they start you with. Its a snug fit but not painful at all to put in. Just add a little oil to the ring and your nose. I used my fingers to bend the straight piece closed and viola! Magic!
rating 1.0. Nope! I lost it the next day , i slept with it and never seen it again . There is nothing to stop it from coming out on its own . Smh waste of money . But i loved the look of it .

rating 3.0. Didn't work for me I was looking for a nose ring like this one so when I saw it I was happy to purchase. I've had the nose ring for sometime to test the comfort and it did not work for me. I had a few scratches from this ring around my piercing area which caused a lot of irritations it was a little painful at times if I moved/touched it when washing my face. This didn't work for me.

rating 5.0. I LOOOOOOVE This Ring! I got my nose pierced in January and in April I tried to put a traditional hoop in and it was a fail! I could not put it in the save my life! In the midst of my panicking, I bought this ring. From the pictures you can’t really see that it’s open ended and you have to do some bending so it fits YOUR nostril. But i think it’s perfect especially if you’re piercing is still “healing”. You can straighten it and it slides in no problems then pinch it closed. When you first put it in, you may not like it. It is a bit bold compared to a stud. But now I love it and recommend it 100%.

rating 1.0. PAINFUL Genuinely think this gave me an infection. I’m very clean with my piercings so when I put this in and it started to hurt so bad I was taken aback. I left it in for a few more days to ride it out bc I thought it may just need time to settle (I’ve had my piercing for 5+ years) but today I woke up to my nose swollen and the pain unbearable. Not for me, please be aware this may cause you pain.
rating 2.0. Pretty but not durable I loved when I received this but after wearing it for a couple of months it has started to tarnish and keeps falling out of my nose.
rating 1.0. Broke after 1 day Broke after one wear literally broke when I blew my nose.

rating 5.0. They returned the defected item with a better quality one I bought one the first time and it broke five minutes of putting it on. Second one I received was way better it was thicker in the quality was more durable

rating 2.0. A let down I don’t usually do reviews but I had high hopes for this, don’t get me me wrong it’s really cute, but it’s very small, it doesn’t have a closing and it’s very uncomfortable to wear, I couldn’t keep it on for more than a hour without it coming out or my nose being in so much pain, I wish it was better 😔
rating 5.0. Phenomenal Nose Ring I love this it's better than I even expected it looks gorgeous I've only have it in for two days and I've received 10 compliments!!!!

rating 5.0. very beautiful and comfortable I have had a nose ring for many years so it is a very easy process to switch nose rings for me, I was very scared at first because it was very painful to switch from the type of nose ring I was wearing to this hoop but after a few days it was less sore and very comfortable. Keep in mind that this is a very large nose ring so it will take an adjustment period to get comfortable, in my opinion. It is gorgeous and appears great in pictures because it is noticeable.

rating 5.0. Very cute but may hurt I love this nose ring. I love gold and it just added to the rest of my gold jewelry perfectly. It is big as well, but I have a big nose so it worked out.
It started to hurt my nose after a few days but I just dealt with it and it stopped hurting. The pain does come back but eventually goes away. I’m probably allergic to something in it but whatever lol Also you can’t fit your finger in your nose with it in 🤷🏽‍♀️
rating 2.0. Stunning....but !!!! Looked stunning. It would keep moving around and was uncomfortable at first. After a week or so turned my nose green.

rating 4.0. Pretty but loose Soooo I’ve been looking for a nose ring like this for a while and I finally found it BUT it’s too loose on my nose and it moves around a lot. So unfortunately I won’t be wearing it but it is really cute. I just wish that it cuffed my nose more
rating 1.0. I do not recommend. This was extremely uncomfortable, and it turned my nose green after about 6 hours of wearing it. It is really pretty, but it’s terrible quality.

rating 5.0. I adore this ring I love this nose ring. For years I have tried to find a hoop that would not look ridiculous on my narrow nose, and this adjustable one was the answer. input: rating 5.0. Love 🤍🤍🤍 [[VIDEOID:52ec5515761aa83f24e326f704ac7d6]] I got two one for my dogs and and then his birthday. I love it they are so cute and dainty 🤍

rating 5.0. Nice quality I’ve had one of these rings for a couple years now and the color has stayed the same. It still looks beautiful. I have two for both of my kids and I love them. The quality is so nice!

rating 5.0. Every day ring. I ordered this ring because I loved how thin the band was. I literally wear it every day, it's dainty and just perfect.
Normally I can't wear most rings because they'll turn my finger green, even rings that aren't supposed to, and then I waste $50.
This ring, however, I have had for several months, it's gotten wet, hot, banged up, and it's still in perfect shape and not a single green mark on my finger.

rating 2.0. Teeny is an under statement Not what I expected. It’s very thin and the letters are extremely small.  So small that both my daughters said when I showed them” are those 3 dots” no it’s an A&S.  Lesson learned here. Don’t always rely on the sellers marketing photos.

rating 5.0. This should be listed as Fine jewelry. We are more than pleased with the work! Always pleased with Hannah's handiwork and still planning on putting in even more orders for Christmas. Thank you for doing what you do so that we can have amazing jewelry.
rating 5.0. Exactly what I was looking for Very comfortable, true to size, and perfectly delicate. Great quality and very fast shipping. I couldn't be happier. I recommend this product and seller.

rating 5.0. Simple, cute, quick, quality. I've been wanting small, simple stacked rings with my son's names. These are perfect! I ordered Thurs, and they got here Monday! rating 5.0. Good quality!! So beautiful. I bought them for myself with my daughters names, but it would be a perfect gift. They are super comfy, I don’t even feel them! I’ve forgotten them on in the shower a couple of times and so far no dinginess or irritation either. Very cute and good quality.

rating 5.0. Adorable custom ring I love this product. I ordered one with my daughter's name on it, I love that when I have another child I can order another ring and stack the two. The ring is dainty and I can clearly read the lettering. These rings would make an excellent, thoughtful gift. The ring runs true to size. I ordered a 7 even though my wedding ring is a 5.75 because I decided I would rather have it be too large than too small. It fits like a true size 7, so it's a little big for my ring finger but fits my index perfectly. My ring also came several days before its estimated arrival date. I would definitely order from this seller again.

rating 5.0. 21 YEARS OF LIFE WITH MATCHING RINGS (picture does not do the rings justice)! I have never writen a review but my incredible experience warrants that I share the following. My twin daughters turned 21 a few weeks ago. I am in the midwest; they are across the country. I wanted to get them something memorable that they would love and keep forever. I could not find anything unique that was affordable and meaninful. I found the Hannan Design Personalized ring and had the engravings, "M & M & M". It stands for Mom, Maggie and Molly. My daughters said it was the best present they have gotten from me. One daughter does not wear rings so I thought she could put it on a necklace or have it as a keepsake. She has not taken the ring off her finger! Initally I only ordered rings for the twins as I was not sure I wanted 3 rings should we not be satified.
However, I ordered another M & M & M; now the 3 of us have the same rings. I could not be happier. The picture is decent but the rings are even more beautiful in person. Thank you!

input:
rating 5.0. Nice little rings I ordered three of these rings. They appear to be of good quality silver and I love the simple hammered design. A 5 1/4 fits my ring finger perfectly so I could wear a 5 or a 5 1/5. Its sometimes hard to get half sizes in silver rings so I really appreciate that this seller offers that. I ordered them in a 5 1/2 because this style of ring often runs a little small but they are actually true to size. The are very comfortable to wear but my only concern is that they are extremely dainty and thin. I'm almost afraid they might bend easily with daily wear. Other than that I really like them. I just hope that they wear well.

*****UPDATE*****
I've been wearing them almost daily since I received them and they are surprisingly strong for their size. They have no changed color in any way or tarnished. I've had no problems with them. They're good quality and so comfortable that I almost forget I have them on. I love them so much that I'm considering buying more to stack on my middle finger as well. They're just beautifully made rings. Very happy with them.

rating 5.0. Love the rings, problem with shipping/order I absolutely love my rings.  I first ordered a silver ring and then ordered a rose gold and gold one. The only negative comment I have is that I had to place two different orders for the gold and rose gold and was charged shipping for both yet I received 1 box with two rings in it. I don't think I should have been charged for two shipping rates since they shipped it in one box and I don't like the fact that they assumed that both rings were for me,  they very well could have been ordered as gifts, so two ring boxes in that case would have been nice. But over all the rings are gorgeous and fit perfectly.

input:
rating 5.0. Silver earrings Received the earrings much quicker than expected, especially since they were shipped out of state. The packaging was very well done, and the email I received from the vendor was nothing but cordial and friendly! The quality is superb, and it lusters and shines much brighter than expected! Had them in for a few days and I've received a bunch of compliments!

Be warned that since this is sterling silver, the stem that goes through the piercing hole bends with too much force. I hadn't had an earring in years before trying these on and I forced the earring in too hard-- there wasn't a major fold, more like a bend. Silver is soft, and as this is the real deal, please be careful! I managed to get the stem as fascimile of a straight line as much as I could but just be gentle.

Another small warning is that since this is a fine work of silver, the earring clasp is small. Be careful you don't lose it in carpeting!

Aside from that, amazing product with absolutely amazing work! I will be trying these in oxidized black next!!
rating 5.0. Awsome Love these earrings.. They are classy as well as comfortable

rating 5.0. Unique "stud" that fits well in social and professional environments The jewelry looks exactly as depicted and is good quality. Took me a minute to realize they were side-specific but once I straightened that out they fit very well with my standard piercings. The seller is abroad, which I hadn't realized (explains why it wasn't Prime eligible though), but was very communicative and I received my order in only three or four days; the product shipped from Greece if I'm reading the country code correctly and I live in Texas (USA).
rating 5.0. Great earrings Great earrings, great design! fit well just needed a little adjusting on my part.

rating 5.0. Awesome Earring I'm giving the product 5 stars because I love the earring, and the shipping from Greece was fast.  I do wish, however, that I knew in advance that the earrings are ear specific.  One is made to go on the right ear, and one for the left.  I am only pierced on the left ear so I feel I paid for one earring I will never wear.  If I knew that in advance I would have asked the maker to send two left earrings instead of a left and a right.  You can put the right earring on the left ear, but the design doesn't sit in the middle of the ear lobe, it's off to one side.  I like the earring so much I will probably order another pair because I will wear this earring all the time.

rating 4.0. Style Points A fine piece of jewelry that is sure to get you some compliments.  Arrived nicely packaged and on time. Only thing to be aware of is if your hole is to far away from the edge of your lobe it will be uncomfortable and you will be tempted to bend it into shape.  At least that was what I tried, unfortunately it led to it sliding off my ear while unaware.  Not sure what I could have done different.  If it wasn't for that it would get a 5. Still rocking the other one over some other matching pair, that may give an indication of my opinion of it.

rating 5.0. I have Four Styles and intend on getting more Stunning craftsmanship. Elegant design. Unique stylings. Comfortable wear and light profile. Packaging very classy and not just fluff. Lightning fast shipping to US from Europe. Amazing customer service and product support of which Emanuella and her staff go above and beyond to provide. I had a situation in which one of the posts on one of the earrings I ordered got damaged, and upon mentioning that they shipped out a replacement, no questions asked, no proof required, signaling to me they are a company that does business the right way and provides the type of framework a clientele will be loyal to, much beyond just liking the product.
The one, albeit very small issue one may have, is the pricing, but considering you are getting a whole lot more than just a piece of metal, it is not at all something that should dissuade you.

If you like body art that is high quality and wonderfully unique, look no further. I can say without question you will appreciate your buy.

I have four styles and intend on getting more.

Packaging very classy and not just fluff. Lightning fast shipping to US from Europe. Amazing customer service and product support of which Emanuella and her staff go above and beyond to provide. I had a situation in which one of the posts on one of the earrings I ordered got damaged, and upon mentioning that they shipped out a replacement, no questions asked, no proof required, signaling to me they are a company that does business the right way and provides the type of framework a clientele will be loyal to, much beyond just liking the product.
The one, albeit very small issue one may have, is the pricing, but considering you are getting a whole lot more than just a piece of metal, it is not at all something that should dissuade you.

If you like body art that is high quality and wonderfully unique, look no further. I can say without question you will appreciate your buy.

I have four styles and intend on getting more.

input: rating 5.0. Just look at the pictures.  Awesome!! I love the way this looks on my new mailbox!  I get so many compliments.  The pictures say it all.  The seller puts these on a paper that has a grid printed on it.  This is a nice feature because it helps with keeping the numbers and letters straight.  Once the letter and numbers were on, I used a hairdryer to slightly heat the letters and numbers up to ensure they stuck to the mailbox.  The package even comes with numbers for the from door of the mailbox.  That was nice.  I even asked the seller a question and received a quick reply.

rating 3.0. Gorgeous, but not sticking as well as I would expect. 5 stars for the cut. No rips, everything is cut very precisely.

5 stars for the style, it looks GREAT!

Minus one star because it is not sticking well to my box (if you have a glossy smooth finish box this may be less of an issue for you, Mine is matte and has very very slight texture).

Minus a star for it being a tad flimsy, I feel like it is about half as thin as standard clear contact paper and less sticky for sure.

It has lasted this first week with me occasionally pushing unstuck areas back on. I hope it lasts, it's gorgeous!

On another note. I bought the copper and I have a brown box. Visibility is not as clear as I would like, I will definitely need a reflective sign for the emergency vehicles since ambulance rides aren't unusual here...

rating 5.0. Looks Fantastic ! We just had our house repainted to a new gray-blue color. New mailbox post and mailbox painted to match house. Looked for something to label the mailbox which looked a little special. This decal was it. It shipped and was delivered 4 days earlier than predicted. Exactly as ordered. Looks great and quality appears to be top notch as well. Installed easily. Instructions were clear. Best thing I can say is take your time. Do the prep work carefully and thoroughly (lots of rubbing). Apply carefully and again rub extra. I had a perfect installation with out even a small piece lifting. I did take a roll of painters tape and roll the decal very hard after application to make sure it was very stuck. We'll see if it lasts in the Florida sun and rain, but  right now I couldn't ask for a better, or sharper address on my mailbox.
rating 5.0. Love it It was so easy to install.  It included unexpected extra number for the front of the mailbox ( I ordered 2 sides).  Love the the way it looks.
rating 5.0. So far, so good - and looks great! First one came wrinkled, but seller replaced it immediately. So far, so good - and looks great!

rating 5.0. Easy to install and exactly as described This product was absolutely amazing. Super easy to install and the size was exactly as described. rating 5.0. Great product! I followed the included instructions to the letter, and it applied perfectly to my new mailbox. The extra numbers for the door are very nice, too. My mailbox has shallow ridges on the sides, but the big decal applied great anyway.  I gave the entire mailbox a sprayed on clear coat afterward just for extra protection.  The dark brown numbers and lettering look really nice on the grey mailbox and match my house numbers.
rating 5.0. Mailbox I have the best looking mailbox on my road! The vinyl was very easy to put on the box. I love it!

rating 5.0. Just a clean and professional looking address I watched maybe 8 videos on how to install before I got the nerve to do it. Glad I did, so helpful. I added the address to a new smooth sided mailbox (on both sides) before installing on the post which was also helpful.

rating 1.0. Extremely difficult to transfer regardless of how well transfer is rubbed during pre-application. Two letters would not transfer, no matter how much I rubbed on the back of the transfer.  Had to peel them off by hand, and try to place them, but they kept sticking more to my fingers than the box,  Spent over 45 minutes being frustrated. rating 2.0. I would not recommend. Not happy at all with this mailbox lettering.  Followed instructions and applied. Application wasn’t hard at all. The mailbox was brand new! Seemed to be fine for a few weeks, first cold day and it’s all blowing off. Not nearly sticky enough.

rating 5.0. Excellent way to spruce up your mailbox We had complaints from folks delivering that we were hard to find, and that was probably due to the fact that our driveway sits on another street than our house faces (on a corner lot) and the address on the mailbox was like an inch tall. So I ordered these, and it came with an address for each side, and an extra number part of the address for the front. My husband painted the mailbox and it looks brand new. They were easy to put on straight, they adhere well and there are no bubbles. I expect these to last a very long time. To get the amount of stickers you would need to do all this at like Home Depot would be at least this much, and it would be a pain in the ass to do each individual letter. If you are having doubts, I assure you this is a great buy.

rating 2.0. Disappointed First off, this is not a clear solid vinyl sheet like I expected, not a "vinyl decal", it's individual numbers and letters, very wiggly I found out. It is near impossible to get this thing on straight, and neither side came out well. I'm an artsy-craftsy type and am used to doing art projects, so this should have turned out better.

On the first side, the top half of my 6 stayed stuck to the sheet so I had to add that separately. On the second side, I tried a different technique to get it on straight and it was still not successful. And, the 9 and half the 6 stuck to the sheet as well as the second letter of the street name, so those wiggly things had to be put on oh-so-carefully and no, they don't look right. I have my doubts about how durable these will be, so giving it a "3" in that category. I don't see what would keep some kid from peeling them off. I had no trouble peeling off the practice piece.

I had high hopes, they look so pretty in the photos, but I expect to be getting something else pretty soon.

rating 4.0. Nice finishing touch to any mailbox. I will say that the label makes the mailbox look so much better; the black mailbox w the crisp white lettering looks so nice.

Installation: overall, easy BUT I found lining up the large layout to make the line level was very difficult. It would have been nice to have the grid on the letter side that you are sticking to the mailbox. But that is removed first. Listen to other reviews...rub, rub, rub!!

Design: I have a period in my address. I would not recommend the period, avoid if possible. It is very difficult to stick on mailbox-- no matter how much you rub!

Good luck.

rating 2.0. Different  number alignment on each side I really like my mailbox decal...looks very nice...problem the alignment is not the same on both sides. On the flag side the alignment is as pictures in the ad, on the other side the number are almost in the opposite position. Have contacted the seller and am waiting on a response...Will update this review once I hear back. Am pretty unhappy that the alignment is not the same on both sides.

rating 1.0. Application ranges fron difficult to impossible The letters/numbers adhere much more strongly to the backing than to the surface you hope to apply them.  After a two-hour process of applying them to a new, metal mailbox, I found three of the letters adhering to my shirt as I was carrying the mailbox outside for installation.  Now, I am looking for a spray urethane to keep the letters/numbers from blowing away or washing off in a good rain.

rating 2.0. Maybe easy to install -- these are decals not magnetic longer lasting Note -- the reason for 2 stars is the products value and durability. I did not realize these are vinyl DECAL  not vinyl MAGNETIC.  One could print these at home. (Basically heavy duty transparent label stock). These would not work for our situation, nor would I trust the durability. I am returning.

rating 1.0. Inconsistent manufacturing process. Only buy if you're feeling lucky! There are three layers. First layer is a heavy sheet with a shiny side, second layer is the lettering that is glued to the shiny side of the first layer so it can be peeled off. The third layer is the backing that you peel away once you've positioned the lettering on your project.

I got two decals (one for each side of the mailbox). First one stuck a little bit to the first layer but I was able to cajole it off using a razor knife, repeated rubbing and lots of patience. But the second (identical?) decal was stuck so badly that I couldn't get it off.

So I have a mailbox with lettering on one side.

I assume all decals work this way. I'm going to paint my house number on the other side rather than go through this again.

rating 2.0. Could be better I bought two of these at once and it’s a good thing I did - the first one did not transfer when you take off the cover sheet off of the adhesive side. I had a really hard time getting the numbers to stick even after cleaning and drying the surface beforehand like advised on the how-to sheet. The shipping was rather quick, it also came with a little heart that I was supposed to use to test my surface - I used it and it stuck so I assumed that the whole sheet with my address would work. Not sure that I would purchase again as I wasted 1 whole labeled sheet that I paid for separately.

rating 5.0. Perfect` These mailbox address labels really are amazing. They add a hint of elegance to your mailbox. I have a bronze mailbox and got the ivory color and it looks fantastic. Application is key here...I brought my mailbox inside, cleaned it and dried it well. The only thing bad about this is that the label is not set perfectly straight on the grid lines. I wish it was perfectly straight along the grids and each side was placed at the same point on the grids, but it wasn't, and I just had to make marks on the label so I could measure them properly and apply them so they'd be at the same spot on each side. Make sure you really press the label down, remove all bubbles, I used a credit card and really made sure it was applied well. When you pull the label off, try and see what angle works best for you. I started mine at the corner and pulled at a constant 45 degree angle across the label, and pulled it up off the mailbox at about 20 degrees. Once the label was on, I went over the individual numbers and letters again just to make sure they were pressed down, this time using something glass so it wouldn't rub off on the label.

rating 5.0. Looks so cute and was easy to apply! I love how this turned out!  Unfortunately it went on a little crooked but what can you do lol. Our numbers to our house are actually covered by a really big bush so no one can ever find our house so this was a perfect solution. I actually ended up spray painting our mailbox instead of buying a new one and then when I found this, it was like the cherry on top!

rating 5.0. Absolutely love I honestly have no clue what other reviewers were fussing about... it was easy to install. Went on perfectly. Looks clean and professional. It took all of five minutes to apply it. I used a plastic scraper tool to make sure it went on easily with no bubbles, and I just followed the instructions. If the lettering wasn't sticking to the mailbox, I went back over it with the scraper and all was well.

rating 4.0. A few details I wasn't expecting This bag arrived on great condition, the quality is very good. There are some dark spots where it looks like the leather was either artificially aged or maybe rubbed in transit? They do not detract from the natural look, I like that the bag doesn't look brand new. The canvas lining is green so things don't disappear into a black hole in the bucket, the lighter color helps see things inside. A cheap purse insert organizer works well in the main part of the bag. The two inside pockets are very nice. One zipper pocket on either side and they are bigger than expected. The top bag zipper closes from either end or the zippers can meet in the middle. The dual zipper does restrict the width of the opening just a bit tho. I have a 14inch laptop and it's a tight fit. The pocket on the front is lined as well. I deducted a star because the flap and snap on the pocket aren't lined up exactly and take a bit of fiddling to get it snapped. If you have much in the front pocket it won't snap it is designed to be snapped when almost flat. The flap doesn't have any expandability like the pocket does and that's why I deducted one star. The bag arrives very flat and I plan to take time to stuff it full and straighten out the bottom so maybe it will stand up? Overall I'm very happy with this and for what I paid for it.

rating 4.0. Gorgeous! But I suspect the "stones" are acrylic Overall, I'm happy with this purchase and I think the earrings are absolutely gorgeous.
THE PROS: I feel like the earrings are exactly as pictured, and I don't understand the reviews that say they are larger or smaller than expected. They are very shiny and sparkly, and the blue is just a small pop of color against my dark hair. The wires are comfortable and lightweight -- I don't understand the criticism that they would need silicone plugs to hold them securely, because they are shaped in such a way that they cannot fall out easily. I've never seen ear wires shaped like this, and I really like it! To me, the wires are sturdy, not fragile -- but I don't recommend sleeping in these.

THE CONS: For what they are, I think they are slightly over-priced. But that's subjective and a minor quibble. The main complaint -- I wish the seller would be honest about what the "stones" are. These do not seem to be quartz, and I don't even think they're glass or crystal. I suspect the "gems" are made from high-quality acrylic. Because they're lovely, I don't mind what the material is, EXCEPT that it makes it hard to know how to care for them. Will the "stones" survive a quick dip in silver cleaner when the wires become tarnished? How to know?

There's no stamp indicating .925 sterling silver, and I guess there's not room for one.
I'd worry more about the seller's "gold" version of these, which looks like it is gold plate over sterling -- again, without accurate info on the materials, buyers don't know how to care for the items to keep them looking shiny and new. I hope the seller sees this and responds with transparency about what the "gems" are made of.

rating 5.0. Great little item from a great seller Great little functional piece of pottery that was the perfect addition to the floating shelves I built for the water closet in my master bathroom.  Comes with a starter set of strike anywhere matches.  I agree with above review that it is best to strike the matches in the bottom of the pot to avoid color transfer on the visible surfaces of the pot.  The seller was fantastic, when I reached out to her about a shipping issue (the postal carrier's mistake as it turned out) she was quick to reply and offer solutions.  It is a small piece, so don't be surprised by that, but it's meant to hold matches, how big could it possibly be?  It came packaged in a cute little cloth bag that would be suitable for gifting and the matches even came in a little glass jar that can be reused.  Super pleased.

rating 5.0. Cuter than my box of cardboard matches and it works! The matches were easy to strike on surface of this little vase and lit up right away. I strike the match at the bottom, but you can strike anywhere along the surface for striking.  I wasn’t expecting to get a set of matches with the order so that was a nice extra. It does take “strike anywhere” matches and regular matches won’t work, but those matches are easy and inexpensive to find on Amazon for when you need a resupply. I had an issue with the shipping and the seller was diligent and quick to reply to my messages to make sure my package was delivered.

rating 4.0. Good Beautifully made.  Quite small, but that was stated.  I purchased it because the striker on the side of a large box of “strike anywhere” matches usually wears out long before the box is empty. When I first got this  striker at the end of the summer,  it only worked on the glass sealed little jar of matches that came with it, not the matches in my box with the worn out striker patch. Now that the weather is more cold and dry it also is usually  an effective striker for the matches for which it  was purchased. If you want to leave it out as a decorative piece ( as it is quite lovely), just use the bottom part to strike, as the matches do leave streaks when struck. As a whole, I recommend this little striker-  just have your matches sealed in glass or plastic, because ANY measure of moisture or humidity and it won’t work at all.
