input: rating 5.0. I am very pleased with this press I am very pleased with this press!  My husband did a lot of research before selecting this one.  The hardwood makes it less likely to break.  (Yes, the cast iron ones break, apparently pretty frequently.)  It's a beautiful piece!  The tortillas were delicious.  (We ended up making some every day over Christmas week.) Lastly, the customer service was outstanding.  The hardware was not included (by accident) when we received the press.  However, when we notified Central Coast Woodworks, our contact person sent a new bolt right away and more than made up for the error.  Get this press!

rating 5.0. Beautiful and functional This is a truly well designed piece of kitchen equipment. I started looking for a new tortilla press because the one that I have (metal, pretty inexpensive) does not make flat tortillas - they end up looking like wedges, and try as I might, I cannot make them nice and flat.

I found this one on Amazon and emailed the artisan who creates them. He explained to me what width of tortilla to expect and how he ensures that the tortilla will be flat. Basically, it is well designed and will make consistently thin tortillas (about 1/16 of an inch or 2mm) every time.

The press is beautifully made and works perfectly every single time. I like it so much that I keep it on my counter all the time. Making tortillas is so easy now that I do it even on weeknights for dinner.

I cannot speak highly enough of this product or the excellent customer service I received by Jason of Central Coast Woodworks.

(No, I did not receive a discount or a free product, I just love it this much!)

rating 5.0. Made in USA This item is very nice. Very well-made.

I am new to making my own tortillas. So perhaps I have a lot to learn. Before this arrived, I made the dough, and cooked them by putting a small ball of dough on a cast Iron pan (Lodge) and flattening it with a cast iron press (again, Lodge). It worked well.

The first few times I used this, when I squished the dough ball, came apart when I opened the press. Some of the tortilla was suck on the top portion, and some stuck on the bottom portion. I used quite of bit of olive oil (because that's all I had) to help keep it form sticking. Then I saw on the instructions not to use olive oil. So I ordered some mineral oil.

Also, when you press a clump of dough into a tortilla, the press is very hard to open again.

rating 5.0. Prevent taco deficiency with this tortilla press! Seriously, this tortilla press has forever changed my life! I was able to successfully revers my taco deficiency with the Taco Cleanse and with this beautiful wood press and stunning work of art. Freshly made corn/plantain tortillas are now enjoyed in our house almost every night of the week. I probably cook more tortillas than a Tarahumara grandma. I highly recommend this press by Central Coast Woodworks for anyone who wants to prevent or reverse taco deficiency. It may be a life threatening illness, so get the help you need. Detox your way to vibrant health never imagined!

rating 5.0. The absolute best tortilla press! Absolutley love my new tortilla press! My family loves my homemade tortillas, but it was rare when i did make them because my last metal tortilla press didn't flatten the dough out right and it was a pain to work with. I decided one day I needed to invest in a better press and found this here on amazon. It really is a heavenly press and wonderful to work with and so beautiful too! it arrived very fast and flattens the tortillas out evenly and perfectly! it even improved the way they cooked.
Lovely workmanship and such a nice piece of kitchen ware to display on my countertop. Because of this press I will be making more homemade corn tortillas for my family!
I attached a few photos of my tortillas cooking on the grill and one after it was pressed. You do need to use some plastic to be able to remove the tortillas (that goes for any press) I like to use a ziplock bag cut in half.
rating 5.0. You will not be disappointed! This extremely well made! The craftsman obviously takes pride in their work! You will not be disappointed!

rating 5.0. This is great. Works amazing for corn tortillas This is great.  Works amazing for corn tortillas.  Flour tortillas still needed to be rolled out in order to achieve ideal thinness, but the press got them in a near perfect circle, which helps immensely with rolling. Also, we had a really hard time finding food grade mineral oil to condition the wood after use.  We are in a major metropolitan area with several stores which could possibly carry it.  I want to keep it looking nice.  We ended up getting cutting board oil from Ikea. I don't know if it is the same, but it appears to work fine. In short, it is both beautiful and functional.

rating 5.0. Form and function Beautiful and functional...it was not easy for someone with arthritis (me) to get the handle attached, but after a friend helped, it worked so well! Lovely out and so easy to make just a few tacos for dinner

rating 5.0. Helps me make uniform tortillas This is a beautifully made tortilla press.  I am happy to leave it displayed on my counter.  I found that it does not get the tortillas as thin as I would like, but it does press them evenly.  So I pat the dough balls into thick discs and then use the press to flatten it.  Then I flip the flattened disc, hand press it down more and press again.  The result is a tortilla that is still too thick for my preferences, but it is very even.  This allows me to transfer it to my 12 inch cast iron skillet and quickly hand press the tortilla to the edges of the pan.  The tortillas come out very uniform in shape and we love them.  Previously, I had been rolling them out with a rolling pin, however those tortillas were not even and very ruffled.  They still tasted great, but were harder to use for wraps and definitely took longer to get the tortilla making process done.

rating 5.0. I'm in love with a tortilla press. I never imagined I would fall in love with a tortilla press, but I have. This is a piece of workmanship and artistry that works perfectly. I was using an inexpensive metal press for years. I really had to finesse it in order to get semi-even tortillas. So I decided to splurge (it really isn't that expensive) and buy this press because of the reviews. I purchased the medium size (10"). As soon as it arrived I broke out the masa and decided to put the press to the test. My first tortilla was perfect. And all others were as well. There is nothing like fresh tortillas. So few people make them and yet they are so easy. And this beautiful press makes it even more fun. Treat yourself - you will love it!

rating 5.0. EXCELLENT!!! I've been making tortillas, both corn and flour, since I was three years old--that's 67 years! So, IMHO, I know whereof I speak (or write, as the case may be).

Customer service is important to all of us. How many times have you placed an order and have the product in hand in three days? Not too many, I'd wager. I placed my order on Wednesday, August 17, 2016; it was shipped that day and I received it today, August 20th and just in time for lunch!

You may think, "What? Almost $60 (including shipping) for a tortilla press? I can get one for $______ ." Yes, you can, but not all presses are created equal. In my lifetime, I have owned more than 20 presses; this one easily surpasses them all. It looks beautiful in the photos on Amazon and it's equally impressive "in person." Keep in mind that this is a hand-crafted product; it's sturdy. If a tank would run over it, the tank would most likely throw a tread. Well, okay, I'm exaggerating, but you get the idea.

Using it is easy, even for an old geezer like me. If you've never used one before, there's a slight learning curve, learning the position of the dough ball and the pressure to apply to get the size and thickness you desire. Heed the advice of other reviewers and use a plastic freezer bag (don't use a thinner bag as peeling the dough off will be more difficult) to prevent sticking. Just be sure to cut it to the size of the press; don't leave ends overhanging as the dough may tear due to the plastic curling. But even if that happens, just roll the dough into a ball again and press. And as noted in the Q&A section, this is for CORN tortillas only.

I can't say enough good things about this product, and NO--I'm not a member of the family, a friend or being compensated for this review. The press really is that good!

rating 5.0. It's gorgeous and works like a charm I absolutely adore this product. It's simple, well-made and I've used it for tortillas, cookies, biscuits and burgers. It's gorgeous and works like a charm.

rating 5.0. Works for Both Corn and Flour and Looks Great This is a functional and beautiful item.  Construction is solid and it works extremely well and presses corn tortillas faster than I can cook them.  Nothing beats fresh made, especially if you want to vary the sizes for the particular purpose.  I have also used it with flour tortillas and it works great as a starter.  With the corn you press and cook as the tortilla will not shrink on you or change sizes when you pull it out of the press.  With flour you press it the same way (between two sheets of thick plastic; a cut plastic zip-lock bag) but take the entire bag out and then roll it three or four times while still between the plastic sheets.  Roll it super thin and when you pull it out it shrinks just a bit to the perfect size.

rating 5.0. It is super sturdy and easy to use I have read so much about aluminum and cast iron presses breaking which led me to this one.  It is super sturdy and easy to use.  It also has the benefit of being an attractive counter piece.  The craftsmanship is on point; every joint is flawless.  It also comes with instructions on how to care for the finish.  It's worth much more than the price here.
rating 5.0. Yup! Exactly as I had hoped: high quality materials and craftsmanship, turns out perfect tortillas.

rating 5.0. It's nice enough as to where I would love to display ... So I had to wait until I actually made corn tortillas with this press to leave a review. As you can tell by the photo's provided by the maker that this is a stunning piece of wood work. It's nice enough as to where I would love to display it, but space in my kitchen is sparse si ti stays in its shipping box until needed. I've been considering a corn tortilla press for years now, but was hesitant because the cast ones break. I'd rather spend $70 for an unbreakable than $25 on a breakable. I want to pass my tortilla maker on to family after I croak. This fits the bill.

Now onto the important stuff. I ordered the 10 inch which is the perfect size after measuring store bought corn tortillas. I researched corn tortilla recipes for a year and ended up using the New York Times recipe that Mark Bittman created called 'almost from scratch corn tortillas'. It's the best recipe out there. I followed the recipe which turned out soft, pliable dough. This press turned out 12 of the most perfect corn tortillas I've ever seen. My wife and i were shocked. I lined it with both sides of a plastic ziplock bag, put a ping pong ball sized piece of dough between the plastic, closed it and then pressed it and the tortillas came out perfect every time. This was also the very first time I've ever made tortillas so this is easy. The end result blows away store bought.

Save yourself the years of research i did and just buy this press. The others are cheap junk. Just make sure and follow the instructions and oil it with food grade mineral oil once or twice a year and this press will last forever. Oh yeah, it's also a piece of art so if you have the room to leave it out, do it.

rating 5.0. Five Stars This is one beautiful tortilla press

rating 4.0. Beautiful, mostly useful tortilla press Reasons I bought this press:
1.) Rolling tortillas takes a lot of time and effort for what I get out of it. My husband LOVES the homemade tortillas, I personally am fine with store bought. So making homemade wasn't something I did very often. I wanted a press that would make the process less effort for me. This press overall does make the process easier. It does not make the tortillas as thin as I would like on its own. I use a cut gallon bag ziplock bag as a liner so after I press them I also roll them. The press does give me a good, round starting point so that I only have to roll a couple of times before I get the thickness I want.

2.) I wanted to be able to make large tortillas/pizza dough. This was the reason I chose THIS press. Most of the presses aren't as big as this one. I do like that I can make a large pizza crust quickly without having to roll out sticky dough. Our family easily eats 2 pizza's in one meal and will only need to make more as our boys get older. This press will be a life saver over the years.

3.) This press is beautiful. I can leave it on the counter and use it frequently without having to dig out another piece of kitchen equipment. I don't use/have a lot of specialty kitchen equipment, but this was one thing I requested.

The reason it gets 4 stars is that it doesn't get the flour tortilla's as thin as I would like. To be fair I knew it would be a long shot to get something to press the tortillas super thin, but I expected this press to get them thinner after reading other reviews. I added extra layers (super thin cutting boards) to help make the tortillas thinner, but even that was insufficient.

Overall, I would recommend this press. It feels like it will last for years to come and I look forward to making many delicious tortillas/pizzas/???.

rating 5.0. Beautiful and makes perfect tortillas Beautiful and makes perfect tortillas. I'm sorry to see a review that gives it 1 star for not making " big enough" tortillas. My goodness please if it's an 8" press it will make a tortilla of a max diameter of 8". Some people just can't be pleased and certainly can't do math. Anyway, I can't imagine wanting a tortilla larger than 8".

I will be buying off the site from now on.
The polish lasted me 1 week without chipping. Normally I can go a day or 2 and get chipping. Even with gel polish. My only wish it that it was just a little brighter, but it won't stop me from buying again.

rating 5.0. BEST NAIL POLISH EVER!! This is probably the best nail polish I've ever used.  It stays on for what seems like forever!  I am VERY hard on my nails and it takes A LOT of work to get this stuff to chip.  It lasts so well, I think my nail lady was worried that I wouldn't be making as frequent of visits as normal.  Everywhere I go people constantly compliment this nail polish and the color Mr. Mint.  I promise you, don't let the price fool you - it is a good investment and will last you a long time.  I used to keep the bottle in my purse in case I needed to do a quick fix - that was a joke.  I have NEVER had to fix anything.  I have gone almost 16 days in between applications and have been presently surprised of how well it held up.  I highly recommend this polish - especially for kids or adults that do a lot of typing or are hard on their nails.  PS.. I also love that they are in Richardson, TX really close to me, so I'm also supporting a local, small business. :)

input:
rating 5.0. Nice little rings I ordered three of these rings. They appear to be of good quality silver and I love the simple hammered design. A 5 1/4 fits my ring finger perfectly so I could wear a 5 or a 5 1/5. Its sometimes hard to get half sizes in silver rings so I really appreciate that this seller offers that. I ordered them in a 5 1/2 because this style of ring often runs a little small but they are actually true to size. The are very comfortable to wear but my only concern is that they are extremely dainty and thin. I'm almost afraid they might bend easily with daily wear. Other than that I really like them. I just hope that they wear well.

*****UPDATE*****
I've been wearing them almost daily since I received them and they are surprisingly strong for their size. They have no changed color in any way or tarnished. I've had no problems with them. They're good quality and so comfortable that I almost forget I have them on. I love them so much that I'm considering buying more to stack on my middle finger as well. They're just beautifully made rings. Very happy with them.

rating 5.0. Love the rings, problem with shipping/order I absolutely love my rings.  I first ordered a silver ring and then ordered a rose gold and gold one. The only negative comment I have is that I had to place two different orders for the gold and rose gold and was charged shipping for both yet I received 1 box with two rings in it. I don't think I should have been charged for two shipping rates since they shipped it in one box and I don't like the fact that they assumed that both rings were for me,  they very well could have been ordered as gifts, so two ring boxes in that case would have been nice. But over all the rings are gorgeous and fit perfectly.
rating 5.0. Great Stacking Rings Just what I wanted!  These are thin and shiny and stack around my Solitaire just perfectly! Very happy I purchased these!

rating 5.0. Sturdy, beautiful and delicate but STRONG! These bands are SOOOOO comfortable. I bought them in every color. I wear a size 8 and they fit perfectly. I suggest you buy a set of AT LEAST 6.

rating 5.0. Beautiful!! They came really quick and the seller ... Beautiful!! They came really quick and the seller was awesome when I had questions. I'm so happy with how they came out. I've gotten many compliments on how lovely they are.

rating 4.0. Nice rings! Beautiful rings!  I'm really happy with them. They work well with my other rings and when stacked with other things I can change the look of my rings to match my mood. rating 5.0. Most stacking rings look like parts from a piece of machinery The photographs of these rings cannot do them justice: they are exquisite and super-fine to both the eyes and the fingers. Most stacking rings look like parts from a piece of machinery. These rings are so bright, delicate, (sturdy, too), faceted from the hammering, and simply beautiful enough to wear even as singles. The whole exchange with these artisans was a pleasure. Very rapid delivery for custom work. Could not be more pleased nor more highly recommend.

rating 5.0. The best accent ring ever I ordered three of these in rose gold. One as an accent ring on my pointer finger or thumb on the same hand as my rose gold engagement ring and oh my goodness, they are PERFECTION! I wanted something subtle, wouldn’t take attention away from my wedding ring, but accent the rose gold and that is EXACTLY this ring!

I also bought one silver, one gold & one rose gold to wear on my right hand ring finger as well. They are seamless & timeless! I wash my hands wearing them & they are still 100% same as the day I first put them on!

Love these! Dainty but the perfect accent ring!

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Happy return customer So happy with my first purchase, I ordered two more items.  Super fast shipping. Tree is easily assembled but very heavy duty.  Easy to follow instructions & helpful tips are included. FOLLOW THEM!  The hardest part was washing the tree in warm soapy water.  If you plan to leave your tree unpainted, I guess you could skip washing it.  I primed & painted mine, & knew the paint wouldn't stick if I skipped that step.  Very cool, well made products.
other_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Nice looking piece This product is very well made & pretty.  It's not just plain metal or rebar.  The main "stem" is twisted like nice wrought iron with a closed loop at the top & bottom.  I'm satisfied with the product & would recommend it. Quick shipping from seller & packed well with good instructions. Seller suggested washing the piece with warm soapy water to remove any oil or grease & also painting it.  I did both but the washing part wasn't easy.  I put two old cotton tube socks over one hand, wet them, squirted some Dawn dish soap on them & went to work scrubbing the bottle tree. I was outside & used the garden hose to scoot off the suds, hung it to dry, then primed it. I liked the look with just the gray primer so that's how I left it.  To position each stem, slip a piece of pipe or pvc over each & bend outward as suggested in sellers instructions.

rating 1.0. You get what you pay for… I bought these earrings two months ago and while they looked nice, there were a few issues right off the bat. The posts were crooked (like they had been bent and someone tried to fix them before packaging) and the backs would not sit flush- they always cocked to one side or the other.

Well, I figured whatever and made the best of them. Earlier this week one of the posts snapped off in my ear while I was sleeping. Now I’ve been wearing earrings for over two decades, never have I had a post break off in my ear under ANY circumstance. After looking at the earrings closer, I noticed the connection between the post and earring was faulty from the start. I contacted the seller and they suggested it was MY fault for putting too much pressure on the earring and suggested I take it to a silversmith to fix the ‘bend’. I reiterated that the post snapped off entirely and they doubled down saying there’s nothing they can do and a silversmith will fix it in a few seconds. Yeah, I get that… but I’m not paying more than the cost of both earrings to have one post fixed.

Now I understand it’s outside of the return window, but I have never EVER had a seller outright refuse to do anything when it comes to a defective product- ESPECIALLY after only two months. I mean, earrings aren’t supposed to just break under normal use. So yeah, garbage earrings and garbage customer service. They look pretty, but so does some stuff at the dollar store. Doesn’t mean it’s well made.

rating 4.0. Great conversation pieces for a very small room These pictures are cute. I bought two pictures of the same basic design, and the steampunk cat was one of them. The other one was the octopus. Great conversation pieces for a very small room. I hung them in a small bathroom and they were immediately noticed.

I would not suggest using them in a large room. They would get lost and moreover I would suggest higher quality art in a living room or a family room or more personal art. One needs to get up close to enjoy the fact that vintage dictionary pages are used for the paper medium. A small room facilitates that. As such I am most pleased with displaying them in a small bathroom. Perfect as a matter of fact! Gives people something to look at while seated ...

rating 5.0. Very Happy! The Basics: The item arrived very quickly packaged neatly and EXPERTLY crafted. The braiding and knots are so well crafted and so tiny as an outdoorsmen that has been braiding and tying knots for decades I felt my mancard was threatened until I realized it is ok to buy products from experts.

Fit and Finish: The item is quite adjustable and fit me perfectly. The kids had to help me tighten the bracelet as I seem inept at pulling both ends myself but that was a small price to pay. The bracelet looks good on me and it gets noticed a great deal with a healthy barrage of compliments.

Power: Look, I can't say if this thing works metaphysically, I'm no expert in that department and my logical side says that if this type of item IS WORKING you simply won't know because you won't know how much it has protected you. I know I feel better with it on, and I'm ok with that.

So many of these charms are way too feminine or dainty - there just doesn't seem to be much of a marketing campaign aimed at guys like me. This enterprising young artist got my money because she had exactly what I was looking for, when I wanted and in a package I feel good about wearing. Thank you!

rating 5.0. Outstanding Customer Service For Us Less Tech Savy I bought these lamps on impulse after seeing an advertisement. I had no idea they existed. So first off, I have to say the concept of keeping in touch through a light is brilliant! I had the pair shipped to my home and kept one and shipped the other to my dad. I am in NY, my dad is in NJ. There is a set-up tutorial from Filimin on Youtube- for you visuals. Otherwise there is simple step-by-step instructions that will come with your light. The lights are shipped in great protective packaging. The light works by Wifi, so each person that has a light has to have private wifi. The light itself is personally crafted with the name of who put it together written on the bottom of your lamp! 0: :) The colors to choose from are plentiful and very rich/luminous. It makes for great decor as well as its function of keeping you in touch with your loved ones. After you set-up your lamp, you invite other people who have a lamp to join your group on your filimin registration page. This is done by simply sending an e-mail. So, after wifi, you do have to have your loved ones e-mail. If you get at-all stuck or confused, the Filimin site offers their assistance by phone or e-mail. I can personally say, their customer service is great. You do have to wait about an hour for a response, but they help you until your light is set-up and running for those of you not too tech-savy (even though you don't have to be to own one of these). It was helpful for me to write down my Dad's Filimin ID before mailing it to him- so I can talk with Customer Service. I did order another lamp as a single and directly mailed it to my aunt from Amazon. Single lamps have the same set-up and instructions. I do plan on buying more as time goes on. They are a little pricey, but its uniqeness makes up for the price. I am really satisfied with this product and customer service!

rating 1.0. Great gift! ...While it lasts. Got this for my mom and we both love it! It was so cool to see the light change when the other person was thinking of you. Setup was nothing: you pretty much just plug it in and it works. Awesome! ...for about 4 months. Then they stopped connecting and just stopped working. Now they’re useless. So yeah—super cool while they last. Unfortunately they don’t last very long at all. Just came home one day and it wasn’t working. I expected them to hold up a lot longer than just 4 months!
rating 5.0. Great gift Got these for my best friend and I. They have been amazing! No issues and easy set up.

rating 5.0. Totally Awesome! My family is not too far apart physically, only about 30 minutes by car, and while we are close knit, as we all know, life gets busy.  So we got these for my Dad's birthday, to help keep us in touch with each other.  I don't know which was better, the product or the company that makes them!  The product is perfect, and we set it up within a few minutes.  Color wars and sibling rivalry immediately erupted, and we had way too much fun just touching the lamps in full blow battles!  I have to also give great credit to the company, as I got in touch with them over a need for shipping changes, and they responded that day and immediately accommodated me!  I love to deal with people, especially ones who not only know what they are doing by creating an awesome product, but also ones who are kindhearted.  I can't recommend the lights or the company highly enough!  If you are considering it, quit wavering and do it--you won't regret it!

It was easy to set up and we both use it all the time to let the other know she's being thought of at that very moment. We've been using them for about 6 months now, and works perfect every time.

rating 5.0. Best gift ever! My daughter moved out of state and I purchased this gift for her birthday although its pricey its fabulous. The best feeling in the world is to be sitting in your Livingroom and see the light come on! You instantly feel happy and loved ! I am an empty nester so you cant place a price on that feeling. Totally  worth the money . The light turned on as I am typing this review!

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Ahhhhmazing - we love these lamps!! [[VIDEOID:f5297dd888bab8228722b380074534ff]] I bought  a pair of lamps, completed the order so I had the order number, then purchased a single lamp and added the first order number into the single lamp order. All three lamps were able to be paired together. When we took them out of the box, we had to go online to set them up and select a color. It was a bit complicated at first, but once we knew what we were doing it was simplified. The three lamps are all different colors. They had to be connected to wifi in order to work. One kid is in Wyoming, and the other two in Florida an hour apart, each assigned a different color. When one person touches it, the other two lights up with their color. You can set a timer for how long they stay lit. They will remain the color of the last person to touch it until it turns off or until someone else touches it. We love these lamps.!!!

rating 5.0. Superb for ravaged sinuses I’ve been quite sick with a flu from hell and 3 weeks later still have ravaged sinuses and airway. I used Vick’s shower tabs which were fine but a little medicinal and a little expensive, found these babies for a fraction of the per use cost and they’re DIVINE. Love the fragrance, soothing experience for my dry and abused nasal and lung tissues...  and so grateful for the 2 freebie tabs that made this even more economic. So pleased, I’ll continue to use these into wellness because it makes for such an enjoyable shower.  The yellow/morning fragrance is not irritating for me as an allergy and asthma sufferer; recommend not placing directly into the path of your water spray because they will disintegrate way too fast - as indicated on the instructions.
rating 5.0. Great They smell great and last a few showers. Love them

rating 5.0. REALLY SOOTHING DURING THIS CHOTIC TIMES I wanted something to create some "happiness" during our 2.25 month stay at home order in Hawaii and I love the benefits of aromatherapy so I was happy to accidentally find these shower steamers on Amazon.  I understand that these are developed to "melt" in the shower but it's a fine line between the steam melting it vs too much water hitting it and it melts too quickly.  I've experimented with different ways to best use this product without having an entire square melt in a single shower and I've found that the best method it to put the square on a soap rack (metal rack that drains and dries) and sprinkle it with a little water and let the steam do the rest.  This way, I can stretch one cube to 3-4 showers!!!

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Elephant love I've purchased somewhere around 12 of these lovely prints. As one review said, yes, it's an image printed on a piece of dictionary paper, but it's also artistic and different from the mainstream; these combine multiple levels of thought to give you a beautiful print to hang up, make a collage with, or sit and learn some new words!  THEY COME UNFRAMED. You can easily buy a frame in tandem with this from the huge selection Amazon has. The ink doesn't soak the dictionary paper so you can read right through to the print itself! The themes available are unique and quirky and absolutely wonderful little stories of their own. I'm happy with my pieces of printed dictionary paper :) Great artwork and a great way to present it!

I'm happy with my pieces of printed dictionary paper :) Great artwork and a great way to present it!

rating 5.0. Perfect These prints are fantastic for a writer/reader like me! They're unique, original, and so many to choose from! I have no complaints at all about this product other than I may be buying some more soon!

rating 5.0. Star Blues I have purchased four items from this seller and will continue to buy from her! This little beauty is a periwinkle druzy agate, and it is absolutely beautiful! The item came exactly as expected, with quick shipping and plenty of packing, including the cloth bag containing the jewelry box. It was wrapped up beautifully. Upon opening, it sparkled in the light and has some color variation which makes it look fantastic against the different clothing you might wear. The pendant is tiny, but not so tiny it gets lost, and the chain is sturdy, well wrapped around the pendant, and quality silver. The length is shorter, 16", but we all have those times we prefer a shorter chain and this is special enough to wait for an occasion to wear it! I've gotten a slew of compliments on it and always let them know where I found it. Highly recommend!

rating 5.0. Blue Dream This is the most beautiful ring I have ever seen, much less had the pleasure to own.
My birthstone is sapphire, and when I saw this 15 carat beauty I had to have it. It's very well made, all of the wiring and soldering is done so it looks smooth--that kind of melding together that makes a quality ring just work perfectly. The faceting is great--you can see the inclusions in the stone in different lights and they kind of shine from within, making the item just a little more fascinating. I wear this every day and have gotten tons of compliments. The artisan completed the ring quickly but with attention to detail, and it was shipped exactly on time. Highly Recommend!

input: rating 2.0. Disappointing I was really hoping this would smell the way I remember christmas trees smelling when I was a kid.  Unfortunately, that is not the case for this product. rating 5.0. Smells like the pine forest I am super sensitive to artificial smells - I literally gag when walking by the door of a Yankee Candle or Bath and Body Works.  This scent is not fake at all - truly smells like pine.

rating 5.0. Instant smell upgrade to any room Great smell. Using it in my bathroom and it instantly brought the scent of pine into the room. I have had it for almost 3 weeks and the smell is still going strong.

rating 5.0. Closest thing to real tree fragrance We purchased an artificial tree last year and missed the subtle fragrance of the real thing. Ordered this in hopes it might help. We have our tree in a great room so I expected it to be underwhelming, which it is. But, it adds just a hint of true tree smell that I ordered another to help out.

If you want a fragrance from the sap on your hands after decorating your tree, this is the one for you. It's perfect!

rating 5.0. Brings back memories Nice crisp evergreen fragrance made me remember walking through a Christmas tree lot on a frozen December night. Kind of pricey, but it's scenting an 8 by 10 foot living room space very well.
rating 5.0. Awesome I love love this smell! Smells just like live Christmas tree with long lasting smell.🙂

rating 2.0. Doesn't smell like for -- overpowered by sugar scent A Christmas tree is supposed to smell like fir. This smells nothing like it. I was thinking maybe the steep price tag per volume was to compensate for the technical difficulty in extracting the pine scent. Nope. It's simply marketing ploy.

The packaging and label were designed in such way to think that it is a real deal of homemade organic stuff. It looks so rustic. Heck, there's even traces of pine needle when I open the packaging.

But there is little to almost no trace of fir scent, if at all. Instead it's dominated by sweet sugar scent, bringing it into the area of gourmand.

Now I appreciate creative liberty in interpreting scents of the nature, or a particular theme. Maybe the nose of the maker was intending to evoke the Christmas as an experience instead, where there's candy cane, gingerbread, etc, but this is nothing like the smell of Christmas tree.

Save the 25 bucks you're intending to spend on this, visit Home Depot's tree section instead.

rating 5.0. Great diffuser! Bought this to help my house smell a bit more festive for the Yule holiday, and it smells exactly like I have a live tree in the apartment. It's not overpowering or anything, just the perfect amount!

rating 5.0. Want your house to smell like a REAL Christmas Tree? If you want your house to smell like a real Christmas tree but don't have a real one, look no further. This scent is perfection. ON. I bought two of these for our home this holiday season only because I wanted that Christmas Tree smell to spread EVERYWHERE! This will be your best buy of the holiday season, and the perfect holiday gift.

rating 5.0. Simple words to grasp... This piece is a joy to wear.  The Latin gives it a special, distinguished look.  The verbiage is simple but strong, which is what gives me the strength to work through something I never thought I would have to face.  I did shorten the chain so it showed better in the many v-neck tee shirts I tend to wear.  Just while grocery shopping I have had people stop me to pay compliments on the necklace. I'm not sure what metal is used, but it hasn't discolored at all even worn in hot weather.  Should you know someone going through a challenge, this necklace might be just the item to help.  It is something I value...

input: rating 5.0. Wow!!! The colors are so VIBRANT! I’m almost speechless! I got this for my daughter and she absolutely loves it. It’s perfect for your pocket for transportation for use when needed. And did I tell you the colors are AMAZING!?!? 💕

rating 5.0. Love it! Absolutely love my mobii! Thank you so much for this great design!

rating 5.0. Great product from a small business! This is my second medium mobii fidget ball.  I love Geoff's work.  My orders were processed quickly, even for my custom color selections and they arrived without long delays.  In total, I now have 9 of his fidget balls (7 small and 2 mediums) and I'm sure I'll be ordering more in the future.  Love these things, they keep my restless hands busy while at work and at home.  Easy to carry and perfect in size, at least for me.

rating 5.0. Very Satisfying I bought two customized small ones and one rainbow medium one. They are very well-made, very fun to play with, and look fantastic! I've been looking for this kind of toy for a really long time, and now I finally got what I want! It is perfect for people who need to keep their fingers busy to focus in class and solve hard problems. In particularly, this is a great alternative to playing with your keys or clicking with your pens in class or office, which might be quite annoying to the others.

Although two of three metal knots are with customized colors, they still arrived at my doorstep within a week. Very impressive on that. I certainly wish the rainbow one can contain more colors--it now has red, orange, yellow, green, blue, indigo, and violet, which are indeed the colors commonly in a rainbow--but, it probably won't hurt if we have some in-between colors. However, this "standard" rainbow colored knot just look fine to me, of course.

The other super trivial complain is that the name Möbii, which is I assume is a tribute to the famous Mobius band, is not mathematically correct here. Hopf fibration would definitely be way, way more accurate, but probably not a very good brand choice anyway. (Please ignore this paragraph which is pure nerdy talk.)

rating 5.0. Best there Is! I am so happy with my order from Steel Lynx. The Stress Mobius Toy is the perfect size to fit in my hand, my pocket or whereever to keep it handy for when my hands get bored.
It's not heavy, it's very light weight and the rings move very easily around each other and through each other - satisfying the habit of twisting, tugging or pulling. I even find the sound that the little steel bands make in moving around each other to be satisfying.
The colors I chose in my custom colorization order are amazing, they are vibrant and exciting. They are way better in person and I love them.
The order time to delivery was short than expected and I am so happy with my order I will definitely purchase from Steel Lynx again, and soon!

rating 2.0. Little too big and not quiet I was interested to try this fidget toy. I purchased the small and the medium. It was nice to be able to choose the colors. I really like the look of them. The small one is a nicer size for my hand and had more of a fluid movement. The medium size had more rings and didn't move as easily. These are definitely not silent like other fidget toys. They would slip out of my hand often also. So, would not be a good choice for a student in a class or an adult in a work environment. It wasn't my personal preference for a fidget toy since there wasn't much movement. I feel like the price for the small one is fair at $7.99 but the medium size is high at $19.99.  I prefer the roller chain fidget toy, sold elsewhere, that has silicone bands, it is silent and I can do more things with it.
rating 5.0. Best toy available for restless hands An absolutely beautiful product, fun for all ages.  I am in love with mine!

rating 5.0. Exactly what I needed I love this product! Much more durable than the plastic fidget toys I find in stores. The colors are wonderful! It fits perfectly in one hand which is exactly what I needed. The sound as you use it is soft and soothing. And I love that I got to customize colors for no extra charge.

rating 5.0. The only fidget device I use now Such an amazing product! I bought 12 different fidget devices off Amazon trying to find something that worked for me and didn't stress out/fatigue my hands. This is the only one I use anymore. Plus I got it in custom colors and they're the best!

rating 5.0. Beautiful, wonderful fun I bought one small unicorn rainbow and one medium custom to give as gifts. One was for a fidgety 13 year old and the other for a person with developmental disabilities. I'm sure they will love them, after I'm finished playing with my new colorful fidgety things. I have until Christmas Eve or until the others I've ordered arrive. Loads of fun. They are so incredibly beautiful as well. The photos just don't capture the gorgeous shine. You can't help yourself, you have to try them to make sure it's a nice gift. The small is perfect if you want to be discreet with fidgeting. The medium is nice for someone who may have fine motor skills issues.  I'm so glad I bought them and looking forward to having my own.

rating 5.0. Great for fidgeters! I love my fidget ball! I have 3 medium ones and 1 small one. I have big hands so the small one was too small and I drop it a lot, but I keep it in my purse for emergencies. I use these while watching tv, on a call, in a meeting, or even while driving (I use one hand). It has saved my cuticles!! And I love that you can pick the colors you want so it makes a great gift for fidgeters. They are made really well, they are quiet, and I prefer them over the spinners and other “toys” which can be more distracting to others people while I’m using it.

rating 5.0. Awesome for anxiety! I purchased a medium and picked my own colors.  When it arrived, I was absolutely entranced!  I now carry it around all the time, not only as a fidget item, but also when my anxiety becomes overwhelming, I focus on the cool metal, the amazing way the rings move each other, and it calms me right down!  I would highly recommend, and am considering buying a large as well!!!

rating 5.0. Great for even non-fidgeters I ordered two of these for my kids and my youngest (who really needs fidget stuff) scoffed at it. She didn't think it was even remotely cool or fun.... or so I thought. Come to find out she LOVES hers so much that it has its own spot in her esteemed backpack. She carries a small backpack with only her most important stuff and so the fact that this made the cut and she actually uses it is awesome. She's 15 and has ADHD and anxiety, but these help her cope. I'm actually going to order a few more for both my kids. (My oldest, who's 17, loves it too.) I played around with it for a few minutes and it was very fun and satisfying to feel the movement of the rings.
rating 5.0. beautiful and tactile Excellent fidget - makes for a great tactile experience. Colors are beautiful and fantastic customer service!

rating 5.0. My favorite fidget! It's beautiful! The size and weight are perfect. I asked for mostly emerald and forest green with random accents, and it's gorgeous. I love it! It's hard to find well-made fidgets that aren't juvenile, but the Mobii is the kind of thing I can drop in my purse and take out during meetings.

rating 5.0. Unique and perfect fidget! I have so many Mobii at this point that I have lost count. I have them in every size and tons of color combinations, with the medium sized Mobii outnumbering the others by a significant margin. The are a perfect size for most any hand; you can choose any variety of color combinations and customize your fidget (who doesn’t like that?!); and they make great gifts. The movement is smooth and never ending, and it is lightweight. I honestly have one in each vehicle and probably every jacket pocket.  I’ve also had quite a few “borrowed and never returned.”  :)  They really are addictive and unique. I highly, highly recommend these awesome fidgets!

rating 5.0. So quiet, and smooth, yet tactile. Perfect. current_product_reviews:
rating 5.0. Wonderful little things! Steel Lynx does a Fantastic job with these colorful and handy little fidget balls. They fit conveniently into a small pocket, and more importantly, they are not loud or distracting to others while being used. I bought my daughter a medium sized one several years ago, and found myself needing to use it myself lately. When these two arrived, the smaller one disappeared with her almost immediately. For those of you out there who've been feeling a little anxious lately (most of us!), this is a great purchase. It's helped me to curb some of my nervous habits, mainly unconsciously picking at my nails and very dry skin from the constant handwashing and sanitizing.

I've included a picture with a small sized one for comparison (my hands are smaller than average in size). I'm very, very happy with them!

In attempting to secure a remedy, the seller refused to accept my explanation that the metal is goldtone, and wanted to justify the color by saying that even argentium silver will tarnish. rating 5.0. Big Hit!! ❤️ Bought this for my long term boyfriend before he left for his first deployment. He doesn’t like to be too cheesy, he hates pet names, not into PDA and can seem kinda serious at times, but he’s a softy at heart who has tendencies to be really cheesy when it’s just us two.. you know the type. Anyway, I thought this would be perfect for him since the cheesy message is on the inside and it’s plain on the outside. He LOVES it! Big hit! He has to take it off to shower/swim. He told me the button turned his wrist green at first but after it wore off a bit it stopped. (Trick for that is to put clear fingernail polish over the button, but he just let it wear off) I also sprayed it with leather protector before he left. Really happy I found this! We will see how it holds up over time, but I would 100% recommend!

rating 3.0. They are beautiful bracelets and look very elegant but So I ordered two of these bracelets, one for my sister and one for me with our names on them. They are beautiful bracelets and look very elegant but...Before you order MAKE SURE to (1) PICK A LARGE BOLD FONT that will show up. Maybe even consider having all caps. I made that mistake and picked the font Black Jack. You can barely tell a name is there, only if you look hard enough. (2) MAKE SURE TO MEASURE YOUR WRIST- because I didn't realize we have smaller wrists and much of the extension hangs. They can shorten it or make it longer for you but only if you tell them beforehand. And if you want to fix the chain and send it back after it is delivered, you have to pay an additional price. I wish I was more diligent while making this order because then these bracelets would have been something we would have treasured for a long time. But I made a couple of mistakes and wanted to share with others so that they don't make the same mistakes I did.

rating 1.0. NO FRAMES. I am a frequent amazon shopper and purchase many items off this website. A couple of nights ago I was browsing online and thought these print were SO COOL. They were a little pricey at $12.99 for an 8x10 but I loved them so I went ahead and purchased them. Like 20 of them in different styles. Imagine my dissapointment when I was reviewing my order and amazon said they had been delivered to me yesterday? I was super confused. When I rechecked a box I thought was empty I found them lining the bottom. They were all UNFRAMED loose 8x10 photos. For $12.99 that is a total rip off! I should have read the descrption, which mentions this quite a few times but I went off the only photos of the product that are used which ALL SHOW FRAMES. Very dissapointed. The first photo and especially the only photo of the product should show the picture as the item is sold.

rating 5.0. Awesome High Quality Prints These arts prints are simply awesome.  No two are the same, and they add such style and character to a wall.  I find they look perfect in Ribba frames from my local Ikea.  I've had a lot of people compliment on them and even order some for themselves after seeing the ones I purchased.  The print quality is much better than I originally expected (at the low price point) and I've yet to see any signs of poor ink use.  I'm not entirely sure if these really are actual pages from an old dictionary or if they are reproductions, but they look good enough to fool me.  I've ordered four of these (different styles) so far, and every one of them impresses me with the quality when I open it (they are shipped in a stiff envelope, in a box).  Only one of them has been printed slightly off "perfect center" but the design of the print was so that it wasn't even noticeable, almost even appeared to be the way it was meant to be. I look forward to all the new designs they come out with!

rating 4.0. Perfect for a small room These pictures are cute. I bought two pictures of the same basic design, and the octopus was one of them. Great conversation pieces for a very small room. I hung them in a small bathroom and they were immediately noticed.

I would not suggest using them in a large room. They would get lost and moreover I would suggest higher quality art in a living room or a family room or more personal art. One needs to get up close to enjoy the fact that vintage dictionary pages are used for the paper medium. A small room facilitates that. As such I am most pleased with displaying them in a small bathroom. Perfect as a matter of fact! Gives people something to look at while seated ...

rating 5.0. It shipped in a sheet protector and was on excellent condition when it arrived Very well done, the colors are bright and the piece is well made from an artistic point of view. The upcycled dictionary page (I got the a page in the o's) was taken apart at the books seam and has clean edges. The paper is thin so it would not be suitable for putting up on the wall with a thumb tack or something similar but I put it in a frame the day I got it. It shipped in a sheet protector and was on excellent condition when it arrived.

rating 5.0. Perfect for everything but talking Black mask is thin enough to qualify as a face covering but not so sheer as to get you in trouble. Very breathable and comfortable as other reviewers said. Perfect if you're working quietly and not talking.

But...if you have to speak a lot in front of a group, moving your mouth, the mask can get moist and can stick to your lips and face. Since my favorite phrase is "Sufferin' Succotash!" I use a different mask when I have to talk a lot, but this one when I just have to wear one (mostly silently) for a long period of time.

rating 1.0. Placebo effect I've tried a lot of different masks, due to sensory issues that make it difficult to find one that works for me. This one is no more or less breathable than a basic cotton mask. All these people saying it's more breathable are getting a major placebo effect by rebelling against whatever they think they're rebelling against. If you like this mask I'd recommend buying a basic cotton one instead, that way you'll have the same amount of breathability and it will also be a little more effective in protecting those around you. Cotton also feels nicer against the face - the cheesecloth isn't terrible but it's not as soft as other materials.

rating 2.0. Wouldn't purchase again Definitely not anymore breathable than a t shirt material one. Also doesn't absorb moisture, so moisture just sits on your face. Significantly stretched out within first week of wear, now hangs of the bottom of my chin. Definitely not worth the price, in my opinion.

rating 2.0. Very homemade. Uneven ear loops. Breathable but hot and unstructured. This mask is very “homemade”. As you can see from my picture, the ear loops are very different sizes. So mine pulls to one side. There is no nose wire so there’s no structure to the mask. My favorite mask is made of that cooling neoprene type material and has the seam down the middle that gives it shape to stay off your mouth.  This mask, while easier to breath through in general, lays against your face and I almost eat it while I’m talking. It made me very sweaty too. I was hoping it would work for airplane travel but I may stick with the neoprene mask.

rating 5.0. Wish I’d found this a year ago! I wore this at work until the mandate was lifted. When I went to the eye doctor I was required to wear a mask. It serves that purpose while not restricting my ability to breathe at all. You can hold it up and  see through it yet appears solid for the people that think masks work. Perfect.

rating 5.0. These Masks are Life Savers! We don't wear masks. Anywhere. Thanks to these breathable masks, we were able to fly to attend a wedding AND we were able to breath on both flights. Thank you! ! You should be blessed for solving a major problem
for us and many others!

rating 4.0. Comfortable I bought this because I’m required to wear a mask all day and was wearing normal surgical masks but wanted to be able to breathe easier and not “rebreathe” as much. The problem is, this mask is made of soft, gauzy cheesecloth fabric, and if you are not actively moving (running, walking) the air actually gets trapped MORE and it is hotter and harder to breathe than a surgical mask. I can see that if I was more active, like if my job required more walking, this would probably be fine, or if I had a fan blowing on my face there would be no issue at all. On a plane with the fan on your face this would probably be the most comfortable mask experience as the mask is really really soft.
So I really wanted to make it work so I modified it myself with my sewing machine. I removed all “bunching” of the gauzy fabric in an effort to make it easier for the air to flow. It helped matters but still didn’t solve the issue and the surgical mask is still cooler.
I think this might be solved by using a stiffer linen material, one that holds its form a bit better.
Anyway those are my two cents. This is otherwise a really comfortable mask.

rating 5.0. Best Bottle Tree YET! The quality of this bottle tree is the best I have seen yet. Friends of mine have them, but theirs are kind of flimsy. I found this one on Amazon and ordered two - for front and back yards.

In anticipation, I painted a bunch of bottles, ready for the trees. UPS delivered them today at around 4 and by 5, they were in the ground and covered in bottles! They are attractive and extremely well-made. My neighbor, a welder, stopped by and commented on how well they are made!

So glad I bought these. They will give me enjoyment for years to come.

UPDATE: Now I have FIVE of these fantastic bottle trees around my house. Also, all five came through their first cold snowy winter perfectly. I am one more-than-satisfied customer!

rating 5.0. Southern Classic Bottle Tree Great product for a great price!  Very sturdy, looks amazing, absolutely LOVE it!  Been wanting one for a long time.  Waited on hubby to make one, but that never happened... LOL!  Found this one and had to have it!

rating 5.0. I love this whimsical bottle tree! I have always admired bottle trees and thought it would be fun to add one to my garden. This 13 bottle tree is perfect!
It's really well made. As a matter of fact the directions say the bottles will break before the welds do. Excellent directions make for a super easy set up. The hardest part was pounding it into the ground. I was worried that the tree would not go far enough into the ground to be stable, especially with the extreme wind gusts we get, so I found a 2' section of iron pipe that the tree "trunk" fit into, and pounded the pipe into the ground first. Worked just fine.
The branches are all the same length, which made for a column shaped tree with regular 750ml wine bottles. A trip to the liquor store solved that problem. I found much larger, longer 2 l wine bottles that I used for the lowest branches, 1l bottles for the next 2 sets of branches, traditional 750 ml bottles for the next 2 sets of branches, fancy 500 ml water bottles for the top pair and a red 750 ml wine bottle for the single top. It's more pyramidal shaped like a conifer tree. I chose not to spray seal the metal, preferring for it to weather naturally.
Quite the whimsical conversation piece. And made by a small company in the USA! There are several sizes and shapes available. Highly recommend.

rating 5.0. Beautifully Significant! Perfect Gift! I purchased one of these necklaces just to see the quality before ordering more. I received it quickly and just in time to gift it to my principal for Principal’s Day. She loved it! I did, too, so I ordered 3 more to gift at the end of the year to the teachers my kids had this year. I wrote a note to go with it about how amazing the dandelion is. It is one of the only plants that all parts can be used: root, stem, and flower. It has been used medicinally. During WWII Japan controlled 90% of the rubber supply. Scientists found that they could make a latex using the white substance in the dandelion stem. This dramatically helped our efforts in the war. People used to routinely plant dandelions rather than grass in the yard because it was useful, rather than grass that was just for looks. Practicality over aesthetics.
To sum up, this necklace with the pretty pearl (even more significance in a pearl that is produced from hardship in an oyster) is a fantastic gift. The meaning behind the dandelion flower (I didn’t even go into how it symbolizes the earth, moon, and stars or wishing when blowing), makes it even more special.
I’m glad I found this on Amazon. I’m sure I will be purchasing more!

rating 5.0. Gorgeous, quality rings and great customer service! These rings are perfect. If you are going for the dainty ring look that's very popular right now these are exactly that. rating 5.0. High quality items at an affordable price i cannot say enough about this little shop. Not only was the seller VERY prompt in returning my messages, they were very helpful towards my needs.

Shipping: first of all, my package was supposed to be delivered between June 4-June 7, which would have been too late for my trip to Europe. I reached out and offered to pay extra for expedited shipping. Not only did i receive my package 3 days earlier than it showed on the tracking, the seller did not have me pay any extra shipping!!

Product: wow. I will say that the jewelry itself is gorgeous. It is delicate and bright and everything I was looking for. It is exactly as shown in the photos, if not more lovely. I wore all of my pieces in Europe every day. I purchased 2 necklaces (one was a choker) and 3 stacking rings. I was very sweaty, applied sunblock and essential oils, used buckets of hand sanitizer, washed my hands a lot, went swimming at the beaches, and showered without ever taking any of it off. still super shiny and new looking after 2 weeks of this (: I will be buying more from this shop. Its very obvious that they care about their products and their customers. THANK YOU SO MUCH SOUL CREEK

rating 5.0. Best personalized name sign on the market for the price! I have been scouring the internet and saving up for a name sign for the nursery ever since I found out I was pregnant. I almost got one through a different company but I’m glad I kept looking and found this one! This sign was $30 cheaper and I liked that I could pick the material it was made out of. I went with the 36” in birch plywood because I wanted to stain it and it is stunning, but if you wanted to paint your sign, the MDF would be just as good. It’s light so I don’t have to worry about it ripping the nails out of the drywall and the whole thing is gorgeous. I recommend going with the 36” if you want it to take up a good portion of the wall. Any smaller would look a bit off on an average size wall. 10/10 recommend you stop looking and just buy your sign through this company!

rating 5.0. Love them! Love these, and I get a lot of compliments. A note to those who say they don’t fit or are difficult to get on: yes, it is tricky at first. You will get the hang of it with regular wear. And, all of our ears are different. You will need to bend them slightly to fit the curves of your very own ears. It’s not hard, but it does take a minute to get it right. If it’s pinching, bend it out a little bit. It’s really not difficult to customize these to fit and it’s well worth the effort.

rating 5.0. Exactly what I wanted! I ordered these on the 19th of Oct. I'd originally seen them in the Etsy shop but I'm accustomed to International Etsy shipments taking 3+ weeks. So I decided to order via Amazon instead. They arrived yesterday on the 25th. Sweet. As other reviewers have stated, these are textured but it's very random and helps them catch the light. Maybe my ears are just a good size for wearing climbers but I had no issue getting them in or getting them to stay put. I was looking for something minimilistic that would stay in place that was also unique. These are perfect. I am so happy with them.  I would think that really thick earlobes might present a problem and make wearing difficult but if you have medium to thinner lobes and you're on the fence, I'd def recommend buying :)
